And it’s pocket change to the corporate special interest groups who pay to ensure their CEOs keep their tax loopholes and huge salaries. But $12.39 multiplied over and over by every single person reading this email starts to add up — and that’s the power of a grassroots team. We’ll never have the deep pockets to go toe to toe with the wealthy forces who control our politics alone. But when we stand together, and everyone contributes $10 or $15 here or there, we start to become an undeniable force. [_**So, Peter, I’m asking you to chip in $12.39 in honor of our collective power. ---
****25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT****
**>From Oklahoma to Tennessee to Montana, Republicans have been silencing duly elected State Representatives.**

_These are bold authoritarian attacks on our democracy — and if we don’t take an IMMEDIATE stand, the GOP will remove ANYONE they don’t agree with!_

_Voting rights, abortion rights, and common sense gun legislation are all on the chopping block!_

[**We REFUSE to let far-right Republicans get away with these attacks on our democracy. That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition to stand with Rep. Zooey Zephyr – please sign now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230504_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=7506%2E878179%2EpG7BQ-)

Voter Protection Project

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7506%2E878179%2EpG7BQ-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7506%2E878179%2EpG7BQ-).**

name: NDRC Democracy Update
subject: The next phase in the GOP attack on voting rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Republicans already made it harder to vote in nearly half of all states. Now, they’re going national
|
---

This is urgent, team:

**First,** Donald Trump and his GOP allies spread the Big Lie that the 2020 election was “stolen” due to non-existent voter fraud.

**Then,** based on these baseless lies, Republican lawmakers passed _dozens_ of laws making it harder to vote in _nearly half_ of all states.

**Now,** Republican election deniers in Congress are _praising_ these bills. They’ve called them “models” for the kind of voter suppression they hope to pass at the national level!

**And, to make matters worse,** the Supreme Court is currently considering a case that CNN reports “may completely hollow out the Voting Rights Act by 2024.” [**_With Republican attacks on voting rights escalating, the NDRC’s efforts to strengthen our democracy and fight for fairness have never been more important. May 5
---
[The forgotten meaning of #MayTheFourth](https://substack..8K2DFkdmI87tFr7As1THN8S8T9I9t-GNLvpsJrzPOAU?)
Millions celebrate the legacy of George Lucas, but most never learn the symbolism of the Star Wars series explained by its creator
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=119384892&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE5Mzg0ODkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODMyNTA0NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4NTg0MjQ1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nKBaaCUwrV7p59G7IWBIKm3xMg0vq7wW8xzjbvbnRmk&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=119384892&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE5Mzg0ODkyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY4MzI1MDQ1MCwiZXhwIjoxNjg1ODQyNDUwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fl0CQk9XwpEPGhu_atoSta2WwRS4meKUO6LjvuNEmXc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=119384892&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE5Mzg0ODkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODMyNTA0NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4NTg0MjQ1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nKBaaCUwrV7p59G7IWBIKm3xMg0vq7wW8xzjbvbnRmk&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=119384892&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE5Mzg0ODkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODMyNTA0NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4NTg0MjQ1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nKBaaCUwrV7p59G7IWBIKm3xMg0vq7wW8xzjbvbnRmk)
My newsletter aims to not only expose corruption, but also to promote creative efforts to combat it. Sometimes, those efforts loom under our noses, remaining widely unappreciated despite growing to the scale of global ubiquity.
No better work of art demonstrates this tendency than _[Star Wars](https://substack.com/redirect/cd4f6a96-4ebc-4f53-98d8-d2c78cc8da25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
At the same time that the series has grown to colossal proportions--earning over $10 billion across more than a dozen films and a growing body of related content from television shows to an entire amusement park--its legacy has also been watered down, bled of its substantial significance.
Two themes, in particular, emerge from interviews by George Lucas that fans of his creations would do well to remember. Both offer poignant relevance that has only grown in the decades since the first film was released.
Know anyone who might learn from this post? It's free, so share it with them!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=119384892&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE5Mzg0ODkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODMyNTA0NTAsImV4cCI6MTY4NTg0MjQ1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nKBaaCUwrV7p59G7IWBIKm3xMg0vq7wW8xzjbvbnRmk)
### Eastern religion for western audiences
No work of art, whether nonfiction or fiction, has exposed the principle tenets of eastern religions to a larger number of casual observers in the West. The character of [Yoda](https://substack.com/redirect/8a20a4b8-cd57-4e44-abdd-072b97415f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) especially embodies multiple themes that animate eastern wisdom traditions, and serves as a conduit for their translation to a western audience, represented by the character of the young Luke Skywalker.
First, several of Yoda's lessons for Luke resemble cues to reject the default behaviors to which most young people in the West are acculturated. For instance, Yoda counsels Luke to discern right from wrong when calm rather than when agitated. He encourages him to focus his attention in the present moment rather than indulge fleeting fantasies and daydreams, and trains him to use his feelings--rather than only his senses--to reach out and understand the world. Each of these lessons finds inspiration in Eastern wisdom traditions.
Aside from the guidance that Luke receives in his training to sense and deploy the Force, the legacy and social role of the Jedi also implicate several principles in eastern wisdom. Guardians of peace & justice who cultivate diplomacy and martial arts as tools to resolve conflict, the Jedi pass on their training to apprentices, forming an intergenerational lineage not unlike those of martial arts traditions.
The role of the Jedi--warrior monks dedicated to preserving peace and defending justice--finds its most close analog in reality in Sikhism, or perhaps the monasteries in which devotees train Shaolin kung fu. Whichever religious or martial tradition on Earth more closely embodies it, that model of warrior-as-public-guardian stands in sharp contrast to the model of warrior-as-mercenary (or alternatively, hitman for oil and weapons companies) that dominates our world today.
A recent murder in New York illustrates the profound difference in these models. Oblivious newspaper journalists wrote story after story praising [a 24-year-old former Marine who mercilessly killed Jordan Neely](https://substack.com/redirect/bcdc0fd4-b951-4c63-9971-b78c91962625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a homeless New Yorker who worked as a Michael Jackson impersonator, in retaliation for his public expression of anger and frustration prompted by literal hunger.
When [I was arrested in the U.S. Senate in 2015](https://substack.com/redirect/94173457-ff50-4bc6-931b-5e081e54130e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it was in retaliation for asking an Obama administration official how he justified never facing a charge for perjury despite lying under oath to the Senate, when [Eric Garner had just been murdered by police officers](https://substack.com/redirect/9b05e571-abcf-487d-ba88-64b1fbb952d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in New York City who suspected--but never had to prove--that he sold cigarettes without a license.
Entirely too many Black Americans have suffered [merciless and brutal murders by supposed public guardians](https://substack.com/redirect/2df14044-f948-42d1-830f-72570fe14022?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That continuing trend of unrestrained, often lethal, and usually random violence embodied by public servants across the United States contrasts sharply with an image of warrior priests trained to calmly discern what justice requires in any given instance.
Just to be clear: a defensible system of warrior priests would require impartial judges to oversee them. Given recent [remarkable revelations](https://substack.com/redirect/b3f876a8-894b-4b80-b309-b9463e6dc4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of U.S. Supreme Court Justices disregarding ethics entirely (which [I've addressed before](https://substack.com/redirect/83002217-6e69-48b4-8f91-41a6b174c80b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and plan to do so again), the systemic failures of our so-called "justice" system unfortunately stretch from top to bottom.
### Who does the Empire represent?
_Star Wars_ did not only depict eastern religions, but also directly addressed contemporary themes concerning international relations, including the tension between center and periphery, the reliance of resource extraction on militarism, the relationship between dissent and democracy, and particularly, the role of indigenous resistance to Empire.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0a110dc8-00f0-46f4-b780-453d7b565ea3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo credit: [Photo Fiend](https://substack.com/redirect/c2673858-4c60-41bf-b868-0e1af8152108?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Few Americans appreciate allegory generally, or the roles that the memorable factions in the _Star Wars_ movies were meant to represent.
Luke and his companions struggle mightily against an Empire that Lucas explained he crafted to symbolize the United States and our military industrial complex. Most viewers of the film of course cheer for the protagonists, not recognizing that they themselves likely benefit from the work of their symbolic oppressors.
Lucas himself addressed the symbolism of his first installment in the _Star Wars_ series, _Episode IV: A New Hope_. In 2005, he [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/b0a447ff-2a64-491a-b415-09be7961bb44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the _Chicago Tribune_ that _Star Wars_ "was really about the Vietnam War, and...Nixon...trying to run for a [second] term, which got me to thinking historically about how do democracies get turned into dictatorships? Because the democracies aren't overthrown; they're given away."
Meanwhile, the most heroic characters of the original trilogy were crafted to symbolize the Viet Cong resistance to the American invasion. Lucas stated [explicitly](https://substack.com/redirect/28d2f053-82d6-4672-ac85-641af0c210c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the Ewoks and their successful defense of Endor against imperial invasion was meant to evoke the struggle by the much less technologically sophisticated Viet Cong against the far more well resourced military of the United States.
As far as I know, Lucas did not reference specific events from the Vietnam war in his interviews, but several parallels between the movies and real events are worth noting.
For example, when imperial storm troopers leave an Ewok village in ruins, their roles appear strikingly similar to those American servicemembers who massacred Vietnamese civilians by the hundreds at places like My Lai.
Similarly, when Luke discovers the smoldering remains of his uncle Owen and aunt Bea, his dejection resembles the agony of mourners responding to [CIA drone strikes, which have arbitrarily killed over a thousand people](https://substack.com/redirect/e4a067f2-abe2-4bb7-935a-eeb575fd06c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the world. Many of them have felt not only impotent fury, but like Luke, also an enduring animosity for an empire that mouths concerns about peace and human rights while abusing them relentlessly.
_Star Wars_ also depicted reflections of political theory. When Chancellor Palpatine maneuvers his way into the role of Emperor, the Queen of Naboo reflects on the popularity of authoritarian fascism. She observes, "So this is how liberty dies...with thunderous applause." It is an elegant and succinct explanation for the constitutional separation of powers, judicial supremacy, and the crucial role for counter-majoritarian courts to prevent the tyranny of the majority.
Finally, when Lando Calrissian double crosses Han Solo and his companions to sell them out to Darth Vader, it might be fairly read as foreshadowing America's contemporary role in the north Atlantic, where--according to [the important work of renowned investigative journalist Seymour Hersh](https://substack.com/redirect/366059a6-f7a8-4056-b0aa-ef92080572be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--our ally Germany finds itself confronting a fuel shortage caused by an act of international terrorism and Ecocide sponsored by the United States.
Another theme that emerges from the _Star Wars_ movies is the brutality of the Empire, towards even its own subjects and proponents. The arbitrary murder of senior generals by Darth Vader, the casual brutality towards workers, and the destruction of an entire planet simply to prove a point, all illustrate how the United States treats lives as expendable--not only around the world, but also here at home.
As I prepare to relocate away from San Francisco, I am reminded particularly of the ongoing environmental justice calamity at the Hunters Point shipyard site, where the last Black enclave of America's supposedly most progressive city has been [poisoned for decades by the U.S. Navy](https://substack.com/redirect/53659872-fe0b-49f9-bb59-72b32c24e2df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Radiation contamination resulting from its role in developing and deploying nuclear weapons against civilians at the end of the Second World War continues to drive a racist public health disaster, several generations later.
Yet, somehow, Hunters Point rarely comes up in polite public discussion, even though San Francisco has recently repeatedly appeared in national news cycles related to crime & justice.
How many stories have you read about San Francisco in the past year? Perhaps you read from national news outlets about San Francisco's retail [thefts](https://substack.com/redirect/e558e9b6-4a61-442d-bea4-ab2e1135add2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or car [break ins](https://substack.com/redirect/a21ae92d-9aee-4e8c-b1bc-0d0e764d49b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or the election that [removed](https://substack.com/redirect/70c45206-ddbd-4ed2-95ce-6759620b9d29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and later [replaced](https://substack.com/redirect/2ddd6fe2-f6fd-446b-a1e2-a5331c215bc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) our elected District Attorney. Perhaps you read about housing, or technology, or frustrated [businesspeople](https://substack.com/redirect/c3ad2c26-4264-44d3-bac6-8627ecf8924f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dismayed by the depopulation of our city's downtown.
How many of them made any reference at all to the fact that the U.S. military poisoned thousands of black San Franciscans, who continue to seek justice for having been subjected to unacceptable conditions prompting asthma rates and breast cancer rates among the worst in the world? In the discussion about the supposed "crime wave" in San Francisco, how do the continuing crimes of the U.S. government somehow escape the list?
Want the insight, history, context, and analysis that newspapers routinely fail to publish? Subscribe--whether for free, or with a paid subscription--to get the full story.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..InO-n0Ae2HSN9HmFGXxfMHFv9vO1yiXAykOywnUIVGU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=119384892)
Paid subscribers can access below a poem that I wrote about San Francisco's overlooked history, the myths of our "progressive" city versus its sad reality, and recurring historical waves of public racism ignored by city leaders and most residents. It includes a reference to Hunters Point and the disturbing reality that our local and national leaders care no more about human rights here at home than they do about the human rights of populations abroad that they routinely reduce to cannon fodder.
The bias observable in the selection of topics covered by journalists is itself a scathing indictment of whatever passes for the so-called "free press" in the United States. Ultimately, the most underlying significance of the _Star Wars_ movies is simply the need for the allegory to be presented at all, and its reflection of the continuing ignorance of a civilization seemingly unaware of its devastating impacts across the world, despite their thorough documentation.
In that respect, the _Star Wars_ series has a great deal in common with the _Hunger Games_ , as well as any number of other depictions of dystopia that reflect the oblivious complicity of an imperial center in the harms it heaps not only on those far afield from it, but also those close to home on whom it relies.
### The role of satire and allegory in social change
[Cognitive dissonance](https://substack.com/redirect/6a4b8485-97c1-474c-b8ba-203b5caad8a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) refers to the unfortunate phenomenon of human beings generally rejecting information that does not conform to their established schema. It effectively refers to systematized ignorance that people embrace in order to protect their worldviews, placing the preservation of their peace of mind before the opportunity to better perceive reality.
The fact that cognitive dissonance so predictably impedes rational thinking is part of why creative attempts to diffusing it attain such significance.
If people are too intellectually timid--or simply ignorant--to navigate tension that they discover through prose, they might still remain emotionally open to themes that they discover through poetry. Allegory, in other words, can work around the cognitive biases and blocks that inhibit awareness and systematically encourage ignorance.
If you offer someone a #MayTheFourth salutation today, take a moment and add a further thought or two. Remember that, for now, the Empire that Lucas depicted allegorically remains undefeated, that the people on Earth represented by Ewoks are still being murdered for resources from oil to lithium, and that "a new hope" might turn on each of us finding creative ways to speak truth to power.
Beyond a compelling and fascinating depiction of a fictional world "in a galaxy far, far away," the _Star Wars_ saga holds crucial, widely overlooked significance for Americans living in the age of our country's fading global dominance.
While news outlets fail to depict the costs of empire, or how it casually spills blood to fill the plates and pockets of its (either complicit or indifferent) beneficiaries, we can find some counterpoints from Hollywood--even among narratives that we might have overlooked "a long time ago."...

Millions celebrate the legacy of George Lucas, but most never learn the symbolism of the Star Wars series explained by its creator | | | ---|---|--- | | Shahid Buttar| | | | | | My newsletter aims to not only expose corruption, but also to promote creative efforts to combat it. Sometimes, those efforts loom under our noses, remaining widely unappreciated despite growing to the scale of global ubiquity. No better work of art demonstrates this tendency than . At the same time that the series has grown to colossal proportions--earning over $10 billion across more than a dozen films and a growing body of related content from television shows to an entire amusement park--its legacy has also been watered down, bled of its substantial significance. Two themes, in particular, emerge from interviews by George Lucas that fans of his creations would do well to remember. Both offer poignant relevance that has only grown in the decades since the first film was released. Know anyone who might learn from this post? It's free, so share it with them! Eastern religion for western audiences No work of art, whether nonfiction or fiction, has exposed the principle tenets of eastern religions to a larger number of casual observers in the West. The character of especially embodies multiple themes that animate eastern wisdom traditions, and serves as a conduit for their translation to a western audience, represented by the character of the young Luke Skywalker. First, several of Yoda's lessons for Luke resemble cues to reject the default behaviors to which most young people in the West are acculturated. For instance, Yoda counsels Luke to discern right from wrong when calm rather than when agitated. He encourages him to focus his attention in the present moment rather than indulge fleeting fantasies and daydreams, and trains him to use his feelings--rather than only his senses--to reach out and understand the world. Each of these lessons finds inspiration in Eastern wisdom traditions. Aside from the guidance that Luke receives in his training to sense and deploy the Force, the legacy and social role of the Jedi also implicate several principles in eastern wisdom. Guardians of peace & justice who cultivate diplomacy and martial arts as tools to resolve conflict, the Jedi pass on their training to apprentices, forming an intergenerational lineage not unlike those of martial arts traditions. The role of the Jedi--warrior monks dedicated to preserving peace and defending justice--finds its most close analog in reality in Sikhism, or perhaps the monasteries in which devotees train Shaolin kung fu. Whichever religious or martial tradition on Earth more closely embodies it, that model of warrior-as-public-guardian stands in sharp contrast to the model of warrior-as-mercenary (or alternatively, hitman for oil and weapons companies) that dominates our world today. A recent murder in New York illustrates the profound difference in these models. Oblivious newspaper journalists wrote story after story praising , a homeless New Yorker who worked as a Michael Jackson impersonator, in retaliation for his public expression of anger and frustration prompted by literal hunger. When , it was in retaliation for asking an Obama administration official how he justified never facing a charge for perjury despite lying under oath to the Senate, when in New York City who suspected--but never had to prove--that he sold cigarettes without a license. Entirely too many Black Americans have suffered . That continuing trend of unrestrained, often lethal, and usually random violence embodied by public servants across the United States contrasts sharply with an image of warrior priests trained to calmly discern what justice requires in any given instance. Just to be clear: a defensible system of warrior priests would require impartial judges to oversee them. Given recent of U.S. Supreme Court Justices disregarding ethics entirely (which and plan to do so again), the systemic failures of our so-called "justice" system unfortunately stretch from top to bottom. Who does the Empire represent? Star Wars did not only depict eastern religions, but also directly addressed contemporary themes concerning international relations, including the tension between center and periphery, the reliance of resource extraction on militarism, the relationship between dissent and democracy, and particularly, the role of indigenous resistance to Empire. | | ---|---|--- Photo credit: Few Americans appreciate allegory generally, or the roles that the memorable factions in the Star Wars movies were meant to represent. Luke and his companions struggle mightily against an Empire that Lucas explained he crafted to symbolize the United States and our military industrial complex. Most viewers of the film of course cheer for the protagonists, not recognizing that they themselves likely benefit from the work of their symbolic oppressors. In 2005, he to the Chicago Tribune that Star Wars "was really about the Vietnam War, and...Nixon...trying to run for a [second] term, which got me to thinking historically about how do democracies get turned into dictatorships? name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have faith in your love for our country
body:
Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of April strong!

|
| | Friend,

It’s Nikki with an important update to share.

Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of April strong! In just 30 days, we held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, and drew a line in the sand on important policy issues.

**BUT** this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House.

_**[As we begin a new month on the campaign trail, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbj0q12s9n3veb1jiunh4ose6u9ic5fbjjg2pd70_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71c5h2bs "As we begin a new month on the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**_

I’m a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead.

We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.**I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.**

We are in an uphill battle to save our country’s future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. _**[Can I count on you?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za4e91g9r3o324n1fb18tnhjrefa6f2ts2nqkslo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71c5h2bs "Can I count on you?")**_

**I want you to join me in this fight to save America’s future because our country is always worth fighting for.**

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people’s deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!

_**[I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrupf10jor3l1ri68bma49ca0uo7g8irtkj08ea8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71c5h2bs "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**_

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgf5851nss9jv064k4cq4qbjms0fimcgcnvsuq7g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71c5h2bs "DONATE")
---

Thank you for everything you do for our country.

---
My very best,
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3laudct2agg1jo8h0tb45cvf0gm14sdfkj0fo40_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71c5h2bs)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr12qtngsqd3s8t3rrciqnedjs1la9k7jtbd4ll8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71cph2bs)

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4eg4vrjnha7rjtqihd31q5jg3j67d4eia2ihjo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge0o71cph2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdinc9insvs1a48o2h0rt9tehdbe6hdeur948edg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqolg1960ul4j38dtn2v4vlofjgbtlp3942bqes0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $25.59?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb13foh98rotp5s02rm11naskg1ak6ntboev0i8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zconsldl5obll4e2o0vjdilv5i08kvb9ai82f9sg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk7gtofs6nso9p4j5nmui4vi0393agccu5lu9f9o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdiui04ltsn3dnqkv0se4q1qvj6ll2lar2169s98_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $25.59 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmfk3i9sbg6i65emi12iotfp0l8ogp127b3g8ctg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcotco79rrqepvo6leomftk5jbuq9jkggbrsvqe0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztokoc08p5c253ffbr2m032913l21ffe2acf4ego_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0upq92ncg2gtjfr71u2257omiqsrbn5alb01r0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $25.59 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv8ed0c47r8h7nnvnr6m1nag1pg8gj7e1rjir0ao_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6c5fbe1ls3o8rdo29qev979jq1k9onvkab369g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge6oj1c1h2bs)

---

name: D.C. Statehood Alerts (House GOP)
subject: Rumor has it...
body:
Please tell us this isn’t true!

| |
---
| | | Rumor has it you went on the record saying you support D.C. Statehood... Please tell us this isn't true!

Friend, you have been one of our House Majority's fiercest supporters, and this reality could DESTROY any hope of Republicans ever winning another election.

We need to know right here, right now, where you stand on this issue:

_**[Do you support D.C. Statehood?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpomi4aq6cp61v3b697kqudbb5j194ef9fisvnp0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9ge1o36chh2bs "Do you support D.C. Statehood?")**_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have faith in your love for our country
body:
Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of April strong!

|
| | Friend,

It’s Nikki with an important update to share.

Thanks to grassroots supporters, we finished off the month of April strong! In just 30 days, we held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, and drew a line in the sand on important policy issues.

**BUT** this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House.

_**[As we begin a new month on the campaign trail, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666783%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T2wnDOpx3lfnDM4sNlHymQ&sysid=1 "As we begin a new month on
the campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your
support matters.")**_

I’m a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead.

We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.**I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.**

We are in an uphill battle to save our country’s future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. _**[Can I count on you?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666784%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iEIQhddOUD85HFVrpV%2fKmQ&sysid=1 "Can I count on you?")**_

**I want you to join me in this fight to save America’s future because our country is always worth fighting for.**

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people’s deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let’s save our country and secure our future. And let’s move forward, together, toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America!

_**[I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TbXOFOiXRvQrNhaysPzxIw&sysid=1 "I appreciate your support
more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean
so much to me.")**_

---
| | [DONATE ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666796%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oDcrJrvLYuFzLsZ6dZcHsQ&sysid=1 "DONATE ")
---

Thank you for everything you do for our country.

---
My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JKO2m3GfmEOLqfjIJV%2b8MA&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I want to meet YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
EXCLUSIVE INVITE: DINNER WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY!

It’s Kevin McCarthy.

Have you ever thought about what it would be like to sit down with Republican leaders across the country at dinner?

Now’s your chance, Peter.

I am THRILLED to invite you to enter for a chance to attend the House Republican Spring Dinner in Florida!

This is an exclusive and rare opportunity to hear from House Republican leadership and get the inside scoop on our vision to get our country back on track.

subject: a “gotcha” moment

It's been a couple weeks since our daughter's wedding. I think for every father there is a “gotcha” moment on your daughter's special day…the day that matters more than anything, trust me! But for me, that moment happened the night before the wedding where we had invited all of our guests for a welcome party. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5cbedbe45f69622d6044651091d340c20b87a8f15ad38443edfcc77a85d68126057e8c2a349ce94e93eb57c2ab7479d8f27d8cb398f4126ba00c95980d2dd2f On the eve of wedded bliss, the wedding party decided to give their speeches. One by one the bridesmaids and groomsmen gave testament to Rena and Josh individually and as a couple. But to hear the words from Rena’s childhood and college friends were the best words I’ve heard spoken. As a father, to hear those closest to her speak about her gentleness, compassion, her work ethic, and the sweet memories solidified everything I believed my daughter to be. And the groomsmen returned the favor in kind about Josh. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5cbedbe45f69622d6044651091d340c20b87a8f15ad38443edfcc77a85d68126057e8c2a349ce94e93eb57c2ab7479d8f27d8cb398f4126ba00c95980d2dd2f So, there were two takeaways from this moment. The first was when my buddies came over to me following the speeches and said, “I can’t believe nobody got roasted tonight! I mean if that were any of us, we would have brought out the sledgehammer!!” And stories ensued, not to be repeated here! The second takeaway for me were the words spoken that night about Rena mirrored those character traits that I find in Nikki. They share those core values which make them strong independent women and leaders in their professions. I give all the credit to Nikki as a mother and role model she has been for Rena. Oh, Rena’s humor and quick wit, that was all me! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5cbedbe45f69622448fa87d6c9f6a7d0a719a284e8d78843a3300a14b115ef860b16e2d6d2511d6c4dfb8a8fd2de49346c8b29c9291e5988bff7ef0125ead1a Share this link with ten people! Thank you! name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Has The Mark Of The Beast Finally Arrived?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | **Has The Mark Of The Beast Finally Arrived?**
---
**Has The Mark Of The Beast Finally Arrived?**
| | | When I first discovered they were trying this, I was speechless.
Because **this is exactly what Christians have predicted for so long! **
The new central bank digital currency (CBDC) being discussed in D.C. will force all Americans to use a personal cryptocurrency address. Which could be used to trace and monitor you **_like a prisoner_**.
Imagine what would happen if they paired this with a "social credit" system (like in China).
Which would mean someone could secretly determine...
* Your access to healthcare, banking services, and higher education,
* Your ability to get certain jobs, and
* Maybe even your tax rate.

This sounds like **the mark of the beast** to me!
The obedient masses may welcome this new feeling of safety. But for us Christians, we know this won't end well.
Hi, I'm Lance Wallnau, Christian broadcaster and pastor. I'm one of the few Christians who publicly predicted Donald Trump's victory in 2016. My audience includes thousands of Christians who are concerned about the growing tyranny in Washington D.C.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders? I’ll tell you. **We’d live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney’s incompetency. We’re fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I’m asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10531%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kmul%2bvJ36fd2uiL5Sgk%2bRg&sysid=1) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother’s murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao’s right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao’s motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she’s now a U.S. Attorney! **That’s why we’re stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao’s freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can’t win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10532%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dDgGwb%2bgINkx4Zfpa7jKDA&sysid=1) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That’s the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we’re going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10533%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BZOeDcfZDmHDw6M726pzqg&sysid=1) Please don’t hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10534%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gOsOpTArQ6lFMPyi442hlg&sysid=1)

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: why I support Josh Riley — and you should too!
body:
House pickup opportunity
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23499fc6-939d-4d0a-829e-3d5f262b94dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddf81735-8661-44a3-a0cb-a82038477304/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35cfb868-7943-498a-91c0-5ca2342e1bc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. subject: Chief Justice John Roberts refuses to agree to a set of ethics rules for Supreme Court Justices. Tell Congress to defund them >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Defund the Supreme Court until John Roberts Agrees to Ethics Rules >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7cebf3e-0d5b-4b2f-b65c-445081d2b4a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc950ce44-3db9-467f-ab63-bca7bdd3bcfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Chief Justice John Roberts refuses to agree to a set of ethics rules for Supreme Court Justices, even though every other federal judge has them. He won't even talk to Congress about it, citing the separation of powers. **Well, maybe the separation of powers prevents Congress from imposing rules, but Congress still controls federal funding — and it should defund the Court until Roberts agrees to enact sensible ethics rules.** Recent revelations about Clarence Thomas secretly receiving millions of dollars in vacations have shattered what little integrity the Court still had. The three progressive judges still deserve respect (and if possible, their funding should be left intact ), but the conservative majority means the stench of corruption is overwhelming the whole institution. And it's time for action. [**Add your name, and tell Congress to Defund the Supreme Court until John Roberts Agrees to Ethics Rules >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T557927ec-785b-42f9-bd71-51338081dff4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: We only have two options

body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |

Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=451775f7b3b7436e89847bea0b768bcf&_e=M88oPzwJ_SVe8EL8RSvJJg_F9WqvNbplmLJoMru0mxIbvdn-ZBiaYsOlcTOrOrEOEtaW2OBA6oQXuum0b8Iqw5-yvLtkVe1WN4SGVwpGYDsyhAhA7HepgUkOkfnMXMHiPo0wNS8XwL9kJBaVUyqk6xTfsMjZ8B5RVdg97IngDaKc6PPR9-0_ndyMe7WuX33HNKoSezoW2xsGhBscpmANVaYIoubEzoyOpGaUUowXG60E3hN_W2q6pIOjNnDKtw7H0tIls7ORvUnw5yOQUX3H34NSlJ1aZgoSU9p96DVRjR9Y2jaU2HoDMW5yz23o6QFhEAdrJVx7Cm9M2YFaH4dClTqTOGgrUdpS5IdmGsQ4OzO1I99eCVHwTjiS0-aZHYghQPIXdMNXFDvHbhDwpmJAoWPQOm6MrK7gdhhRhAsb3ig%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=451775f7b3b7436e89847bea0b768bcf&_e=M88oPzwJ_SVe8EL8RSvJJg_F9WqvNbplmLJoMru0mxIbvdn-ZBiaYsOlcTOrOrEOEtaW2OBA6oQXuum0b8Iqw5-yvLtkVe1WN4SGVwpGYDsyhAhA7HepgUkOkfnMXMHiPo0wNS8XwL9kJBaVUyqk6xTfsMjZ8B5RVdg97IngDaKc6PPR9-0_ndyMe7WuX33HNKoSezoW2xsGhBscpmANVaYIoubEzoyOpGaUUowXG60E3hN_W2q6pIOjNnDKtw7H0tIls7ORvUnw5yOQUX3H33N1U_tTgQuCnP5OIprgvLfX265-C4zhfszoFLEGW27tPLWR6okbINxEEzrhM-EQs7jdzdDoK6DKnSLTOzsaCbFKjmX2BsrZq5ijm1Gxtg0gIT4W5eQim-GOXxK1Sy9pEe5ozQ2gSYKZK1FsRJnQb-s%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=451775f7b3b7436e89847bea0b768bcf&_e=M88oPzwJ_SVe8EL8RSvJJg_F9WqvNbplmLJoMru0mxIbvdn-ZBiaYsOlcTOrOrEOEtaW2OBA6oQXuum0b8Iqw5-yvLtkVe1WN4SGVwpGYDsyhAhA7HepgUkOkfnMXMHiPo0wNS8XwL9kJBaVUyqk6xTfsMjZ8B5RVdg97IngDaKc6PPR9-0_ndyMe7WuX33HNKoSezoW2xsGhBscpmANVaYIoubEzoyOpGaUUowXG60E3hN_W2q6pIOjNnDKtw7H0tIls7ORvUnw5yOQUX3H3y_bBMfzY2XvrTCIdOyvwlxK1NgK_ky_SVHyAKeOCAEzRRU5H7jAQ0T1ur55nkmcjVeOMTN5Yh0FvCa0_Rt773lij_1l0l0ND6eRQh3btA0Ds0LExjG4yBRwqek2rQ01oa6x4uPb_kDiOSNiOhQnd-k%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=451775f7b3b7436e89847bea0b768bcf&_e=M88oPzwJ_SVe8EL8RSvJJg_F9WqvNbplmLJoMru0mxIbvdn-ZBiaYsOlcTOrOrEOEtaW2OBA6oQXuum0b8Iqw5-yvLtkVe1WN4SGVwpGYDsyhAhA7HepgUkOkfnMXMHiPo0wNS8XwL9kJBaVUyqk6xTfsMjZ8B5RVdg97IngDaKc6PPR9-0_ndyMe7WuX33HNKoSezoW2xsGhBscpmANVaYIoubEzoyOpGaUUowXG60E3hN_W2q6pIOjNnDKtw7H0tIls7ORvUnw5yOQUX3H37dYemKuMFIsOwm6ifUJy-sGuQnFJl_o_RzLZjUxWYpWHMEok8afGY84wn4Pmx5r90C97Q7raMnl_2aBInETGOyzw9MYGVTixyr4UtLnXVuckMRVjqrLPzoRf1MmjldtUK6b8k7nykdMwO7TyqR6Cgw%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: The Flyover
subject: Republicans Defend Supreme Court, Abortion Battle Heats Up, Top Margarita Recipes
body:

## Republicans Defend Clarence Thomas
Republicans [pushed back hard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-NvRE9Hh8mA0OXbOna0QL8sKmwsYAk6r-v0rnj6ZbTfd3nu0s5Heun28n2WGYXenrSDIqBYihmHBcbiZDESJZrI9BobaZxs9xww7U26upkpIkT-rhoMFcnlAmIY7IIKECB4gBc4EVLmJzwZDBy9JIGCbSkXurlu6SjbxTzT3lSvYSyj9luvZ9tEB8D3ga8ufOgV3urN9SeQqYBbyG7Skcg1reyu8Z6TWdj7XFW2omF8qidUd9SaCyUY63UGpukJghOevR8ouBVXMzileHE5dUFGKtdzlfKOTU9DRLW3aX8F9X_f_QbAAD__8w7aBU) against efforts to force a code of ethics on the Supreme Court in the wake of continuing reports of gifts to Justice Clarence Thomas from a billionaire friend. It remains unclear exactly how Democrats in Congress [plan to handle the issue,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL_GZEZNG4MnILiEbC69EBnTHnpkMLLNcPv3KzbepKSSSqqn9-85PS0H3l9_7UZD8XGyrvCHJtAStEQ1YbUMnghJVTQ0nVFous701TooC7Y3qmmx6zV405JWtMzakPG2e7iKBwRUoEE3AI3Cumuht2omg77BuSXRAi1cYqrfkfeykg9f8UOpdnGrwrCWcmSh_ggcBY7XddVHDFzYxXsgcNzpygLH-0XgCPoOFDhm2m0hudCWJf13MfFd83kk2ki6eKYiqazssrRZupXJy_eZCzuSeT_nLFeyifeXBIBHa3RTpWE5Lg6Bc9eLFl6b5fCDWX639h0AAP__1E9tgQ) with Republicans insisting that the Supreme Court--as an independent branch of the government--should police itself on ethics policies. In defense of Justice Thomas, GOP legislators also point to [ethically questionable behavior by liberal justices,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtyrDAQBb8GMlFixOsGBDchW6cOqZEYYNYCUdIA9t-71okTx-cE3f3-GB_InvflDTfqZQ4jOuGLRl0rXSswI-RTPxMBmZz6sukMdE3TtfnaNy24qpyota7usDSdc7pu_83W1giltjn3oMHoWtel1qWBoql0i8ZSB3MJtqKs0jSxhFg8A--y0uy_wkWxcGHLfb-KHCkz_zMYMhju-y7m8LnTnV57BsMRPAu7lMEw0RZcREkKRdB9KBf2RPHCl4xK5xFpI-XCGUU9zyTsKCl7ilrxIuXDvihe9hBpUp4tRfS_N5KVHXrFKZ2U8thPx83ec2rarNLLhux_gOXvft8BAAD__0S_dzQ) which in the past raised no clamor in Congress.

## Anheuser-Busch CEO Moves to End Controversy
CEO Michel Doukeris told investors the company's relationship with trans influencer Dylan Mulvaney, which has cost its brand Bud Light heavily in lost sales and brand value, was a [one-shot promotion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SpCAYAJ9GMyzkR72A4BKzufRC6wM-lF1-pgDH9e23ZuPNu6q7-v9je4APPu3_IKJqLm9gmn_hRiWhkjC-sd4qh8iQ96jGaeFsmaZl7g8FXMAkxWwXp2chlj9SOK2d5LOkMM2694pRxqmkcqR05GyYBJ2Ba1yYG5kW2AmK1rdcho_sUzvQhTu_sAwmxz6oo7Vn7fjfjq0dW6_rGlz-0mf1CWt9Mx1bI5RPbLVjq8FMrK8NksFKIB14VixEn9UcRJ-WBL8fjdg7QCLxDC9IeBOTUytvZ71Jyo24XCIEYiA-we-pL8o-Lx-Cr9PcCbpH8OEnr_1-6zsAAP__i5Zvxw) never meant as a long-term partnership. To soothe investors, A-B plans to [triple its marketing spending](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O6yAQxfGnsTuiYcBACorbpMttt7T4GGxWGEeYJMrbr7z1lke_5uj_dZ_vLpdcl_9uI9vTPrvQ84tmmBhMDMWMY7SJCEmMZLkyAo1SRo-rFd5oz_V1oikoHbT2qFUSwQdheOR-zBYBBUwwcQAu8KIkaCc8GUwcvaRBAsXc93b53nPtK6Xy2V_ULmHfxmLX3h_HIP4NeBvw5h6V3sdJ52g9h0ID3vwzspKXtTNP1Fj8FFfZ9iwvV-nDenP1WKjGk6S5Jq8ggiQfAaVRyQBX15CClFqOzcbHO5eSD6UHCcvmcvm90v8u8xMAAP__zXlj0g) in the U.S. this summer, focusing primarily on sports and music festivals. It's also paying extra to support its wholesalers and other employees who were hit financially by Bud Light's sharp decline. "Everything we do should be about beer and should promote beer," he said. In advertising circles, the Bud Light brand has long been celebrated for its very funny commercials [(watch here)](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAUAL8GtliPB8Z0YKjUuFM6VWo3C8MjpsIhcrAt_32Vzl3vpJPu6zJcXMrpdv1wM9kay-B8TRsN0J6gPaEckAcbiZAkJyu0kWi0Nh2f7AuooI3y1ELnUAQhHBjpOh8xeoTIk0VACS20AkBIbLSCzsmRDEaBoyKmgEKqZWl-SrrViWI-ykZL48vMs51qvT-YfGXYM-z3fW-OstZ1pKd_Elf9xGS_MfnW998rvn_G83Hmiw33PeWcHrpjCq6zS_kvWf8__A0AAP__htZQ3g). At the moment, it's being reviled by many Americans, including fans at Fenway Park who aren't [standing in line](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1PwzAQQH-NvTU6nz_iDh4QUrYiNsbISc7NISepkqMV_HoErGxPesPTe7v0l8yV1-tLXihJ2fo8Ct-pB38Cf0Lbo55SIUKympIJ0WIMIbZ6TgBuDGfKQyFsyxRcNDbG8whkJm-s05wQ0IIHbwCMxSY4aLMdKGIxODhSDmhi2fbmfeNVZir1c7vT3ozbomuaRW6Hsk8KO4WdPFjkzynsnln4i9ZuJ3rd6VDYHZLl4wdM8M44H7wHCw4stKj3NN0eXCsfoVUOrkvm-luR_6e_AwAA__90zlV8) for Bud Light.

Republicans pushed back hard against efforts to force a code of ethics on the Supreme Court in the wake of continuing reports of past gifts made to Justice Clarence Thomas by a billionaire friend. | | | | | | Friday, May 5, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering Republican efforts to defend Justice Clarence Thomas’ reputation, the battle over abortion rising across the nation, and the five best Margarita recipes for Cinco de Mayo. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Republicans Defend Clarence Thomas Republicans against efforts to force a code of ethics on the Supreme Court in the wake of continuing reports of gifts to Justice Clarence Thomas from a billionaire friend. It remains unclear exactly how Democrats in Congress with Republicans insisting that the Supreme Court--as an independent branch of the government--should police itself on ethics policies. In defense of Justice Thomas, GOP legislators also point to which in the past raised no clamor in Congress. Abortion Battles Heat Up State by State A number of states are moving forward this week with . In Montana, signed five anti-abortion bills, and in , Republicans unveiled an agreement on a 12-week abortion ban. Republicans are refusing Democrats the quorum needed to pass a pro-abortion bill. by contrast, the governor signed a bill protecting abortion rights, and moved abortion protection legislation forward as well. Anheuser-Busch CEO Moves to End Controversy CEO Michel Doukeris told investors the company's relationship with trans influencer Dylan Mulvaney, which has cost its brand Bud Light heavily in lost sales and brand value, was a never meant as a long-term partnership. To soothe investors, A-B plans to in the U.S. this summer, focusing primarily on sports and music festivals. It's also paying extra to support its wholesalers and other employees who were hit financially by Bud Light's sharp decline. "Everything we do should be about beer and should promote beer," he said. In advertising circles, the Bud Light brand has long been celebrated for its very funny commercials . At the moment, it's being reviled by many Americans, including fans at Fenway Park who aren't for Bud Light. ➤ Russia accused the US of responsibility for the Kremlin drone attack this week, a charge US officials quickly denied. Russia also claims the right to retaliate, and some officials there have called for killing Ukranian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. () ➤ New York Democrats are at odds with each other over the choking death of a black subway rider by a white passenger. Top city officials defend the decision to release the passenger without charges pending investigation, but many progressive Democrats are angry he wasn't charged with murder. () ➤ The Florida Legislature passed new bills extending the state's control over public education in the state. Gov. Ron DeSantis is expected to sign the bills, which ban diversity programs in higher education and end pronoun-use requirements () ➤ Colorado’s largest teachers’ union passed a resolution declaring that “capitalism requires exploitation of children, public schools, land, labor, and/or resources.” The resolution is watered down from an original version that was even stronger. () ➤ The Kentucky Derby runs Saturday at Churchill Downs, even as race officials launch an investigation into the "unusual" deaths of four horses at the track. Betters have made Forte, a thoroughbred who's won six of his last seven races, a 3-1 favorite. () ➤ Ticket prices skyrocket for the third game of the Lakers-Warriors NBA playoffs, the first home game of the series for the Lakers. At an average price of $873 per ticket, Game 3 has the highest NBA prices seen in L.A. since Kobe Bryant's final game in 2016. You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response. 2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. name: Greater Georgia

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, MAY 5
GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES FIRST HISPANIC OUTREACH CAMPAIGN OF 2023
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia launched its latest Hispanic voter outreach initiative. The campaign, which includes Spanish-language digital ads and in-person events, aims to inform voters about key legislative achievements during the 2023 Legislative Session. The effort encourages Hispanic citizens to register to vote and engage in the electoral process.
"Core to our mission at Greater Georgia is reaching out to and engaging diverse communities to grow the conservative movement," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "Less than half of Hispanic citizens are registered to vote in our state - but they are one of our fastest growing demographics, and a key part of Georgia's workforce and communities. Greater Georgia is excited to launch this outreach campaign to engage previously overlooked communities in the electoral process, mobilizing them to action and sharing the conservative values that lift families up across our state."
The first event of the campaign will be held this weekend in Gwinnett County. See samples of the digital ads below.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###

body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$25.59**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2024a8ebcc484875b4501b96bfb8be97&_e=rwNAyHMTV3BJiN9XRL1Sxl_08CK6RzWIbZGwE4-IQHk5VL-ZuuNPf-sv-ODlig2IQFw4oHQww1Ayopbwysd-85WT_paUoA_ZzbeLenTEYhOZU92zb9lOpOY4itc8_D4hzxKb2dFyM3OwN6-XmUp7ERoRdt8egx_x-m24ruCUhXKLTymDVHgtbD2Ouz7zhHrbKcjxJE5GdeeDi4CIrFB8sZfQ8hqemtMeBimbygxCTchJwU1H4U4PSaA0lPxF-Zaa5kZOJmLOCd9Bt1GoplXHh_7S0cJ_chlIkoOpqvmRlo4c6uwK1NwWnp2qi6xbWxSPCKEmiXCKTll48tybtOl8oKOA7i-rVfMHA8vP_cHUqYzOiP66z1nOvcqk7uK6jR3kQWoUFRri_YAqi8IWFuLK-uQdtmxG-xrxjp-4mLoFOFg-L07aZHk-jIFf3RL2acdJ)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2024a8ebcc484875b4501b96bfb8be97&_e=rwNAyHMTV3BJiN9XRL1Sxl_08CK6RzWIbZGwE4-IQHk5VL-ZuuNPf-sv-ODlig2IQFw4oHQww1Ayopbwysd-85WT_paUoA_ZzbeLenTEYhOZU92zb9lOpOY4itc8_D4hzxKb2dFyM3OwN6-XmUp7ERoRdt8egx_x-m24ruCUhXKLTymDVHgtbD2Ouz7zhHrbKcjxJE5GdeeDi4CIrFB8sZfQ8hqemtMeBimbygxCTcgsRP-V8I23-a6hBj9dGA8eeurU6QTM5CBmdb3VDgeuYBpb3Q8vIdPVm4qkkrbhRUi1HbQWXEN8KY58QBY_J00snMj5NIdsai7y4A8znQYyAbRh0nuSUmP4wI9JdS0GljHbWCEtjXF_sVGruDtmBlNhCWBlh_4yvyWJJg06iSidAvesmJFw98KhpvSxZnD0yWw%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2024a8ebcc484875b4501b96bfb8be97&_e=rwNAyHMTV3BJiN9XRL1Sxl_08CK6RzWIbZGwE4-IQHk5VL-ZuuNPf-sv-ODlig2IQFw4oHQww1Ayopbwysd-85WT_paUoA_ZzbeLenTEYhOZU92zb9lOpOY4itc8_D4hzxKb2dFyM3OwN6-XmUp7ERoRdt8egx_x-m24ruCUhXKLTymDVHgtbD2Ouz7zhHrbKcjxJE5GdeeDi4CIrFB8sZfQ8hqemtMeBimbygxCTcgsRP-V8I23-a6hBj9dGA8eeurU6QTM5CBmdb3VDgeuYC5iu2XSM09x2V0ethlkVf5hthdJ1-YIxMcfv2Bgidmlq18iAozCSyBP6LtkiH5Jd8UPZSTPedkHZcHTg6onZObUfSP-H76WZW3fwwwV--e2DyYT5kVi4SxLu6UqKjnNPC401aqN_lOhXiv_ZOEEfV0%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Rampant climate lies on YouTube
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757739?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell Google to STOP profiting from climate disinformation![Please take immediate action!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757740?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Friend, thanks to help from people like you, we successfully pressured Tik Tok to release a policy to fight climate lies on its platform, **covering information that undermines the scientific consensus of climate change. ** **This proves that your actions make a true difference.** But there’s so much more work to be done at companies like Google that are still spreading oil and gas propaganda and accelerating the climate crisis. There’s no time to waste! [**Will you tell Google to STOP promoting climate lies and ensure everyone receives accurate information to help fight the climate crisis?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757741?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757742?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Big Oil has been _**lying to you for DECADES,**_ Friend. It’s done everything in its power to deflect, distract, and bury evidence of the climate crisis because **they don’t want to stop making money off fossil fuels. **
These companies continue lying to you today -- but now they have an ally in Google and big tech, which profits when Big Oil spreads its propaganda. A recent report demonstrates how Google fails to enforce its own policies against climate disinformation on YouTube. A recent study found that nearly half of the **$23.7 MILLION** spent on Google search ads by oil and gas companies in the last two years have**targeted search terms on environmental sustainability. **
A misled public cannot fight the climate crisis. We need accurate information founded in science, not whatever latest propaganda soundbite Big Oil has concocted, and Google helps to spread. **[Please, Friend, stand up to Big Oil and Big Tech before 11:59 pm TONIGHT and DEMAND they tell the public the truth about climate change.>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757743?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1757742?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Michael Khoo
Climate disinformation program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
