subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOsV27D1N

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOsV27D1N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61771445:WOsV27D1N:m:3:2532013465:003787F806B357F125590AEB228C49FA:r

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61771445:WOsV27D1N:m:3:2532013465:003787F806B357F125590AEB228C49FA:r

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

1844

Dear Friends,

Early Voting has started!

Beginning today, Friday May 5th, you can cast your ballot in the Republican Primary at your local Registrar's Office.

Early Voting is open Monday through Friday and also on the last two Saturdays, June 10 and June 17.

Here are the two locations for the 12th Senate District Republican Primary:

Chesterfield County voters- 9848 Lori Rd. Chesterfield, VA 23235.

Colonial Heights voters- 201 James Ave. Colonial Heights, VA 23834.

And please let us know if you can volunteer for an hour or two by [emailing us, chris@chaseforva.com.](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)

You don't have to wait until June 20th to cast your vote.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjliuhljst1f9d5hcidd7uths5n0nhku9qlo74o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2uf0aacverqiii1jksg1fgordopamsfacvqddg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0ev334ro7rlnver2p6t2dutrtr150q9eh8k668_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zngdqvnhpol0cf0cofnc8jh5eis8ifc0vl5n47p0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0pd7itnghbn6o8dekpkaanpg262ckleuc4ub86o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztpj8stc2pm78ssara46u4ephjp5cfbad8auskio_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg3q7rdrifoff8ij66fjihfpsre7qtbh7vb07hlo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlepp9dodiela8hlc9ea194lrsogi8dpt7fur10g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpg62oj2cjh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18946?t=1001&akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S ][IMG]

Peter, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right
now.

The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and
every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted
Cruz and flipping Texas Blue!

Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this
campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $2,500,000
launch week goal!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18946?t=1002&akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S ]Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you and we just need $4,454
more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $25 to power
my Democratic campaign and Charles Booker? Let’s do this →

---------Forwarded Message---------

Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18946?t=1003&akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S ]That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $25
or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help
reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $2,500,000? Every dollar you can
spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz,
flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →

CHIP IN →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18946?t=1004&akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented
grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a
part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my
campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and
defend our Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230505-3207-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3207_346206_wmmb_S&akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3207%2E346206%2Ewmmb_S

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gabe=20Amo?=
subject: Enough is Enough.
body:
We must protect our communities from gun violence | | | |
---
| | | Hi Friend,

I’m running for Congress because I know Rhode Islanders are facing a lot of challenges right now. And I’m going to do everything I can in Congress to make progress on the issues that matter most. I want to share more detail about exactly what these issues mean to me.

I know I’m not alone when I say that **I’m sick and tired of seeing senseless mass shootings what seems like every single day in this country.** I am outraged. Enough is enough — we need to take real steps to protect our communities from gun violence.

I’ve been at the forefront taking swift action when a tragic shooting occurs. In my time at the White House,**I was often the first call from the White House** to the mayor or local elected official to let them know we are with them to help heal the community. [](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=e9a3051c26&e=9651074c98)
From Nashville, to Uvalde, to Highland Park, to Buffalo, and countless other mass atrocities — this nation will continue to be in crisis until we take real, meaningful action against the scourge of gun violence _**now.**_

We must pass common sense gun safety measures at the national level. We cannot continue to allow a national tragedy to occur every week. **I am in this race for Congress to ensure that the people of this community are protected from gun violence. **

As your representative in Congress, I will always fight to keep our communities safe. With the safety of our families at stake, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to join me in this fight: [****](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=cf06fa5b21&e=9651074c98) In service,

Gabe Amo
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=3f180d07de&e=9651074c98)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We have just the person to take out Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024.
body:
Allred’s running!!!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b881333-29d6-4f6a-9e65-8479a094d113/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_** **We have just the person to take out Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3504b54-3b81-466e-b461-cf91e150b4f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b0cd7aa-0000-4b5c-bbc3-fa7b0622dda5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21ce06ea-2bbb-4caf-9c5f-c8d34aba6003/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17e45cfc-e7d2-4669-9766-13c3e5d7e3f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
friend, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.
The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue!
Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $2,500,000 launch week goal!
Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you and we just need $3,218 more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $15 to power my Democratic campaign and Serve America ? Let’s do this → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
--------Forwarded Message--------
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $2,500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

---
|

Today, I got a letter from the **Satanic Temple** notifying me that a donation had been made in my name.
Not only that but they included blood on the inside of it, which is _just nasty_.
We are really in a **spiritual war between Good & Evil**.
However, we must remember: “ _The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it_ ” - John 1:5
We are over the target and the darkness knows it. Let's keep advancing the light of Jesus of Christ.

Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829064/404709252/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Have you checked your mailbox yet? Election Day is May 16th, and your ballot should have arrived. We need to elect more environmental and social justice champions to create a more inclusive democracy and pass bold climate action. **And it all starts by making sure you, your friends, your family, and everyone in our communities know where candidates stand on the issues you care about.** We hope the information we’re sharing helps you make your voice heard. At OLCV, we’ve endorsed the following pro-climate and pro-environment candidates for the upcoming election:
* **[Ana del Rocío](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829065/404709253/-100301710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for the Multnomah County Commission, representing District 3
* **[Lyndsie Leech](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829066/404709254/-1919296919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Eugene City Council, representing Ward 7
* **[Jodie Barram](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829067/404709255/-775621642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Bend Park & Recreation District Board, Seat #2
* **[Miles Palacios](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829068/404709256/1546454876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 4
* **[Tya Ping](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829069/404709257/-1789308038?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 5

This year is also a big year for school board races. To elect the right leaders shaping the landscape of our future, we need to know where they stand. Though we do not have an endorsement process for school board races, we’ve put together our **[Environmental Voter Guide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829070/404709258/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. In the voter guide, you’ll find candidates’ answers to three questions centered on their environmental values and how they plan to advance justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion efforts for our kids. Whether you plan to vote by mail, in person, or [drop your ballot off at a drop box](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829071/404709259/1486974124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230), be sure to **[check out the answers from candidates in your local school board race](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62829072/404709260/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwMjkwZTNmLTRiZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mNYK93tg_u5auxhkCOwrAtrIcOpepzq_y9bIYdV0ttg=&emci=77debe21-eaea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f0290e3f-4beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. Happy voting! Sincerely,
Britney VanCitters
Organizing Manager, OLCV |

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Have you checked your mailbox yet? Election Day is May 16th, and your ballot should have arrived. We need to elect more environmental and social justice champions to create a more inclusive democracy and pass bold climate action. And it all starts by making sure you, your friends, your family, and everyone in our communities know where candidates stand on the issues you care about. We hope the information we’re sharing helps you make your voice heard. At OLCV, we’ve endorsed the following pro-climate and pro-environment candidates for the upcoming election: for the Multnomah County Commission, representing District 3 for Eugene City Council, representing Ward 7 for Bend Park & Recreation District Board, Seat #2 for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 4 for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 5 This year is also a big year for school board races. To elect the right leaders shaping the landscape of our future, we need to know where they stand. Though we do not have an endorsement process for school board races, we’ve put together our . In the voter guide, you’ll find candidates’ answers to three questions centered on their environmental values and how they plan to advance justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion efforts for our kids. Whether you plan to vote by mail, in person, or , be sure to **. Happy voting! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters Organizing Manager, OLCV | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. subject: Join Alfonso For Congress

body:
Championing Gun Law Reform and Access to Healthcare | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/join-alfonso-for-congress?e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
|
---
# Championing Gun-Law Reform and Access to Healthcare
**I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to you on behalf of Alfonso For Congress. We are running a grassroots campaign focused on improving gun laws and ensuring access to quality healthcare for all Americans.****At a time when our nation faces significant challenges. Your contribution, no matter the amount, will play a vital role in our campaign's success.**
**It is crucial to have leaders who are committed to making positive changes that benefit our communities. Joseph Alfonso, as a candidate for Congress, is dedicated to taking decisive action on two critical issues: gun law reform and access to healthcare.****Gun Law Reform: Alfonso firmly believes in the right to bear arms while recognizing the urgent need for comprehensive gun law reform. Our current system has failed to protect innocent lives, and it is time for meaningful change. Alfonso supports common-sense measures such as universal background checks, closing gun show loopholes, and implementing responsible storage laws. With your support, Alfonso will work tirelessly to ensure that our communities are safe and secure, without infringing upon our constitutional rights.**
**Access to Healthcare: Alfonso strongly advocates for accessible, affordable, and comprehensive healthcare for all Americans. He understands that healthcare should not be a privilege but a fundamental right. Alfonso's vision includes expanding Medicaid, supporting the Affordable Care Act, and working towards a system that puts patients before profits. By electing Alfonso to Congress, we can make significant strides towards a society where nobody has to choose between their health and financial stability.****However, the road to progress is not without obstacles. Alfonso's opponent has remained conspicuously silent on critical issues related to far-right extremist groups. Our community deserves a representative who will stand up against hate, violence, and bigotry. By supporting Alfonso, we can send a clear message that we value inclusivity, unity, and the safety of all residents in our district.**
**We kindly ask for a donation of $5, $25, or any other amount you can afford. Every dollar will go towards supporting Alfonso's message, organizing community outreach, and ensuring that our district has a voice in Congress that truly represents their interests.****To donate, please visit our secure online donation portal at https://secure.actblue.com/donate/alfonsoforcongressmi4 . Your contribution will make a meaningful impact on our campaign and the lives of countless Americans who are counting on us to bring about positive change.****Thank you for considering supporting Alfonso For Congress. Together, we can create a brighter future for our district, where gun laws are reformed, healthcare is accessible, and extremist ideologies are firmly confronted.**
**Sincerely,**
**Alfonso For Congress Team**

|

## The Kellen Courier - Campaign Newsletter, Edition 5
---
| |
---
| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. Friends, Family, and Supporters, In addition to the generous donations hundreds of you have given and pledged to the campaign, many of you have asked how you can continue to support! In this newsletter, We are introducing our Supporter Playbook! Below are 7 ways you can support our campaign: 1\. SPONSOR A FUNDRAISER BEFORE JUNE 30TH. Please work with my team at info@kellencurry.com to schedule and set up a fundraiser event with your network. In general, my team will need to know (1) day, and time, (2) location; i.e. Zoom or in-person, (3) financial model for raising funds; i.e. will there be a ticket price, raffle, different contribution levels, etc. (4) audience, expected number of attendees, and estimated amount you believe will be raised, (5) material/support you need from us ahead of time; e.g. we can send out your email content through our email service provider, or help with providing images for invites, and (6) if there is a cost required by the campaign, such as travel, we'll need to assess the full cost/benefit. My team can also share best practices and rules around fundraising compliance. 2\. INTRODUCTIONS TO POTENTIAL DONORS & CALL TIME SUPPORT. Your network is invaluable. You can provide us with names, phone numbers, and "ask amounts" of people I should call for donations. Any prep you can do ahead of time with the potential donor would be great too. Extra bonus points if you are on-the-line or Zoom with me when I call them too. 3\. IN-NETWORK SHOUT OUTS. Any opportunities to include our campaign in an email or thread with groups you are a part of would be incredibly beneficial (e.g. alumni groups, friend/family groups, co-workers, etc.). Your positive words about our campaign, and encouragement to [donate](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=zH_UIuz-w57J0W1X7uzR9DX6JGwitPdtBFMJQnW4_rE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ) at is greatly appreciated. We can also send you a PDF (below) to attach to your emails with information on our Path to Victory.
---
| |
---
| | 4\. FOLLOW, LIKE, SHARE AND COMMENT ON OUR SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS. You can help us win the social media algorithms by engaging with us continuously online.Facebook:
* [Personal Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=RghuJJxgl4OUgucoc_KtuL9toPcUEKmVwsw6YRqoks0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3Byb2ZpbGUucGhwP2lkPTEwMDA5MTU1MjYzNDI2MyIsInIiOiIwNzI4Y2NkNS00YWY5LTRkMTgtNTMzOC1mNjE1NDI4MDU0NzIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ)
* [Public Figure Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=4lGb8FWtgwxW05to_NW5Xo3CvxOfyMZmJjJU_xS5n5Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3Byb2ZpbGUucGhwP2lkPTEwMDA5MTczODY4NjE2MyIsInIiOiIwNzI4Y2NkNS00YWY5LTRkMTgtNTMzOC1mNjE1NDI4MDU0NzIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ)

Instagram:
* [Personal Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=_2W6AW5Itz46bepwYivRlqNQwj1tAwfTVbnqJ_l48OE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9rZWxsZW5jdXJyeS8iLCJyIjoiMDcyOGNjZDUtNGFmOS00ZDE4LTUzMzgtZjYxNTQyODA1NDcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0)

Twitter:
* [Personal Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=krpyO61SUVpwW1QuPEba6hhZKii7cxZ3NbEfW80_PdI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9rZWxsZW5fY3VycnkiLCJyIjoiMDcyOGNjZDUtNGFmOS00ZDE4LTUzMzgtZjYxNTQyODA1NDcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0)

TikTok:
* [Personal Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=AI6j_pCVzLwDhAsdtrdGZPtX4lwEpWm-chTbjsqorTA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGlrdG9rLmNvbS9Aa2VsbGVuY3VycnkiLCJyIjoiMDcyOGNjZDUtNGFmOS00ZDE4LTUzMzgtZjYxNTQyODA1NDcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0)

LinkedIn:
* [Personal Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=c5nAz66DK3waHFMfIZOXbUVpSV2vVRh9BNbC30e1P3A.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2tlbGxlbi1jdXJyeS8iLCJyIjoiMDcyOGNjZDUtNGFmOS00ZDE4LTUzMzgtZjYxNTQyODA1NDcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0)
* [Public Figure Page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=ZooyGbTrbhMISWXh4jKv43xg_jRQv_rBreaagHuIFcA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2NvbXBhbnkvZnJpZW5kcy1vZi1rZWxsZW4tY3VycnkvIiwiciI6IjA3MjhjY2Q1LTRhZjktNGQxOC01MzM4LWY2MTU0MjgwNTQ3MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjIxOGM2YmFhLTUzOWUtNDczYS1iNjNmLWIyMzRjNzZlOGM3NCJ9)

5\. VIDEOS OF SUPPORT. You can create a 15-60 second video about "why" you support our campaign, and (1) post on your social media for us to LIKE & SHARE also, or (2) send the video to us at info@kellencurry.com or text the video to 703-258-5251 for us to post on our social media channels. 6\. RESEARCH. Any research on events, groups or people we should be engaging with online, on social media, or in-person is incredibly helpful. If you can provide URLs to their pages, usernames, or event information that would make it easy for us to connect. Other research on additional topics is helpful too! 7\. DRAFTS OF SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS. Providing us with 280-character social media posts with links or images is super helpful to us. If someone has a particular skill set such as video editing or image editing and wants to create a product we can use to post, such as a montage or collage, that would also be super helpful too. My team is here to help you! We are also open to other ideas you may have. Again, I am so grateful for all the words of encouragement. They keep me going every hour of the day, and I can't do this without you! See our archived Newsletters [here](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/79OVaZOIK/c?w=dVNoArUsZtp7Cm5t1PNldP3QiKjguGJR7BFmQ6YJVq0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL25ld3NsZXR0ZXIiLCJyIjoiMDcyOGNjZDUtNGFmOS00ZDE4LTUzMzgtZjYxNTQyODA1NDcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0).
---
| | All the Best,

In general, my team will need to know (1) day, and time, (2) location; i.e. Zoom or in-person, (3) financial model for raising funds; i.e. will there be a ticket price, raffle, different contribution levels, etc. (4) audience, expected number of attendees, and estimated amount you believe will be raised, (5) material/support you need from us ahead of time; e.g. we can send out your email content through our email service provider, or help with providing images for invites, and (6) if there is a cost required by the campaign, such as travel, we'll need to assess the full cost/benefit. My team can also share best practices and rules around fundraising compliance. 2\. INTRODUCTIONS TO POTENTIAL DONORS & CALL TIME SUPPORT. Your network is invaluable. You can provide us with names, phone numbers, and "ask amounts" of people I should call for donations. Any prep you can do ahead of time with the potential donor would be great too. Extra bonus points if you are on-the-line or Zoom with me when I call them too. 3\. IN-NETWORK SHOUT OUTS. Any opportunities to include our campaign in an email or thread with groups you are a part of would be incredibly beneficial (e.g. alumni groups, friend/family groups, co-workers, etc.). Your positive words about our campaign, and encouragement to at is greatly appreciated. We can also send you a PDF (below) to attach to your emails with information on our Path to Victory. | | | | 4\. FOLLOW, LIKE, SHARE AND COMMENT ON OUR SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS. You can help us win the social media algorithms by engaging with us continuously online.Facebook: Instagram: Twitter: TikTok: LinkedIn: 5\. VIDEOS OF SUPPORT. You can create a 15-60 second video about "why" you support our campaign, and (1) post on your social media for us to LIKE & SHARE also, or (2) send the video to us at info@kellencurry.com or text the video to 703-258-5251 for us to post on our social media channels. 6\. RESEARCH. Any research on events, groups or people we should be engaging with online, on social media, or in-person is incredibly helpful. If you can provide URLs to their pages, usernames, or event information that would make it easy for us to connect. Other research on additional topics is helpful too! 7\. DRAFTS OF SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS. Providing us with 280-character social media posts with links or images is super helpful to us. If someone has a particular skill set such as video editing or image editing and wants to create a product we can use to post, such as a montage or collage, that would also be super helpful too. My team is here to help you! We are also open to other ideas you may have. Again, I am so grateful for all the words of encouragement. They keep me going every hour of the day, and I can't do this without you! See our archived Newsletters . | | All the Best, | | | | Kellen J. Curry | | | | | | | | Paid For By Friends of Kellen Curry | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.**

clean_body: for this critical donor drive | | | Peter, we’re not going to sugarcoat it: We absolutely need you on board for this critical, one-day donor drive if we’re going to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. If that’s all you need to hear,= If not, keep reading. You might be asking yourself – the next major election is a year and a half away, why is today so critical in our efforts to stop MTG? Here’s your answer:The GOP is not taking a single second off, so neither can we. Right now, the GOP is working furiously to flip Georgia back to RED. The Koch network is dispatching a massive field army to Georgia. Donald Trump and other GOP presidential candidates are furiously raising money to defeat us. Every single second, their MAGA movement is growing stronger. Enter Marjorie Taylor Greene. She’s a leading contender to be a VP pick for the GOP. She has spots on some of the most important House committees. And she’s using her megaphone to spread baseless conspiracy theories, accuse the Bidens of sex trafficking, attack mothers, and more. If we can’t flip back the House, keep the White House, and boot Marjorie Taylor Greene from her committees, she will ascend to an even higher level of power, and we will be very limited in what we can do to stop her! = | = Thank you, thank you, thank you! –GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

subject: Buckle up — this is a long update on abortion bans nationwide:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | The cruelty of these laws isn't a coincidence — it's the entire point. → [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62830848/404716549/-347688492?sourceid=1050011&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRmNTQyNy00ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNYw1SpnZQSEeurr67IIGTiEnveKe3WwKwtALt7owYs=&emci=484f3397-aeea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=25df5427-4deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **Republicans are attacking our freedom by pushing draconian abortion laws nationwide. We're fighting to elect the women who can stop them. Donate now:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62830849/404716550/-347688492?sourceid=1050011&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRmNTQyNy00ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNYw1SpnZQSEeurr67IIGTiEnveKe3WwKwtALt7owYs=&emci=484f3397-aeea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=25df5427-4deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** You know what makes me mad, Peter?

It makes me mad that state-level Republicans are passing increasingly draconian abortion bans. It makes me mad that GOP lawmakers continue to find new and creative ways to attack our most fundamental rights.

And it makes me _especially_ mad when these Republicans claim that their extremist policies are based on medical evidence, concern for women, or anything other than abject cruelty and desperation for power. **[I'm writing to you with a roundup of infuriating abortion news from Republican-controlled states, so you know what we're up against. But first, if you're as sick of this dangerous anti-choice agenda as I am, will you donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who can fight back?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62830936/404716640/-347688492?sourceid=1050011&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRmNTQyNy00ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNYw1SpnZQSEeurr67IIGTiEnveKe3WwKwtALt7owYs=&emci=484f3397-aeea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=25df5427-4deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**
* Just when we thought the blows couldn't get any lower in the Lone Star State, Republican lawmakers in **Texas** are working on a truly shocking and unprecedented piece of legislation that, if passed, would **censor all online information** about abortion access in the state. It could even prohibit health care providers from communicating with patients about (legal!) abortion options online — either through private messaging portals or during telemedicine appointments.

* Yesterday, the **North Carolina** state legislature became the latest to pass its own abortion ban. Although the Tar Heel State has a Democratic governor, state Republicans now have a big enough majority to override the governor's veto after a Democratic legislator recently switched parties. When it goes into effect, the **12-week ban** will severely limit access for North Carolinians, and for many people across the South.

* And finally, a recent study shows that in **Idaho** , nearly half of all maternal health doctors are either **leaving or thinking about leaving** the state _in the next year_. This means that labor and delivery units will continue to shut down — as some already have — and it means that pregnant folks in Idaho will have to either move or risk being pregnant in a state with limited medical resources.

Republicans claim to be "pro-life" and "pro-family," yet their policies **make it medically dangerous** to start a family.

I want to be crystal clear: None of this legislation, in any of these states, is based in science or medical necessity or concern for safety. It's about controlling our bodies, period. It's a blatant attack on women, with devastating effects for trans and nonbinary people, too.**The cruelty of these laws isn't a side issue — it's the entire point.** ****They can't get away with this, Peter. When you give to EMILYs List, your contribution supports hundreds of women, all across the country, on the frontlines of the fight for abortion rights. Donate now, and let's stop this cruelty in its tracks:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-More-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62830937/404716641/-347688492?sourceid=1050011&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRmNTQyNy00ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNYw1SpnZQSEeurr67IIGTiEnveKe3WwKwtALt7owYs=&emci=484f3397-aeea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=25df5427-4deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thanks,

Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Communications & Content, EMILYs List

name: Giffords.org
subject: Five reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today, we’d like to give you five reasons why your contribution to Giffords PAC is so important
#

Friends -
Today, we hope you’ll hear us out on five reasons as to why your $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC is so important.
1. We currently have a Republican majority in the House and a narrowly divided Senate. That means we are going to have to fight harder than ever before for commonsense gun safety legislation, like universal background checks, to get passed at the federal level.

2. Unfortunately, the United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. We’ve experienced more mass shootings than days in the year. This is not normal, and it doesn’t have to be this way. But we must keep working together to change the status quo.

3. Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children in America. Our nation’s schools should be safe havens, but instead, our children go to school each day in fear that they won’t make it home. We must do more to keep our children safe from preventable acts of violence.

4. While NRA membership has declined recently, their deep entanglement in our politics won’t go away overnight. We’re proud to have our Gun Owners for Safety program as a community for responsible gun owners. With your help, we can continue building this program and found chapters in more states across the country.

5. There’s truly never a time where we can slow down on our fundraising. The fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence never ends, even when we’re not facing an immediate fundraising deadline.

The choice is yours, but we hope that these five reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution of $5 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work to end gun violence in our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=1&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/20617?c0=giffords-em-may23.IumCic&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=2&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may23.9ZfwpO&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=3&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may23.VbphPI&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=4&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may23.xompaR&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=5&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-may23.mzg3uU&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=6&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may23.NkeOir&refcode=em230505-1-15&t=7&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=5390%2E3935704%2Et74UXi) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

The choice is yours, but we hope that these five reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62834594/404729932/676858268?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk27-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc3N2MwNy01MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfK3QS1nYPGir9IqUQ-CAi9IHhUT49eVfSXny5eE1p8=)

I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks:

**I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**

We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.

**It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.**
**[_I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support on Day One is a key part of it. Will you become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Patty Murray today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62834595/404729945/676858268?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk27-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc3N2MwNy01MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfK3QS1nYPGir9IqUQ-CAi9IHhUT49eVfSXny5eE1p8=)**

---
Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.

**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**

Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.

I went **all in****** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.

I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.

And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.

But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.** [**If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Patty Murray >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62834600/404729972/676858268?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk27-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc3N2MwNy01MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfK3QS1nYPGir9IqUQ-CAi9IHhUT49eVfSXny5eE1p8=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62834601/404729973/676858268?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk27-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc3N2MwNy01MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfK3QS1nYPGir9IqUQ-CAi9IHhUT49eVfSXny5eE1p8=)
---
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.

— Martin

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: On to November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _On to November_
---
For many candidates and campaign volunteers, Tuesday's results were the culmination of months of hard work. To all of those that put their name on the ballot and to those that put in the elbow grease to help get their candidate elected, thank you. Whether it be candidates or campaign staff, our party continues to show that it has a deep bench of talent that will only continue to grow. Now, as we head on to November, it's important that we come together and work to ensure that Republicans in cities and towns across the state are elected. Why's that? Well, because whether you live in Madison, Evansville, Valparaiso, Angola or anywhere in between, our Republican mayors and councils are delivering results for their constituents. Hoosiers know that when they elect our candidates, they can expect great government service, fiscally-sound budgets, and safer communities. It's why they continue to send Republicans back to their city and town halls, and will do so again this year. But to ensure that happens, candidates will need your help. So I encourage you to reach out to a few local campaigns or perhaps your county chairman to see how you can get involved over the coming months. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/f6fd80211b486e74c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Advancing Indiana's Semiconductor Industry_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks at the SelectUSA Investment Summit in Washington, D.C._**
---
This week, at the SelectUSA Investment Summit in Washington, D.C., **Gov. Eric Holcomb** joined Indiana's Secretary of Commerce, **U.S. Senator Todd Young** , the president of Purdue University, and leaders from imec, a world-leading research and innovation hub in nanoelectronics and digital technologies, to announce a formal memorandum of understanding (MOU) to jointly advance research and development in Indiana’s semiconductor sector. **What he's saying:** “Indiana is securing unprecedented economic momentum right now, particularly in advanced manufacturing, propelled by the strategic partnerships we have built as we continue to strengthen our growing semiconductor ecosystem,” said **Gov. Holcomb**. **The details:** Each institution will provide significant investment per year over the course of the five-year agreement. The partnership focuses on bringing together world-class expertise and state-of-the-art technology with the exchange of students, faculty and professionals between Indiana and Belgium to foster further collaborative research and innovation capacity.
---
| | |
---
**More:** Last week, **Gov. Holcomb** provided an overview of the key components of his 2023 Next Level Agenda that the legislature approved this session.
* Read it **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/0ff1fffcfaa0e36dc3d6b838967d376c/40313)**.

---
|
---
# _Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
We recently announced our 2023 municipal candidate training —**** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns. **Details:** The training will be held on**** Saturday, June 10, 2023,**** at the University of Indianapolis. More details will be forthcoming. **What to expect: **This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November. **Take action:** You can now **[register](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/ba70c126e16201abc3d6b838967d376c/40313)** for an early bird discount of $75.
---
|
---
# _Indiana Capital Chronicle: Holcomb signs new two-year budget, 90 other bills into law_
---
From [Indiana Capital Chronicle](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/5610a711258806c1c3d6b838967d376c/40313): "Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb gave his final stamp of approval Thursday to the state’s next two-year budget, which features big spending on health care, accelerated tax cuts and a near-universal private school voucher program. "The $44 billion plan is the last Holcomb will sign before his term concludes at the end of 2024. "The biggest chunk of the budget is dedicated to K-12 education — accounting for nearly $21 billion, or 47%, of all appropriations. "Republican lawmakers touted an 10% increase in overall K-12 tuition support formula over the biennium. But much of that increase is earmarked towards the expansion of Indiana’s Choice Scholarships — which allow families to receive vouchers to attend private schools." [_Story continues._](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/234a1f7622415ac9c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# _House Republicans Push Back on Biden Administration's False Claims on VA and Veterans_
---
U.S. House Republicans are condemning the Department of Veteran Affairs for "the dishonest, partisan use of the VA to spread fear and anxiety among America’s veterans regarding their benefits." **Driving the news:** The VA recently sent out a news release, which has been amplified by the president's administration, that **falsely states** the recently-passed Limit, Save, Grow Act of 2023 "would threaten medical care for 30 million veterans, worsen wait times for hundreds of thousands of veterans and survivors applying for benefits, and fail to honor the memory of all veterans." **The facts:** The Limit, Save, Grow Act does not make any specific cuts to the VA or veterans, but merely sets a topline number for total federal spending, returning it to fiscal year 2022 levels. Furthermore, every individual in the U.S. House Republican leadership has committed that veterans’ health care and benefits are not on the table. **From the Washington Post Fact Checker:** _"The White House acts as if the numbers it conjured up are real..."_ **From the House Republicans'[letter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/6b24126c5a03b97cc3d6b838967d376c/40313): **"Many members of Congress are deeply troubled and personally offended that the Biden Administration continues to use these dishonest talking points to create panic and fear in our veteran populations. The VA’s mission is to care for our veterans who have borne the battle. Our veterans made great sacrifices so that we may have the privilege to live freely in this great Nation. They did not make those sacrifices to be a talking point for a political party’s gain."
---
|
---
# _Session Spotlight: HEA 1499_
---
This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. **First up:** HEA 1499 (various tax matters), signed May 4, 2023. **The details:** HEA 1499 will provide Hoosiers with more than $100 million in property tax relief. Here's how:
* It limits how much local government budgets can grow over the next two years.
* It increases the supplemental homestead deduction over the next two years.
* It allows county fiscal bodies to provide additional property tax relief to homeowners, if they choose.
* It allows Hoosiers 65 and older to qualify for a new deduction and an additional tax credit.
* It limits the amount school corporations can increase their operating referendum tax levy in 2024.
* It adds new language regarding property tax assessment appeals.

---
|
---
# _Five Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Participants Will Have Their Name on November Ballot_
---
In a first since the launch of the Indiana Republican Party's seminar and leadership training program to increase the engagement of minority Republicans across the state, five program participants will have their name on the ballot for the 2023 general election in November.Those candidates include:
* **Tiffanie Ditlevson** , candidate for Fishers City Council and member of the inaugural cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series
* **Cody Eckert** , candidate for Greencastle City Council and member of the inaugural cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series**
* **Ronald Morrell, Jr.** , candidate for mayor of Marion and member of the 2023 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series **
* **Shirlene C. Olson** , candidate for mayor of Crown Point and member of the 2022 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series**
* **Desmont Upchurch** , candidate for mayor of South Bend and member of the 2022 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series**

[ _Story continues._](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/19acb4e4bb2053dbc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# _The Latest Biden Fact Check from the RNC_
---
The Republican National Committee (RNC) has launched **[factcheckbiden.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/1a7bffc7937c9282c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** , a website solely dedicated to fact checking President Biden in real time. _**Biden's Absence Is A Fact, Nothing To Check**_
* Biden claims he wants to "finish the job," and if today is any example, his **[basement campaign strategy](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/822aab87f3ea30fac3d6b838967d376c/40313)** is officially underway.
* Biden has held the**[fewest news conferences](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/0bf7aacbb7706940c3d6b838967d376c/40313)****** of any president in the past 30 years.
* Biden has done [**fewer interviews**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/e982e0be4aaeabaac3d6b838967d376c/40313)**** than any president in modern history.
* Biden has had **[fewer foreign trips](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/282505bf967cd3aec3d6b838967d376c/40313)** as president than his last two predecessors.
* To date, Biden has spent **[40% of his presidency on vacation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/8e88c7cedb56e495c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**.

---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/df0d7a54aad53e47/401cd6edcc8127b6c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
