clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | On to November For many candidates and campaign volunteers, Tuesday's results were the culmination of months of hard work. To all of those that put their name on the ballot and to those that put in the elbow grease to help get their candidate elected, thank you. Whether it be candidates or campaign staff, our party continues to show that it has a deep bench of talent that will only continue to grow. Now, as we head on to November, it's important that we come together and work to ensure that Republicans in cities and towns across the state are elected. Why's that? Well, because whether you live in Madison, Evansville, Valparaiso, Angola or anywhere in between, our Republican mayors and councils are delivering results for their constituents. Hoosiers know that when they elect our candidates, they can expect great government service, fiscally-sound budgets, and safer communities. It's why they continue to send Republicans back to their city and town halls, and will do so again this year. But to ensure that happens, candidates will need your help. So I encourage you to reach out to a few local campaigns or perhaps your county chairman to see how you can get involved over the coming months. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Advancing Indiana's Semiconductor Industry | | Governor Eric Holcomb speaks at the SelectUSA Investment Summit in Washington, D.C. This week, at the SelectUSA Investment Summit in Washington, D.C., Gov. Eric Holcomb joined Indiana's Secretary of Commerce, U.S. Senator Todd Young , the president of Purdue University, and leaders from imec, a world-leading research and innovation hub in nanoelectronics and digital technologies, to announce a formal memorandum of understanding (MOU) to jointly advance research and development in Indiana’s semiconductor sector. What he's saying: “Indiana is securing unprecedented economic momentum right now, particularly in advanced manufacturing, propelled by the strategic partnerships we have built as we continue to strengthen our growing semiconductor ecosystem,” said Gov. Holcomb. The details: Each institution will provide significant investment per year over the course of the five-year agreement. The partnership focuses on bringing together world-class expertise and state-of-the-art technology with the exchange of students, faculty and professionals between Indiana and Belgium to foster further collaborative research and innovation capacity. | | | More: Last week, Gov. Holcomb provided an overview of the key components of his 2023 Next Level Agenda that the legislature approved this session. Read it . | Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training We recently announced our 2023 municipal candidate training —** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns. Details: The training will be held on Saturday, June 10, 2023, at the University of Indianapolis. More details will be forthcoming. What to expect: This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November. Take action: You can now for an early bird discount of $75. | Indiana Capital Chronicle: Holcomb signs new two-year budget, 90 other bills into law From : "Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb gave his final stamp of approval Thursday to the state’s next two-year budget, which features big spending on health care, accelerated tax cuts and a near-universal private school voucher program. "The $44 billion plan is the last Holcomb will sign before his term concludes at the end of 2024. "The biggest chunk of the budget is dedicated to K-12 education — accounting for nearly $21 billion, or 47%, of all appropriations. "Republican lawmakers touted an 10% increase in overall K-12 tuition support formula over the biennium. But much of that increase is earmarked towards the expansion of Indiana’s Choice Scholarships — which allow families to receive vouchers to attend private schools." | House Republicans Push Back on Biden Administration's False Claims on VA and Veterans U.S. House Republicans are condemning the Department of Veteran Affairs for "the dishonest, partisan use of the VA to spread fear and anxiety among America’s veterans regarding their benefits." Driving the news: The VA recently sent out a news release, which has been amplified by the president's administration, that falsely states the recently-passed Limit, Save, Grow Act of 2023 "would threaten medical care for 30 million veterans, worsen wait times for hundreds of thousands of veterans and survivors applying for benefits, and fail to honor the memory of all veterans." The facts: The Limit, Save, Grow Act does not make any specific cuts to the VA or veterans, but merely sets a topline number for total federal spending, returning it to fiscal year 2022 levels. Furthermore, every individual in the U.S. House Republican leadership has committed that veterans’ health care and benefits are not on the table. From the Washington Post Fact Checker: "The White House acts as if the numbers it conjured up are real..." From the House Republicans': "Many members of Congress are deeply troubled and personally offended that the Biden Administration continues to use these dishonest talking points to create panic and fear in our veteran populations. The VA’s mission is to care for our veterans who have borne the battle. Our veterans made great sacrifices so that we may have the privilege to live freely in this great Nation. They did not make those sacrifices to be a talking point for a political party’s gain." | Session Spotlight: HEA 1499 This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by Gov. Holcomb. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. First up: HEA 1499 (various tax matters), signed May 4, 2023. The details: HEA 1499 will provide Hoosiers with more than $100 million in property tax relief. Here's how: It limits how much local government budgets can grow over the next two years. It increases the supplemental homestead deduction over the next two years. It allows county fiscal bodies to provide additional property tax relief to homeowners, if they choose. It allows Hoosiers 65 and older to qualify for a new deduction and an additional tax credit. It limits the amount school corporations can increase their operating referendum tax levy in 2024. It adds new language regarding property tax assessment appeals. | Five Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Participants Will Have Their Name on November Ballot In a first since the launch of the Indiana Republican Party's seminar and leadership training program to increase the engagement of minority Republicans across the state, five program participants will have their name on the ballot for the 2023 general election in November.Those candidates include: Tiffanie Ditlevson , candidate for Fishers City Council and member of the inaugural cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Cody Eckert , candidate for Greencastle City Council and member of the inaugural cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Ronald Morrell, Jr. , candidate for mayor of Marion and member of the 2023 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Shirlene C. Olson , candidate for mayor of Crown Point and member of the 2022 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series Desmont Upchurch , candidate for mayor of South Bend and member of the 2022 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series | The Latest Biden Fact Check from the RNC The Republican National Committee (RNC) has launched , a website solely dedicated to fact checking President Biden in real time. Biden's Absence Is A Fact, Nothing To Check Biden claims he wants to "finish the job," and if today is any example, his is officially underway. Biden has held the** of any president in the past 30 years. Biden has done ** than any president in modern history. Biden has had as president than his last two predecessors. subject: I need to reiterate this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | Hello fellow American, I wanted to reiterate the importance of this issue. Russia is stepping up its aggression on Ukraine. Men, women, and children are suffering and dying at the hands of Vladimir Putin. The United States **must** stand resolved to assist where we can to make sure Putin cannot take Ukraine in this obvious power grab. _**An America United**_ , along with other state & national leaders, stand in solidarity with the Ukrainian people. If America ceases funding and support, the rest of Europe may not trust us any longer. We can't allow Russia to trample over a sovereign nation, because the outcome will have serious ramifications for our national security and for other European countries. If you agree, please join _**An America United**_ on social media to have your voice heard as we continue to speak out against the extremes and support a better way forward.

This is an exclusive and rare opportunity to hear from House Republican leadership and get the inside scoop on our vision to get our country back on track.

name: Katie Porter
subject: There are a lot of millionaires in Congress for the same reason there are a lot of tall people in the NBA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I joined Seth Meyers to talk about this.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22317%2E3422442%2E1nBdmn)
**There are a lot of millionaires in Congress for the same reason there are a lot of tall people in the NBA—it makes it easier to get there.**
Both parties like to recruit candidates who can dump hundreds of thousands, if not millions of dollars, into their own campaign.
I'll be real, that's not me. I'm a single mom of three school aged kids, who like most Americans passes on the $6 blueberries and dreads filling my minivan up with gas.
I don't need a whiteboard to explain why having millionaires be such an over represented group in Congress is bad for our country. **I talked about this with Seth Meyers the other week, check it out.⬇️**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230505-1?refcode=EMAH05_1_NBA_20230505_V1_F&refcode2=22317_3422442_1nBdmn&akid=22317%2E3422442%2E1nBdmn)
I'm proud our campaign is funded by millions of people chipping in $10 or $20 at a time. We're building the biggest coalition of grassroots donors in this race, and I'd love for you to be a part of our team. **[Can you join us?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17474?refcode=EMAH05_1_NBA_20230505_V1_F&t=2&akid=22317%2E3422442%2E1nBdmn)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230505-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH05_1_NBA_20230505_V1_F&refcode2=22317_3422442_1nBdmn&akid=22317%2E3422442%2E1nBdmn)**
Thanks, Derek!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH05_1_NBA_20230505_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=22317_3422442_1nBdmn&akid=22317%2E3422442%2E1nBdmn)**

Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a June 13, 2023 dinner event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We need Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today’s for-profit health care system is ineffective, inefficient, and produces drastically worse health outcomes than other countries.
#
Peter, we need Medicare for All.
America is touted as the richest country in the world — **but every day we hear horror stories of families and working people who have to decide between paying back predatory medical bills or putting food on the table.**
**As a progressive leader, it’s my job to advocate for the people and answer the call for solutions that meet the urgency of our collective needs. This is not the time for compromise when so many hardworking people do not have the access or ability to seek universal health care.**
**[If you stand with me today, please chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give so we cement health care as a human right in Congress. We’ll need as much support as possible to show our opposition that we won’t back down until we see the progress we deserve.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41860?refcode=em20230505-2448&t=1&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41860?refcode=em20230505-2448&t=20&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)**
**Today’s for-profit health care system is ineffective, inefficient, and produces drastically worse health outcomes than other countries.** Communities full of families struggling with medical debt should be able to rely on their government and feel supported by our policies. **We need universal care — everybody in, nobody out.**
The U.S. spends _about 50% more per person_ on health care than any other nation, yet the life expectancy in the U.S. is lower than other nations. With nearly 30 million people uninsured, at least 40 million people left unable to afford their co-pays and deductibles, and rising infant and maternal mortality rates — **it’s clear we’re facing a true endemic in our health care system.**
**It’s time for a health care system that is focused on patients, not profits. We must recognize health care as a human right — not a privilege for the wealthy — and it’s crucial we ensure that everyone in our country has comprehensive, quality health care no matter their income, race, gender, or zip code.**
[**The fight to bring Medicare for All and true universal health care to this country will take all of us. If you’re ready to join this fight, please contribute $3 to our movement today to build our momentum and deliver Medicare for All.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41860?refcode=em20230505-2448&t=21&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230505-2448-footer&t=22&refcode2=2448_420207_xSNmhh&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2448%2E420207%2ExSNmhh)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age, I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz, and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62838708/404745885/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230505-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmMDU3NTliLTViZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0PML1Q1cX8y4o4cjoFV4W2lUU35X9D4cbk4AAfSIvAI=)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Will you personally endorse Ilhan Omar today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're looking for a LOT of signatures today
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)
Hi friends — we're reaching out today to ask:
**[Can you add your name and personally endorse Ilhan Omar and our people-powered re-election campaign for Congress?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230505-personal-endorse/?source=em230505-1-t1&refcode2=141.791427.MLkfCv&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230505-personal-endorse/?source=em230505-1-t1&refcode2=141.791427.MLkfCv&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**
Here's why:
Thanks to the incredible power of our progressive movement, Ilhan was re-elected to serve her third term in the People's House last year.
It was the countless phone calls, canvassing shifts, and $5, $10, and $25 donations from people like you that powered our campaign to victory, and Ilhan and our entire team are so thankful for your support.
But the truth is that if we're going to repeat our successes, and continue our movement's fight for working people across the country and the world, it's going to take an even larger effort.
Kevin McCarthy, the right-wing special interests, the dark money super PACs... they'd love nothing more than to see Ilhan — one of the most vocal and committed leaders of our movement — defeated.
We can't afford to let that happen. And although it may seem like a long way away, it's the groundwork we lay here early in the cycle that will mean victory in 2024.
That's why we're reaching out today — to get as many people to say they stand with Ilhan and believe in our people-powered campaign as we possibly can.
What do you say?
**[Will you add your name to personally endorse Ilhan Omar? We're looking for a LOT of signatures today, and are hoping yours is next on our list.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230505-personal-endorse/?source=em230505-1-t1&refcode2=141.791427.MLkfCv&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**
The truth is that no one — not Ilhan Omar or anyone else — can take on the right-wing and fight back against extremist Republicans alone. That's something that will ONLY happen if we're all in this together.
Thanks for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230505-personal-endorse/?source=em230505-1-t1&refcode2=141.791427.MLkfCv&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=141_791427_MLkfCv&akid=141%2E791427%2EMLkfCv)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: =?utf-8?Q?JR=20Majewski?=
subject: Corrupt Kaptur is asking for a blank check!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
We need to make tough decisions now, so that we don't burden future generations with debt. It's time for significant cuts to federal spending and tax | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8124837?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=807c315921&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

The recent call by Corrupt Kaptur for a "clean debt increase" is nothing more than a desperate attempt by big government Democrats to spend taxpayer dollars irresponsibly without any repercussions.

It's alarming that Kaptur, like many others in her party, is pushing for a blank check to fund their reckless spending, while disregarding the future financial well-being of our nation and future generations.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=1f21ccb47f&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN TEAM MAJEWSKI TODAY TO END THE WAR ON TAXPAYERS >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=739f6308da&e=0426928d91)
---
The federal government is currently facing a debt crisis, and the only way to put America back on the path to prosperity is by making significant cuts to spending in Washington and cutting taxes to give people more financial freedom to stimulate their local economies.

By cutting unnecessary spending, we can balance the budget and protect our country's economic future.
**We cannot afford two more years of reckless spending in Washington. Send me to Congress with a generous grassroots donation today and I will get the job done!

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a85e94c370&e=0426928d91)
The idea of a "clean debt increase" is irresponsible and dangerous. It's not enough to simply increase the debt ceiling without addressing the root cause of the problem. We must address the out-of-control spending in Washington that got us into this mess in the first place.

We need to make tough decisions now, so that we don't burden future generations with debt. It's time for significant cuts to federal spending and tax cuts to stimulate local economies and put America back on the path to prosperity.

[**Can I count on your support, Peter?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=b7ddc4cbd8&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=c3d8d45b1a&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09
| [PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=cb1adeb4fa&e=0426928d91)

| | | | [](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=9eb0a2fdba&e=0426928d91)| [](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=0c28d5abdc&e=0426928d91)| [](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=25565428c4&e=0426928d91)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Will you personally endorse my re-election campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Hoping to see your name: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62840201/404751961/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_LAU_GEN_AC_20230505_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODJhOGU5Ny01ZWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TkWL9HBlHbabHMlPTmu_vwe81afefcgcsXn1oHmSjI=&emci=972a8e97-5eeb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=982a8e97-5eeb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Folks, **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate** to continue being a champion for the issues that matter most to New Mexicans and folks across the country. Hey there, Peter. I'm about to **[ask you to split a contribution between me and Sen. Jacky Rosen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62840278/404752137/-393630507?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk16-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJhOGU5Ny01ZWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ILI725h5rPdlpS5lvjmqy0utLcG5i154OKOgLHDRbQ=) **–** ** but first, will you give me a second to explain why it's so important that you give today?
We desperately need pro-choice women in the Senate.
Since Roe was overturned, Jacky and I have been relentlessly fighting for reproductive freedom. In fact, the two of us just introduced a bill to protect doctors who provide abortion care where it is legal from lawsuits and jail time. And we’re both working in the Senate to get the votes we need to pass the bill that would restore Roe v. Wade. **But to keep up this fight, we need your help. **
Right now, we have a one-seat majority in the Senate. That means the future of Senate control – and our fight to restore reproductive freedom – could all come down to defending Jacky's seat. It's not going to be easy: Last time around, Democrats won Nevada by just 7,928 votes.

**Every dollar counts in a race as close as this one, so I'm asking you: [Will you contribute $5 – or whatever you can spare today – to support me and Sen. Jacky Rosen in our fight for reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62840279/404752138/-393630507?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk16-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJhOGU5Ny01ZWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ILI725h5rPdlpS5lvjmqy0utLcG5i154OKOgLHDRbQ=)**
Thanks for supporting pro-choice women.

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Peter, can I be candid with you for a second?

**_I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege._** I didn't attend a fancy private school or have connections to New York's elite. I didn't have a way to communicate with the people in power to tell them about the ways their decisions were _directly_ impacting my family and me. To be frank, I felt voiceless and powerless.
I'm telling you all of this not so you can take pity on me but to get you to understand _why_ I created this priorities survey in the first place. When I made history in 2018 and became the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _never_ let another person feel as invisible as I once did – and my monthly priorities survey is part of how I am upholding that vow.
**But this month's survey closes at midnight, and it looks like you STILL haven’t updated your priorities with my team. So I have to ask: **[**Will you take my priorities survey right now so I can fight for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62840327/404752277/2110152150?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1061-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDJhOGU5Ny01ZWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3KMo8UaPa7Hf5ohS0Olz5KixZlz3zH-ErYmrwIA-QeQ=&emci=c631f73e-8eea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9d2a8e97-5eeb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

I’ll be honest: Our fight for progress is nowhere near complete. In the last few weeks alone, a well-organized push to remove mifepristone – the most widely used abortion pill in the nation – from our shelves almost cost millions of people their right to choose, another state signed an abortion ban into law, and we tragically lost even _more_ children to yet another school shooting.

**That's why our continued fight for progress has _never_ been more important – but to do that as effectively as possible, it is _vital_ that I know what matters most to supporters like you, Peter. I’m counting on 100 fearless fighters from your area to complete my priorities survey before midnight, so please:

| | | Donald Trump has denied accusations of rape by author E. Jean Carroll, and he's mocked her repeatedly and called her a liar. **But Trump has been too chicken to say these things UNDER OATH -- where a lie could mean prison time.** And now the judge in the trial has just given Trump until [Sunday at 10:30 pm](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta28f9d7f-86de-42d3-a0f8-bdd016c9018e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to say whether he will testify or he will waive that right. It's time for him to put up or shut up. **[Tell Trump to testify UNDER OATH or admit he's a liar.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ff84848-b626-4bd2-85cb-62da90b4dcb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

body:

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmj7gg1lfc61p8t0s4ugpk9jcd5tv5v4lbp8d6e0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cpi6apb6c5h2bs)

Friend,
As one of my biggest supporters, I couldn’t be more thrilled to offer YOU this special opportunity.
**You could win a trip for two to a once-in-a-lifetime dinner event with me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13!**
I’ll take care of EVERYTHING for you and your guest:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Debunking the Left’s Narratives About Guns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacrm_kNooZl2gQVaP52d7IvcH1JEWqnH9f1NqtSxyJfJEFmR3a2oaIPZX0UR6iPQvgCM3Luu_IzjsdICFJPJTvghBPUCuD3_BOWumlfzOWH_OURSZHb7tLOXczQa-Qto_4F0aQWI2n58fdgLsCgyN307VGQ0Qg7BfGyCi1U7qsR6KqBYNMWNpwH9VmvNM9I42pF5NfHemAsxzZ_EdjYJTY-YNZy7HRqsBgYTwBWNTxcmmc=&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==)
---
|
Peter –
I recently sat down with the Washington Examiner for a wide-ranging interview on some of the biggest debates happening in Washington, D.C. and across the country. During the interview, I debunked the left's false narratives about "assault weapons" and pushed back on their calls to ban certain types of firearms. I also addressed the threat posed by TikTok and called for action against the Chinese spyware app.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| DEBUNKING THE LEFT'S NARRATIVES ABOUT "ASSAULT WEAPONS"
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacrTGYVNxGgxXAbN8_07RyIrstG8xN0p69-LG3wvFm2Lhh4JkAy3b-9dPSnIgELUP7Q8Pb7fQOKSIyExkr13GXNrV2MlEkbf5u0JDc0mtwkB76UgswG5Kpbdfc8EnJe-3JAUBItfA9Czvv9TjkuN45cJOoAgUyf66wTTMMXNmcf2BSaP_xpn6WgE5GNpujh2jZ8WprD7nPSYnU=&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacrTGYVNxGgxXAbN8_07RyIrstG8xN0p69-LG3wvFm2Lhh4JkAy3b-9dPSnIgELUP7Q8Pb7fQOKSIyExkr13GXNrV2MlEkbf5u0JDc0mtwkB76UgswG5Kpbdfc8EnJe-3JAUBItfA9Czvv9TjkuN45cJOoAgUyf66wTTMMXNmcf2BSaP_xpn6WgE5GNpujh2jZ8WprD7nPSYnU=&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==)
---
| |
---
| The left's immediate response to any type of shooting in America is always focused on banning so-called "assault weapons." That is nonsensical because rifles, which the left refers to as "assault weapons," account for a small percentage of gun violence in the United States. According to the latest available data, handguns were involved in the vast majority (59%) of murders in the U.S. Rifles account for just 3% of firearm murders.
Despite that fact, the left always pushes for an "assault weapons ban" after shootings, especially after tragedies at our schools. The common narrative from the left and much of the media after these tragedies is always to go after guns. They want to ban certain types of guns and prevent law-abiding Americans from owning firearms like an AR-15, which millions of Americans use for legitimate self-defense purposes. The left's solutions will undermine the Second Amendment while doing nothing to actually prevent these tragedies in the first place.
The best way to solve this problem without trampling on our Second Amendment rights is to put armed security guards at every school in America. Texas alone allocated $400 million for school security upgrades. Most schools already have armed security guards but we need to make sure they ALL do. Taking away guns from law-abiding Americans won't stop school shootings. Putting armed guards at every school in America will.
Please know that I will always defend your Second Amendment rights against attacks from the left. I have introduced legislation called the Preventing Unjust Red Flag Laws Act, which prohibits the use of federal funds to implement or enforce red flag laws. [I've also stood up against the ATF](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbRe4n1YjejFdUGwSMKYIkiYcSfnH7MB39ACFCrL7Oa192rLF_CRY6MKZ9OD768kiZLMkD9vYTusETxadBdId_sB9xibz2Qy7obng7SmgMhElrsKD6ok5ljttNU5X8eYQSHGXSBiTYPttvlX4WfukuoXgBWvRMyMqD0HxpQDoep0SaF6OcE50z_1ehp8DNLrK_nSKqSMH4VC0m0-BaHG7Q6iTl8f_WQm2BQJCXkpI6FIt&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==) as they continue to go after law-abiding gun owners, including with their most recent push to ban pistol braces. I never shy away from defending the Second Amendment, even if that means [going on CNN and pushing back against the left's false narratives on this issue](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbazuIRYscr9ePnIIfrQkRqygW1EVv_bDXaKqnjoiwgGPig_MNTyo7JRtXVMRcvQ5esNYPNoMtr0jGjiZTZjuQKjuDM8vMeEyiC6RRORCefrQcFR1vS3KOv8OWcR1ZELaUM_Ms0qGWMS3PkoHI32VLhkX7cn0HVp_pLBLGjc_hX-n&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==).
---

| TIKTOK IS A CHINESE PSYCHOLOGICAL WEAPON
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacrG1BsWv2xP-Uv0W_0kFYizyEDENZWU9Z_tsY8jQY1DLzxUeuFlq3ykF964wS8DFmAnVsAPAGXi7U4czP-Zhuj-68ihDcPo4-Ycsl35jxJCtntO3zT6E6jzwzftIdFr64LIcM2rneM338MN-7BX1UHX3a3zd7IhLY4lCBk0cY4aya6iqgyrhBrnFq43WN3AfQbSnq-zfIyzA9zzC7qryy5ZA==&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacrG1BsWv2xP-Uv0W_0kFYizyEDENZWU9Z_tsY8jQY1DLzxUeuFlq3ykF964wS8DFmAnVsAPAGXi7U4czP-Zhuj-68ihDcPo4-Ycsl35jxJCtntO3zT6E6jzwzftIdFr64LIcM2rneM338MN-7BX1UHX3a3zd7IhLY4lCBk0cY4aya6iqgyrhBrnFq43WN3AfQbSnq-zfIyzA9zzC7qryy5ZA==&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==)
---
| |
---
| The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) would like nothing more than to see the demise of the United States of America. The CCP flies spy balloons over our country, supplies the Mexican drug cartels with chemicals used to produce the fentanyl that kills tens of thousands of Americans every year, and now we are beginning to understand the threat posed by their latest weapon against the United States: TikTok.
TikTok presents a unique threat to the American people. Tens of millions of Americans - mostly young people - use the highly-addictive social media app. And while TikTok is branded as this harmless, privately owned company, the truth is much more concerning.
As [I pointed out during a congressional hearing with TikTok's CEO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbU1LDorREuL3jFXjz2q9RjTqGMhY4qbsSLL0UvBt9RQ3D0OShViE3945wDMBF2zfegQS7N3mT8tTj_orJ72RqPkJQe1JAf09ls2dE6OHxWIQG7KWULUVYczkzU02FJR6EQ==&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==), TikTok presents serious security risks to the United States and everyone who uses the app. TikTok is owned by a Chinese company called ByteDance. Under Chinese law, all Chinese companies must cooperate with the CCP in intelligence activities and maintain the secrecy of those intelligence operations. In other words, ByteDance, and its subsidiaries like TikTok, must cooperate with the CCP whenever they are called upon, and if they are called upon they are bound by law to keep such cooperation a secret.
Moreover, as I explained in my interview with the Washington Examiner, the CCP has successfully addicted 150 million Americans to an app that the Chinese government controls completely. That means that the Chinese Communist Party can control what TikTok users see on the app, which they will undoubtedly use to push pro-CCP narratives and censor anything that could paint the communist regime in a negative light. In fact, [TikTok's own executives have testified that the company censored content that was critical of China](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JcfLiPPQyX8miMHMj2ngaDRWuYlxuqXFin2AenIcNqZCHvj-FTNKbThoo7RzBacr2YrHGks-rOJcH3PwXaGUYxtm5xlKNAtdDHh6gtsA7Q6eNc5yyZsJSJj0jpic51kTVfWrC-oVW8LZ-FozvmKUKxAqeJri1YuPgwHv_wmTP_ol427jZdb0xWhHbPJhNyLRBtcWoFOWB_HqVfRGZ-sI_RQ8J19dgG5t&c=dtJ2m0XRIB3kcvOeThMSR5M7hcVaWDnaPW4Qy5zKw63w5dFqzRLiow==&ch=UiKymeJVIVMWMXWY6L_iKGyUKsKADzx6TpWH_ekKR_tTAvOAxfEAOQ==), including videos about the CCP's human rights abuses against Uyghurs.
I've helped lead the fight against TikTok in Congress, including calling for Members of Congress to stop using the app in their official capacity (yes, some Members of Congress still use the app despite the well-known security risks). Remember, the CCP will do anything to undermine the security, culture, and prosperity of the United States. TikTok is just one of the CCP's weapons against us, and we must take this threat seriously.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – I recently sat down with the Washington Examiner for a wide-ranging interview on some of the biggest debates happening in Washington, D.C. and across the country. During the interview, I debunked the left's false narratives about "assault weapons" and pushed back on their calls to ban certain types of firearms. I also addressed the threat posed by TikTok and called for action against the Chinese spyware app. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | | | DEBUNKING THE LEFT'S NARRATIVES ABOUT "ASSAULT WEAPONS" | | | == | == | | | The left's immediate response to any type of shooting in America is always focused on banning so-called "assault weapons." That is nonsensical because rifles, which the left refers to as "assault weapons," account for a small percentage of gun violence in the United States. According to the latest available data, handguns were involved in the vast majority (59%) of murders in the U.S. Rifles account for just 3% of firearm murders. Despite that fact, the left always pushes for an "assault weapons ban" after shootings, especially after tragedies at our schools. The common narrative from the left and much of the media after these tragedies is always to go after guns. They want to ban certain types of guns and prevent law-abiding Americans from owning firearms like an AR-15, which millions of Americans use for legitimate self-defense purposes. The left's solutions will undermine the Second Amendment while doing nothing to actually prevent these tragedies in the first place. The best way to solve this problem without trampling on our Second Amendment rights is to put armed security guards at every school in America. Texas alone allocated $400 million for school security upgrades. Most schools already have armed security guards but we need to make sure they ALL do. Taking away guns from law-abiding Americans won't stop school shootings. Putting armed guards at every school in America will. Please know that I will always defend your Second Amendment rights against attacks from the left. I have introduced legislation called the Preventing Unjust Red Flag Laws Act, which prohibits the use of federal funds to implement or enforce red flag laws. == as they continue to go after law-abiding gun owners, including with their most recent push to ban pistol braces. I never shy away from defending the Second Amendment, even if that means ==. | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | TIKTOK IS A CHINESE PSYCHOLOGICAL WEAPON | | | == | == | | | The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) would like nothing more than to see the demise of the United States of America. The CCP flies spy balloons over our country, supplies the Mexican drug cartels with chemicals used to produce the fentanyl that kills tens of thousands of Americans every year, and now we are beginning to understand the threat posed by their latest weapon against the United States: TikTok. TikTok presents a unique threat to the American people. Tens of millions of Americans - mostly young people - use the highly-addictive social media app. And while TikTok is branded as this harmless, privately owned company, the truth is much more concerning. As ==, TikTok presents serious security risks to the United States and everyone who uses the app. TikTok is owned by a Chinese company called ByteDance. Under Chinese law, all Chinese companies must cooperate with the CCP in intelligence activities and maintain the secrecy of those intelligence operations. In other words, ByteDance, and its subsidiaries like TikTok, must cooperate with the CCP whenever they are called upon, and if they are called upon they are bound by law to keep such cooperation a secret. Moreover, as I explained in my interview with the Washington Examiner, the CCP has successfully addicted 150 million Americans to an app that the Chinese government controls completely. That means that the Chinese Communist Party can control what TikTok users see on the app, which they will undoubtedly use to push pro-CCP narratives and censor anything that could paint the communist regime in a negative light. In fact, ==, including videos about the CCP's human rights abuses against Uyghurs. I've helped lead the fight against TikTok in Congress, including calling for Members of Congress to stop using the app in their official capacity (yes, some Members of Congress still use the app despite the well-known security risks). Remember, the CCP will do anything to undermine the security, culture, and prosperity of the United States. TikTok is just one of the CCP's weapons against us, and we must take this threat seriously. | | | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | NEWS | FOX NEWS: == WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading and your support! | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Last week was one of the most challenging weeks my team and I have experienced since taking office.
The Homeland Security Committee, on which I serve, met on Wednesday to discuss the Republicans’ unilateral, xenophobic, and inhumane border bill. Although comprehensive immigration reform is one of the most pressing issues for Congress to enact, the Republicans did not consult at all with Democrats in drafting the bill.
It gets worse.
Peter, I don’t know where to begin to describe the cruelty and extremism that is contained in this legislation.
It does nothing to address the root causes of our broken immigration system or improve safety at the border. Instead, in the name of “border security,” it would all but shut down our asylum system, restart construction of Donald Trump’s expensive and ineffective border wall, and gut funding for organizations that protect and advocate for migrants seeking escape from abuse, violence, and persecution.
After reviewing the bill, my team and I got right to work to introduce amendments that would affirm our values and make a real difference in addressing the root causes of this crisis — including measures that would disrupt gun trafficking into Mexico, prevent the return of Trump-era family detention, and ensure accountability for migrants who are abused or mistreated at detention facilities.
**But none of the Democrats’ common-sense amendments — including mine — were added to the bill. The Republicans unanimously rejected every one of the Democrats’ amendments.**
It was truly disheartening and deflating to see Republicans play politics with human lives in such a crude and un-American way. And it was a dark look into the political climate in Washington right now.
Despite the cynicism and brinkmanship on the other side, I saw last week that Democrats truly have the political will to keep fighting and finally fix our broken immigration system, provide a safe harbor for those seeking one, and expand access to the American Dream. And our movement is only growing.
Peter, I’m fighting every day to defend our democracy, deliver for New Yorkers, and advocate for our shared values in Congress. But if we want real progress, we have to defeat Republicans in 2024 — and that’s why I’m going all-in to win back New York for Democrats and flip the House majority blue.
**[If you’re with me, please add a donation of any amount today to power our efforts. 2024 might feel like it’s in the distant future, but early and consistent support will make a huge difference — and I appreciate any amount you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62841460/404757206/-648373131?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzMwZjU2MS02MWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHYN-7qXWonotFWAfe_tTlviBMWktcLtUOuyWGB5q5Y=)**

Helen Gym HQ
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: The Courier Newsroom Team
subject: Fox News. Tucker Carlson. Breitbart. Charlie Kirk. Here’s what we can do:
body:
Disinformation is winning. It’s time for a new plan.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=943%2E120351%2EqOA_jd)
Peter — America is stuck in a dangerous information crisis.
**Fox News. Breitbart. Tucker Carlson. Charlie Kirk.** Powerful right-wing engines of misinformation are endlessly spreading lies and hate. So, why is our media landscape so broken?
First, quality local newsrooms are disappearing.
Second, powerful right-wing interests are running mass disinformation campaigns 24/7 across every platform possible — sowing doubt, inflaming divisions, and causing political violence like we saw on January 6th.
**If you feel like we’re at a perilous crossroads, you’re not alone.**
**On cable news, social media, and even the dark web, right-wing bad actors keep doubling down on propaganda and lies.** Without viable alternatives, millions of Americans find themselves trapped in an echo chamber of bad information and fake news.
**That’s where we come in.**
**Here at Courier Newsroom, we’re fighting back by** **building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America.** We neutralize bad information by reporting factual, relevant news and information, delivered directly to those who need it most.
We already have local newsrooms in 8 battleground states staffed by real journalists who live in the communities we serve, and we’re ready to expand our network.
To do that, we need your help to spread the word about the great reporting published by our talented team of journalists every day. **We know that the best antidote to disinformation is more good information** , and that’s what our newsrooms take pride in delivering at Courier Newsroom.
**Now, here’s where you come in.** We’re only able to offer free, accessible local news because grassroots supporters like you chip in what they can, when they can.
[**We have a goal of raising $6,700 today to grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation. Can we count on your $5 to get us there?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3683?refcode=em-20230505&t=2&akid=943%2E120351%2EqOA_jd)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3683?refcode=em-20230505&t=3&akid=943%2E120351%2EqOA_jd)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=943_120351_qOA_jd&akid=943%2E120351%2EqOA_jd)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=943%2E120351%2EqOA_jd)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters... | | BREAKING: New CBS News Poll The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence. Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the Ramaswamy TSUNAMI. Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate. To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (which are steadily climbing) and unique, grassroots donors. I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (bye Don Lemon) and Chuck Todd. I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th. We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there. I am looking to you to help today. | | | ---|---|--- | | We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. body:
That’s all we are asking for. Just $5.
#
Friends - it’s 5/5/23 today so we have a small ask of you:
$5. That’s all. Just $5.
Let us explain with 5️⃣ reasons why we need you to contribute to The Long Run today:
1. To support candidates that will help maintain the Democratic Senate majority and win back the House.

2. To ensure extremists like Ron Desantis and Trump cannot use the power of the Presidency to put more alt-right Republicans on the Supreme Court.

3. To help candidates fight against dark money from Republicans who are already pummeling vulnerable Democrats with attacks.

4. To guarantee the Long Run can continue making a substantial impact on races across the country — how we did in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race – that will determine the future of our democracy.

5. To help us make up the crucial lost ground our people-powered movement needs after falling short of our April fundraising goal.

That’s it. Those are 5️⃣ reasons why we need your support today.
[**So if you can, please make a $5 contribution to The Long Run today so we can continue to elect changemaking candidates across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.KmyRkU&refcode=em230505-1-t3&t=1&akid=4414%2E196590%2EEOphUK)

name: Mark Warner
subject: The Supreme Court corruption continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We need ethics reform now.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842088/404759648/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI0ODNlYy02MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qEfs3cEVASoU33b21A9-uetEsENcfVJc_96lKOW8kY=&emci=cd0ebcc6-c8ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=16b483ec-62eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Just when we thought we’d seen it all, _ProPublica_ just broke another major Supreme Court scandal involving the behavior of Justice Clarence Thomas. That’s why I’m on a bill to get it done. **_[**If you’re fired up like I am, will you make a contribution right now to support our work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842090/404759650/-1289967831?refcode=mw_em_230505_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI0ODNlYy02MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qEfs3cEVASoU33b21A9-uetEsENcfVJc_96lKOW8kY=)_** Thank you as always for your support, Mark Warner **_** **_** **_** **_** **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842092/404759652/-1289967831?refcode=mw_em_230505_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI0ODNlYy02MmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qEfs3cEVASoU33b21A9-uetEsENcfVJc_96lKOW8kY=)** **_** **_**

subject: Tell Congress to expand Social Security

body:
Nearly 40 percent of seniors rely on Social Security for a majority of their income.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842162/404759956/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAyZDRiNmUtNjNlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NpsffFzWtQK1aVJDYhDvclm4F0p3Nx14WFHqnpwcEXE=&emci=d92d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e02d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)

Friend, We need to talk about retirement. Fewer and fewer Americans have access to pensions, which makes Social Security a critical program for current and even future retirees. Nearly 40 percent of seniors rely on Social Security for a majority of their income, and 1 in 7 seniors rely on Social Security for **more than 90 percent of their income**. With the average Social Security benefit totaling only $1,688 per month, we need to do more to ensure that benefits keep pace with the rising cost of living.
[**Take Action: Tell Congress to expand Social Security and help seniors retire with dignity**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842163/404759957/939637708?contactdata=7b4PGrBrodEin0A4csDG8F59RIuT8MEMqJPxF112o4HtSCUUJGfxmxYlO2ynmhd4VIiTWrU32SKx1av1SQVBWUZnI5vnXY6E2W1F8KI9RijQSjZFSbqXd/jDbfvHnVSx3NQu1voeB0s4T0zpBCQCDg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAyZDRiNmUtNjNlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NpsffFzWtQK1aVJDYhDvclm4F0p3Nx14WFHqnpwcEXE=&emci=d92d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e02d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842165/404759959/1574280398?contactdata=7b4PGrBrodEin0A4csDG8F59RIuT8MEMqJPxF112o4HtSCUUJGfxmxYlO2ynmhd4VIiTWrU32SKx1av1SQVBWUZnI5vnXY6E2W1F8KI9RijQSjZFSbqXd/jDbfvHnVSx3NQu1voeB0s4T0zpBCQCDg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAyZDRiNmUtNjNlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NpsffFzWtQK1aVJDYhDvclm4F0p3Nx14WFHqnpwcEXE=&emci=d92d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e02d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)** I’m a strong supporter of the Social Security Expansion Act, which would increase benefits by $2,400 a year, strengthen cost-of-living adjustments, extend the solvency of Social Security for 75 years by requiring the wealthy to pay their fair share of taxes, and make other improvements to this vital program. With nearly half of Americans 55 and older having **no retirement savings** , we need bold leadership on Social Security – not just to protect it, but to expand it. Let’s stop playing defense and fight for America’s seniors so they can retire with dignity. **[Sign if you agree: Congress must expand Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62842166/404759960/939637708?contactdata=7b4PGrBrodEin0A4csDG8F59RIuT8MEMqJPxF112o4HtSCUUJGfxmxYlO2ynmhd4VIiTWrU32SKx1av1SQVBWUZnI5vnXY6E2W1F8KI9RijQSjZFSbqXd/jDbfvHnVSx3NQu1voeB0s4T0zpBCQCDg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAyZDRiNmUtNjNlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NpsffFzWtQK1aVJDYhDvclm4F0p3Nx14WFHqnpwcEXE=&emci=d92d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e02d4b6e-63eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)** Onward,Ro

(916) 997-4784
---
| |
**Modesto, CA** – Today, Congressman John Duarte (R-13) announced his re-election campaign to California Congressional District 13. Duarte’s announcement follows a strong first-quarter, fundraising $586,000. “Since being elected to Congress, we have focused on working with all leaders of the community, including across party lines, to provide results for Valley Families,” said Congressman Duarte. “We’re working hard to lower the cost of living, to make food and gas affordable again, to make sure we have all the water we need to make sure we have good paying jobs, and to make every community safe again.” “I look forward to continuing to represent District 13 and our Valley communities.” ###

Her new book tells the story of Rose, a sheep in second grade who's teacher is quite literally a wolf in sheep's clothing.

The book teaches children to always trust mom and dad and that it is **NEVER** ok for other authority figures to encourage them to keep secrets from their parents.

name: All On The Line
subject: The Shape of Things: Alabama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Learn about barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest.
|
---

**The Shape Of Things: AL- 07**
**The district:** Alabama's 7th congressional district is unique and includes significant portions of Montgomery, Birmingham, and Tuscaloosa. It also crosses the historic Black Belt region of the state, an area with a deep and complex history. In 1992, the state's congressional district boundaries were established to allow Black voters to elect a candidate of their choice, as mandated by the Voting Rights Act of 1965, as amended in 1982. This was a hard-fought victory for grassroots civil rights organizers who fought for years to ensure that every person's voice is heard and their vote counts. Today, the seventh district is represented by Congresswoman Terri Sewell.
**Alabama’s 2021 Map Fails to Fairly Represent the State’s Black Voting Population** : In 2020, the United States conducted its census, and the data revealed some significant shifts in population demographics in Alabama. The data showed that over the past decade, the state's Black population had grown while the white population had fallen. As a result, Black Alabamians now make up more than 27 percent of the state's population and nearly 26 percent of the state's voting-age population. However, despite the growth in the Black population and the potential for two congressional districts where Black voters would have the opportunity to elect their candidate of choice (sometimes referred to as an “opportunity district”), the Republican-led Alabama legislature enacted a least-change congressional map, ignoring the census data.
The current Alabama congressional map only has one Black opportunity district, despite the potential for two, which has raised concerns about minority vote dilution and the disenfranchisement of Black voters in the state. Outside of District 7, the Black community outside of District 7 is cracked among districts 1, 2, and 3 -- even though the Black population in the area is large enough to form a majority of the voting-age population in a second congressional district.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62861930/404808821/1971507452?refcode=20230505_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YmUxMWQwLTg3ZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwi6k4wzqJCHj3lk9uIsgpFVqp7FhLaXsGdxf_fLJko=)
---
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation for communities throughout the country. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. **[Will you support All On The Line with a recurring donation of any amount to support our work to advocate for fair maps in places like Alabama and other target states?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62861932/404808823/1971507452?recurring=true&refcode=20230505_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YmUxMWQwLTg3ZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwi6k4wzqJCHj3lk9uIsgpFVqp7FhLaXsGdxf_fLJko=)**
[Make a Monthly Donation](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62861933/404808824/1971507452?recurring=true&refcode=20230505_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YmUxMWQwLTg3ZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwi6k4wzqJCHj3lk9uIsgpFVqp7FhLaXsGdxf_fLJko=)
---
**What’s next?**
The fight for fair representation in Alabama is far from over. In November 2021, federal district judges issued a decision to strike down the enacted congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama. This action was a crucial victory for democracy. However, the subsequent decision by the U.S. Supreme Court to consider the case and put the order requiring the immediate redraw of the Alabama congressional map on hold is a cause for concern.

In October 2022, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ (previously known as _Merrill v. Milligan_) and a decision is expected within the next few months. We cannot allow Alabama to perpetuate the disenfranchisement of Black voters. We must fight for a just outcome in this case to set a precedent for fairness for all voters nationwide. Our fair maps movement must remain vigilant and advocate for a new map that includes an additional Black opportunity district, ensuring that all Alabamians have an equal voice in our democracy.
---
**Why is _Allen v. Milligan_ so important for the future of fair maps and voting rights?**
This case is a crucial test of whether the Voting Rights Act, one of the most significant civil rights laws in American history, will continue to be enforced as it has been for decades. The outcome in _Milligan_ will have far-reaching implications not only for the voting power of Black Alabamians but also for voters of color across the country who seek equal representation under Section 2. [**The U.S. Supreme Court decision could damage communities of color in Alabama with fewer voting protections and inadequate voting power, leading to significant vote dilution.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62861935/404808826/1971507452?refcode=20230505_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YmUxMWQwLTg3ZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwi6k4wzqJCHj3lk9uIsgpFVqp7FhLaXsGdxf_fLJko=)
Congress has repeatedly reauthorized the VRA with bipartisan support for more than half a century, and the questions presented in this case have already been answered by existing precedent. The current Alabama congressional map is a clear violation of Section 2 of the VRA, and the outcome of this case will determine whether voters of color in Alabama and beyond will have an equal opportunity to participate in the political process and be represented fairly.
That's why All On The Line's fight for fair maps is ongoing daily, year after year. We must continue to advocate for equal representation and justice as we prepare for the decision in _Allen v. Milligan_.
**[To protect fairness for Black Alabamians and voters of color across the country, we must take action now to help All On The Line advocate for fair maps. Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in Alabama are supported by a grassroots-driven movement to restore our democracy. Can you help our efforts across the nation by rushing a donation of $7 today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62861936/404808828/1971507452?refcode=20230505_AOTL_F_ShapeOfThingsAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3YmUxMWQwLTg3ZWItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fwi6k4wzqJCHj3lk9uIsgpFVqp7FhLaXsGdxf_fLJko=)**

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: School lunches shouldn’t be a bargaining chip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
My response to Congress’s bad budget plan
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62844768/404769424/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzMWQ4ZDItNjdlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eiL8bJTtd_f9bcQyOifXc-E0UDUHmH4IctMMHX32gZg=&emci=e7d29b32-e9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8a31d8d2-67eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter – The chaos we're seeing has a lot to do with the entrenched political polarization in Congress, but **one issue that shouldn't get caught up in the debate is school lunches.** Recently, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy proposed legislation to raise the debt ceiling. The problem is that the bill also bargains for a repeal of the safety net that many rely on, including health care, food, and income assistance for families in need. **The proposal also threatens deeper cuts to funding for free and reduced cost school lunches.** School children deserve access to healthy food, and our elected officials should be fighting to make it _easier_ for them to get it. That's why one of my first actions on the School Board was to abolish "lunch debt." No student should feel like they have to skip meals because they're worried about money. Later, during the pandemic, we went one step further; the L.A. Unified School District provided meals to _anyone_ who came to a school and needed food. During that period, the LAUSD functioned as the largest food bank in the country, serving over 150 million meals. The pandemic may have receded, but food is even more expensive now. As families struggle to recover from the pandemic and inflation continues to soar, **Republicans are seeking to make it even harder for families to feed their kids with sweeping cuts to SNAP (also known as food stamps) and funding for school lunches.** This is unacceptable. Our kids shouldn't be a political power play. **School lunches used to have bipartisan consensus**. If Congress is so stuck in the politics of the past that they can't agree that _feeding hungry school children_ is important, we truly need new voices in Washington – people who'll skip the political games and focus on what's best for our kids' future. **That's what this movement is about, Peter, and I am thrilled to be in the fight with you.** _Nick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info clean_body: My response to Congress’s bad budget plan | | | | Peter – The chaos we're seeing has a lot to do with the entrenched political polarization in Congress, but one issue that shouldn't get caught up in the debate is school lunches. Recently, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy proposed legislation to raise the debt ceiling. The problem is that the bill also bargains for a repeal of the safety net that many rely on, including health care, food, and income assistance for families in need. The proposal also threatens deeper cuts to funding for free and reduced cost school lunches. School children deserve access to healthy food, and our elected officials should be fighting to make it easier for them to get it. That's why one of my first actions on the School Board was to abolish "lunch debt." No student should feel like they have to skip meals because they're worried about money. Later, during the pandemic, we went one step further; the L.A. Unified School District provided meals to anyone who came to a school and needed food. During that period, the LAUSD functioned as the largest food bank in the country, serving over 150 million meals. The pandemic may have receded, but food is even more expensive now. As families struggle to recover from the pandemic and inflation continues to soar, Republicans are seeking to make it even harder for families to feed their kids with sweeping cuts to SNAP (also known as food stamps) and funding for school lunches. This is unacceptable. Our kids shouldn't be a political power play. School lunches used to have bipartisan consensus. If Congress is so stuck in the politics of the past that they can't agree that feeding hungry school children is important, we truly need new voices in Washington – people who'll skip the political games and focus on what's best for our kids' future. That's what this movement is about, Peter, and I am thrilled to be in the fight with you. Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

The questions asked at that meeting had nothing to do with the shooting, **but rather about mask enforcement.** At that point, I knew our community needed real leaders who focused on the pressing issues at hand.I began to organize with parents, teachers, students, and families, and we successfully advocated for common-sense gun safety legislation at the state level. But I knew we were still lacking – there was still so much left to accomplish.That is why I launched my campaign for Congress. John James is pocketing thousands of dollars from the NRA, even with shootings continuing to happen across our state and our nation. More has to be done, and I know for a fact that I can accomplish so much for our families in Congress.**[If you’re ready for new leadership that can stand up to the gun lobby and enact real, lifesaving legislation, chip in today to help me defeat John James.](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=ecdf28a1814040b7a47b5bdc73be5fea&_e=xk5AMn3HFJ8k1U9PfuWA1bBPCDR22SlhA1EJyZcAfzW41rcg2Q2TMLoArT8W6i2BilAMcIEdp19iQvB2QIw1tVejogd2ev1U2UW3RLmpp3ecqE5tE__rHrBeYGy1q1PNoBeQIrz_9VqvRgcT53MBxoGxAwFOzFUvQHHcla7NZw-A5DbzB9O4_D6jVLFH1IWiKbLFQKg2XlhewP91-frI5IO-eHiQsnHx5yC33EXrxjv1arkRLgMgn9qigvfBTkgJGJJFz_ZXqGkVGyRcecQmE6H1zv0WBq_WK_4_5t7pJ-u35zHZ4jB7sKYbknDJoJSPaPEK4EEx1EZj6yryFv_TG3O2R30Fx_f8MSTUQNX3n2UVMw0h1jYsOWhUkq0VemIHCLfEkC0ZCV6gY_AA76Nm6El-W6NgEA4T1VbJxqL8DfU%3D)** With your help, we can work together to prevent future tragedies and create a safer future for our children.All the best,
Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

| We know you’re busy, so we’ll keep this quick. Here are three things you need to know about Hillary Scholten’s re-election campaign in MI-03:

**1️⃣ **Hillary flipped a 50-year Republican stronghold in 2022, becoming the first Democratic woman to ever represent West Michigan in Congress.

**2️⃣ **National Democrats and Republicans agree that this seat will be a battleground for control of the House – that’s why they’re making it a top priority for 2024.

**3️⃣ **Hillary is counting on grassroots supporters like you to fuel her re-election so that she can stay in Congress advocating for the issues that matter most.
