name: CoriBush.org
subject: When we show up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Last year's midterms showed the true power of our movement.
#
Hi Peter,
Did you know that voter turnout for last year's elections was the second highest for a midterms since 2000?
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230505.kbSS1U&refcode=em20230505-2641&t=1&akid=2641%2E1082990%2EKcXO2n)
With **_more than 50 percent_** of voters casting ballots, we know last year's elections showed the true power of our movement. When we vote, we have the opportunity to upend the status quo and transform our politics.
With far-right extremist Republicans launching deliberate attacks on reproductive rights, the LGBTQIA2S+ community, and democracy itself, we know the majority of the people do not stand with their hateful and bigoted agenda.
Last year, our people-powered movement saw a wave of success up and down the ballot as voters turned out. And we plan to build on that momentum in 2024 and beyond.
**[Will you contribute to our movement today so we have the resources we need to lay the foundation for the progressive future we deserve?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230505.kbSS1U&refcode=em20230505-2641&t=2&akid=2641%2E1082990%2EKcXO2n)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230505.K9KS1q&refcode=em20230505-2641&t=21&akid=2641%2E1082990%2EKcXO2n)**
In solidarity,
CoriBush.org

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230505?refcode=em20230505-2641-footer&t=22&refcode2=2641_1082990_KcXO2n&akid=2641%2E1082990%2EKcXO2n) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: [Petition]: Our Nation’s debt crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
We must DEMAND that Biden and Baldwin address Wisconsinite's struggles
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=40f1e3efd5694c04abed629bc0e568d8&_e=8khu68T8B6dcaMzlJRaEdSEIsF53LbUdnwaA1fT5rhg5WAOSBWi-UXK76r4GJl4NKttssIXhe-Gm4r58x4hzQtwX0ua0pAld7Rele01vtU4mVva87y2dfJoSC4onnGBBvo4x1Sg340k0ldOR3fWkuMC3suo11ofP0O176p5muZtV5SOJS3IwlCriGFntSbCOlIYn2mL344KkeXsRHYOKkjPWQX4ZB4CxnDnnSGFW5SWwEBcdyeGJvgtO4oA1Xd_Cvovng3Olwmc-nyO-LdOniTvSJozmrR6DIi9heb1PZePuZHV3_gTxuhuoDbWwPq-ZmDYWci3DiMvSh-qNEXkLblkASlIjg4MS9z8LfmPAKrc%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Wisconsinites are suffering as our economy deteriorates due to the Biden-Baldwin agenda that has caused:
---
_
* Rising interest rates
* Increased cost of living
* Cost of goods increasing
* Lower wages
* Savings plummeting
* Increasing fear of recession

_
---
But House Republicans, including our six Republican Wisconsin representatives, have passed a bill that will address the looming crisis and END Biden’s reckless spending.
---
_Unfortunately, Democrat Senators- including Tammy Baldwin- and Biden himself are openly opposing this bill and any attempt to relieve the financial strain on Americans._
---
_That’s why we need you to join us by signing this petition to show Biden and the radical Left that Wisconsinites DEMAND they work on getting our economy back on track._
---
[**Please add your name to our official Debt Petition to show that the people of Wisconsin DEMAND Biden and Baldwin address our nation’s debt crisis to relieve the suffering of Wisconsinites.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=40f1e3efd5694c04abed629bc0e568d8&_e=8khu68T8B6dcaMzlJRaEdSEIsF53LbUdnwaA1fT5rhg5WAOSBWi-UXK76r4GJl4NKttssIXhe-Gm4r58x4hzQtwX0ua0pAld7Rele01vtU4mVva87y2dfJoSC4onnGBBvo4x1Sg340k0ldOR3fWkuMC3suo11ofP0O176p5muZtV5SOJS3IwlCriGFntSbCOlIYn2mL344KkeXsRHYOKkuYedoF2Z01P_OUGeJKl8lSjo1EYJEQTx3ENIgs6B6886PP2dBgojP_hXljL7-kOxD3yEQNUXfpVXS85P3W_pLYBarh78Z9JdDRAY9iBKnoMkTcmrfDy0llioEQqCmDWSPwtNQKdgJuYY2P2uqY4AQc%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=40f1e3efd5694c04abed629bc0e568d8&_e=8khu68T8B6dcaMzlJRaEdSEIsF53LbUdnwaA1fT5rhg5WAOSBWi-UXK76r4GJl4NKttssIXhe-Gm4r58x4hzQtwX0ua0pAld7Rele01vtU4mVva87y2dfJoSC4onnGBBvo4x1Sg340k0ldOR3fWkuMC3suo11ofP0O176p5muZtV5SOJS3IwlCriGFntSbCOlIYn2mL344KkeXsRHYOKkgbWps7rvyDfohO7lUwhem4qvBD4AW2Cq-8SCGG-6f9mAudIF0XKERlmN5X0_Izl0cR93nnHpzQ6x_Shgq3KhO0FPZJ7XXVZ7luS5tYvBVnhP4qigGgBwgbf96eCitUmZDutybOmPtekB-vI7ZXo-ZQ%3D)
---

The pain we feel while pumping gas, buying groceries, and paying bills is a direct result of Baldwin's adherence to Biden's agenda and his reckless spending.
---
_If he had it his way, Biden would have Wisconsin taxpayers continue to fund his reckless spending agenda for another 4 years._
---
And while Biden wants to convince you that our economy is doing well, the truth is that Wisconsin families are worse off today than when he took office.
---
**70% of Americans overall feel the economy is getting worse for their family – the highest percentage in over 20 years!**
---
_It’s time for the people of Wisconsin to put pressure on Biden and his fellow Democrats to work on rebuilding our economy to end the financial struggle of so many people in our state._
---

clean_body: We must DEMAND that Biden and Baldwin address Wisconsinite's struggles | Friend, Wisconsinites are suffering as our economy deteriorates due to the Biden-Baldwin agenda that has caused: Rising interest rates Increased cost of living Cost of goods increasing Lower wages Savings plummeting Increasing fear of recession But House Republicans, including our six Republican Wisconsin representatives, have passed a bill that will address the looming crisis and END Biden’s reckless spending. Unfortunately, Democrat Senators- including Tammy Baldwin- and Biden himself are openly opposing this bill and any attempt to relieve the financial strain on Americans. That’s why we need you to join us by signing this petition to show Biden and the radical Left that Wisconsinites DEMAND they work on getting our economy back on track. The pain we feel while pumping gas, buying groceries, and paying bills is a direct result of Baldwin's adherence to Biden's agenda and his reckless spending. If he had it his way, Biden would have Wisconsin taxpayers continue to fund his reckless spending agenda for another 4 years. And while Biden wants to convince you that our economy is doing well, the truth is that Wisconsin families are worse off today than when he took office. 70% of Americans overall feel the economy is getting worse for their family – the highest percentage in over 20 years! It’s time for the people of Wisconsin to put pressure on Biden and his fellow Democrats to work on rebuilding our economy to end the financial struggle of so many people in our state. name: Kim Bernice Nguyen
subject: AAPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | May is AAPI Heritage Month, and we’re celebrating the contributions that Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders have made to our country.

Our history is shaped by determination, resilience, and hope. In the face of exclusion and discrimination, we’ve come together and lifted each other up. We’ve fought for what’s right – and we’ve never backed down.

**And together, the AAPI community has changed this nation for the better.**

I’m the daughter of a Vietnamese refugee. My dad came to this country with nothing and started a new life from scratch. He sacrificed everything to ensure I would be able to live out the American Dream.

My story is just one of many. The AAPI community is diverse – in language, in dialect, and in life experiences. Our stories are unique, but our community is bound together by our shared hopes and dreams and struggles and triumphs.

**Our story is the American story – a tale of hard work, sacrifice, and unrelenting optimism.**

I hope you get a chance to celebrate AAPI Heritage Month. Thanks for everything.

– Kim | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62845962/404773002/760158825?contactdata=QnsCCeazkN1SSeK3fB3pqTVaAHqIxsNQhIrMlMt18unUH+Bfi8iWwnqAwS2BGEGeJD1WJqogqpZwUxut8casD+kKVuLwvmThQM0BpDOG1Rw=&amount=15&refcode=KBN_EM_ST_WL_230505_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTliMDBiYTQtNmFlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JM7jKO4xYljXmXF_jHRTRaQPxW-2efk1-3V0Kin_WYU=)**

Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

clean_body: If passed, this measure would require all future ballot measures to pass with at least a 60% supermajority making it extremely difficult for any future issues to win at the ballot box. | | Team — in Ohio right now, extremist officials are making moves to try and restrict the power of ballot measures. The Ohio State Senate has already voted to refer a dangerous measure to the ballot for this November that could strip Ohioans of the power of their vote. If passed, this measure would require all future ballot measures to pass with at least a 60% supermajority, making it extremely difficult for any future issues to win at the ballot box. Now, the House will vote on this same measure, and if passed, this referendum would appear in front of voters as soon as November.= = Ohio is one of 10 states where a ballot measure could be used as a tool to permanently protect reproductive health care in the state — including abortion. And the Ohio legislature’s latest attack on ballot measures is no coincidence. Some of these extremist Ohio officials have gone ON RECORD stating that this referendum is an effort to keep Ohio voters from protecting abortion access via ballot measure as soon as this fall. Team: We refuse to stand by while extremists make blatant attempts at restricting the power of American voters — in Ohio and everywhere. I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

[**$25.59**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e343a760665462caf15bea09babcac5&_e=sitoNRjiEfY7r7O8Mkr99TUthYeCaGJkiFbcwAPY2GW5XSm_lasHfLSd83_IPq1V5KWYtGZ9gfgog5BGUKuRkITxv5jGUB6_NiuURYfdU7RfhsaFOXbIrdjJbYZQ8hc-9mN0Au-sX42E8ZmQf9tFNyyja9WyUSCN3Ij6kT6V32SzXxaKP_Hd0vv5CsBDypCePlXPtMJnyBoyaTbXp9h2O7Qwi402Qj3qJfTneioI4-bzI-mpRUM5GA4wOA_TE6Q6hiZvPWzZD-YAG64Jkw6vwGu5tcGTiFy2xBHhbrVIoiMx3Q59gqAK1yNiTsMQzN_5LuSTgRAgQghfeCdXL5BbibzwFMjXBHj9uHLZRkAXaRAd-LqyHU-RAdnELQe1b_ApaGOG__WC55J4dugRluN9wV3_XTlhiTalA7Mp-ckenz9MzgGf3E1keQjzGW7mpvOs)
That was our average donation in April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e343a760665462caf15bea09babcac5&_e=sitoNRjiEfY7r7O8Mkr99TUthYeCaGJkiFbcwAPY2GW5XSm_lasHfLSd83_IPq1V5KWYtGZ9gfgog5BGUKuRkITxv5jGUB6_NiuURYfdU7RfhsaFOXbIrdjJbYZQ8hc-9mN0Au-sX42E8ZmQf9tFNyyja9WyUSCN3Ij6kT6V32SzXxaKP_Hd0vv5CsBDypCePlXPtMJnyBoyaTbXp9h2O7Qwi402Qj3qJfTneioI4-bzI-mpRUM5GA4wOA_TE6Q6sUBVwf_1WjW5C9RGz2u81Hhx2Bf56XtLaW3FFA6ByDjh0Yq_4ICJKDnDyOx8E7eahVOdGFmrGPm9R1H26OOfx6tL-2qJ5VW3AWbBAMKKoi7s7VUR6LZsn_yNoCX2EJ5ZwP5dx4ZqjaOgIwE2OqPKqNqkqzS-C0mDm2VBAmLppR4%3D)**

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: the fight for our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Team,

**I’m writing to tell you about our first local success, and a big challenge, as we fight the MAGA extremists bringing book bans to New Jersey.**

First, the good news: **With your help, we won our first race in April!** In Westfield, New Jersey, public schools have come under pressure to remove books and curriculum that right-wing activists find objectionable. With our support, candidates committed to freedom of expression won what might otherwise have been a close school board race by a two to one margin.

Now the challenge: In Bernards Township, a pro-censorship slate won control of the local school board last year. And as _The Washington Post_ reported today, **they voted to ban a high school sociology textbook used in thousands of schools across America – a book that hasn’t even been challenged in Ron Desantis’s Florida**. Why? Because the book suggested there had been racism at the founding of our country, and noted – factually – that election conspiracies are more prevalent on the political right than the left. [_Click here if you’d like to read more about it._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846914/404776265/-1188739303?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230505_FR_NJban_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_NJ&refcode2=3ece1cfb-6ceb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlMWNmYi02Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVSrvQpHGcvtIEFRV7JC51zgK4rek6kPqAhZVDY6Hmc=&emci=b2166ab1-57eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3ece1cfb-6ceb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

[Team, what do you say? Will you pitch in $10 today to protect democratic values in our schools and keep the culture wars out of our kids’ lives? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846915/404776266/1646947494?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230505_FR_NJban_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_NJ&refcode2=3ece1cfb-6ceb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNlMWNmYi02Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVSrvQpHGcvtIEFRV7JC51zgK4rek6kPqAhZVDY6Hmc=)

Keep in mind: this latest book ban happened in a suburban New Jersey town with one of the best high schools in America, a town where Joe Biden and I both won a majority of the votes last November – because we were focused on national politics and took our eyes off local races.

That’s the mistake we at Districts for Democracy are determined to correct.

We’re going to rally behind the incredibly smart and talented students in our schools who want the freedom to learn and are perfectly capable of addressing and debating difficult issues.

We’re going to stand up for librarians and school teachers who are being defamed as “groomers” and “pedophiles” because they make available books that affirm the experiences of LGBT Americans and their families.

And we’re going to help moms and dads who want to run for school board and other offices to defend our freedoms, but who worry that they, too, will face ugly smears from the MAGA crowd. They should know that if they take that risk, they will have the resources and support to prevail.

And that’s where you come in! clean_body: | | Team, I’m writing to tell you about our first local success, and a big challenge, as we fight the MAGA extremists bringing book bans to New Jersey. First, the good news: With your help, we won our first race in April! In Westfield, New Jersey, public schools have come under pressure to remove books and curriculum that right-wing activists find objectionable. With our support, candidates committed to freedom of expression won what might otherwise have been a close school board race by a two to one margin. Now the challenge: In Bernards Township, a pro-censorship slate won control of the local school board last year. And as The Washington Post reported today, they voted to ban a high school sociology textbook used in thousands of schools across America – a book that hasn’t even been challenged in Ron Desantis’s Florida. Why? Because the book suggested there had been racism at the founding of our country, and noted – factually – that election conspiracies are more prevalent on the political right than the left. = Keep in mind: this latest book ban happened in a suburban New Jersey town with one of the best high schools in America, a town where Joe Biden and I both won a majority of the votes last November – because we were focused on national politics and took our eyes off local races. That’s the mistake we at Districts for Democracy are determined to correct. We’re going to rally behind the incredibly smart and talented students in our schools who want the freedom to learn and are perfectly capable of addressing and debating difficult issues. We’re going to stand up for librarians and school teachers who are being defamed as “groomers” and “pedophiles” because they make available books that affirm the experiences of LGBT Americans and their families. And we’re going to help moms and dads who want to run for school board and other offices to defend our freedoms, but who worry that they, too, will face ugly smears from the MAGA crowd. They should know that if they take that risk, they will have the resources and support to prevail. And that’s where you come in! = – Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQRp9msiNyxn_xwgu4UTZctbvSrRk74MoJVpwU8fZVEO32m6Ojo3FjTnF4WNAHQLxGXwAR-B4Qj-Lw-aaOp2O323-E912npLhvV_wHiMsjhz_0ZanD6GLaVt1V3iK1SFQF26iWc9YaqaurZU0rjOYBTZBE5Al9Ixln3ihiTjRVtMiQM8lko4VpsEZtlDR8kF4PZ-0RBLvHqfa3ySX_tczrmGu6jVWy12XJ5ZnUA_bFfQc3hjmSq6eVUljLM3CDAftX9Aau50JzzEu8TQWwX6fXcg7A--dTePff6cvQteJUzdbne0wpFqVBsMuv8ycAAP__0xdlZg)

[Privacy Policy](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxkkL2OnDAUhZ_m0oHM9S8FxW4sGqKky6YbeWwzOLLB4mcRbx8xmk2T9jtHV9-5JuUYhrMF-Q6IY3ArIAJ9A8Sevf_-IfqPXpdvv_zPUgvOjivFb4C4ndn_q76uVD6ZEC8qdeFatAqtLXxbC0UpUQ2XxdiKgXtUDXFKEMUa4Txnvh4sv_NaCHUvQosEKeGE15I1NVYoG8EbOnAnh7t0CIwcYarcPJno_mzLnnJl51TEdty2vD6VOsDuOI7_SoBdXsKnsWeZ5xjsWSK5JnVAu31Lt-Rd2BNQ_ZoiLrjO-2I9UG3DzbyYNSmb8JiA6i_dr2SeNj9tQLVqiAAUtykGB1SPg1h7x5z5fMLns6n-buRj0Ip9FEvr8hFiDKuQwMjjMric_wYAAP__T89_gA)

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Primaries Wrap-up Around the State_ Tuesday’s primaries show that Hoosier Democrats are fired up and ready across the state to elect new candidates and advocate for their communities. In Indianapolis, Democrats outvoted Republicans by an [over 60-40 clip](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846954/404776444/-2028030572?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). In Michigan City, [Angie Nelson-Deuitch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846955/404776445/-268276777?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) handily won the nomination and is ready to flip the city to Democrats. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846956/404776446/1721227078?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846957/404776447/1721227078?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) First-time candidate and young veteran Brandon Sakbun is the nominee [in Terre Haute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846958/404776448/-1403087991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). And Democrats in Carmel in Fishers put up [strong vote totals](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846959/404776449/28218424?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) despite having no primary competition. Now, the real work begins. Our candidates are ready to reach out to voters and run strong campaigns. **** _It’s official – Jennifer McCormick is running for Governor_ Yesterday, Jennifer McCormick [officially announced](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846960/404776450/1746503183?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) her bid to run for Governor of Indiana! McCormick was previously elected as the 44th Indiana Superintendent of Public Instruction. [Watch her launch video!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846961/404776451/-803653937?v=SkEJzSRpMM4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846962/404776452/-961795142?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)[ Share Jennifer McCormick](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846963/404776453/-961795142?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) “For too long Hoosiers have had to deal with leadership incapable of ushering in a future for Indiana that works for ALL. From education, to mental health, to supporting small businesses and family farms – we deserve leadership that will fight for us at every level. And I believe I am that leadership,” McCormick said in her announcement. “We can undo the damage done by dysfunctional politicians and bring back civility to our Statehouse.” [Donate to her campaign today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846964/404776454/1514030707?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846965/404776455/-2108900706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846966/404776456/-2108900706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Legislation written by State Rep. Vernon Smith to give school districts more tools to combat bullying gained final legislative approval nearly unanimously last week. This bill has been a long-time goal of Rep. Smith’s and was passed to honor the legacy of students who lost their lives due to bullying. Rep. Smith [recently commented](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846967/404776457/-1491233768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), "In the event bullying continues, this bill also provides avenues for victims or perpetrators to be separated. This bill is the culmination of five years of work on my part, and I'm glad to see that it's finally come to fruition." **__** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846968/404776458/85319006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share Rep. Maureen [Share Indiana House Democrats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846973/404776463/-1892661784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62846974/404776464/1613532333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWJmOGYzOC02ZGViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OUrKb_8esKHCdRLFiLT6cyXarJ38BpjDk4WCtMc0agw=&emci=0c50b8ba-49eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69bf8f38-6deb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Primaries Wrap-up Around the State Tuesday’s primaries show that Hoosier Democrats are fired up and ready across the state to elect new candidates and advocate for their communities. In Indianapolis, Democrats outvoted Republicans by an . In Michigan City, handily won the nomination and is ready to flip the city to Democrats. First-time candidate and young veteran Brandon Sakbun is the nominee . And Democrats in Carmel in Fishers put up despite having no primary competition. Now, the real work begins. Our candidates are ready to reach out to voters and run strong campaigns. It’s official – Jennifer McCormick is running for Governor Yesterday, Jennifer McCormick her bid to run for Governor of Indiana! McCormick was previously elected as the 44th Indiana Superintendent of Public Instruction. “For too long Hoosiers have had to deal with leadership incapable of ushering in a future for Indiana that works for ALL. From education, to mental health, to supporting small businesses and family farms – we deserve leadership that will fight for us at every level. And I believe I am that leadership,” McCormick said in her announcement. “We can undo the damage done by dysfunctional politicians and bring back civility to our Statehouse.” = Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Legislation written by State Rep. Vernon Smith to give school districts more tools to combat bullying gained final legislative approval nearly unanimously last week. This bill has been a long-time goal of Rep. Smith’s and was passed to honor the legacy of students who lost their lives due to bullying. Rep. Smith , "In the event bullying continues, this bill also provides avenues for victims or perpetrators to be separated. This bill is the culmination of five years of work on my part, and I'm glad to see that it's finally come to fruition." Upcoming Candidate Trainings Tuesday, May 2, 1-2 p.m. ET: “So You Want to Run for Office: Asian American & Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month Edition”: In honor of Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month, this training will focus specifically on the challenges and opportunities AAPI candidates face. Register by Thursday, May 4, 1-2:30 p.m. ET: “What is a Democratic Precinct Chair?”: Learn about the roles and responsibilities of being a Democratic Precinct Committeeperson. Hear about ways to keep your precinct engaged between election season. Register by Save The Date: 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner More details to come on this year’s Hoosier Hospitality Dinner — but for now mark your calendars for June 16 at the Indiana Convention Center! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! Friend, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue!
Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $2,500,000 launch week goal! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050523_b1_colin-split-bump_30ac&amount=10]
Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you. Can you spare just $10 to power my Democratic campaign and DASS PAC? ----Begin forwarded message---- Sender: Colin Allred
Date: Wed, May 03, 2023
Subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050523_b1_colin-split-bump_30ac&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050523_b1_colin-split-bump_30ac&amount=10]
Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050523_b1_colin-split-bump_30ac&amount=10]

I'm a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-anderson-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_050523_b1_colin-split-bump_30ac&amount=10] taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. clean_body: [] Friend, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue! Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $2,500,000 launch week goal! [] Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you. Can you spare just $10 to power my Democratic campaign and DASS PAC? Let’s do this → [ in $10 >> [] ----Begin forwarded message---- Sender: Colin Allred Date: Wed, May 03, 2023 Subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz [] Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] I'm a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: [] taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [] Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred DONATE >> [] Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I'd love to hear what's on your mind, Derek
body:
Will you join me for a call on May 15 at 10 a.m.?
| | |
---
Derek, how are you? It's hard to believe it's May already – which is starting out a little too cool for my taste but surely warmer days are right around the corner.

I'm emailing because – as you may know – I make it a priority to connect with supporters on a regular basis. Recently, I had the chance to connect with some of you via phone, and I'd really like to make it happen again.
Because you're such an important part of Team Chrissy, I'd love to hear what's on your mind right now. The first 10 people to sign up for a monthly recurring contribution to my campaign will receive a call from me in the next few weeks.
| | [SIGN UP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62847595/404778891/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk815-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGZiMWNhNy02ZWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCwdmik4XJGS-uWSHh98FYZoKD1UPDafqOq332r2_UE=)

name: Team Durbin
subject: Even more Supreme Court ethics news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
...and Mitch McConnell is fine with the status quo.
#
Peter,
Senator Durbin reached out earlier this week about the need for Supreme Court ethics reform.
With even more shocking details reported yesterday about unethical behavior from Justice Thomas, it’s clear this issue isn’t going away. That’s why we need leaders like Senator Durbin working to institute an enforceable, written code of ethical standards for the Supreme Court.
Meanwhile, Republicans like Mitch McConnell are insisting that there is nothing wrong with the status quo. That’s why we can’t afford to let them take back the Senate majority next November.
**[Peter, we know we can’t count on the GOP to fight for what’s right. | Endorsement Alert Governor Bob McDonnell
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of our well respected 71st Governor of Virginia, Bob McDonnell. The momentum is on our side. If everyone shows up, we have enough delegates to win the convention on the first vote tomorrow at Buckingham High School. Please spread the word. I can't wait to see you!
Together we will un-California Virginia!
---
| | |
---|---
|
I am proud to endorse fellow veteran and fellow republican Delegate John McGuire for State Senate District 10. As a Navy SEAL, we know he won't back down and he is the best choice to get our conservative agenda through the Senate.

John has a solid six-year conservative voting record in the House of Delegates. I'm asking Delegates for the 10th State Senate District Convention, please vote for John McGuire on May 6th at Buckingham County High School.

Sincerely,
Governor Bob McDonnell

clean_body: | | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement == | | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | Endorsement Alert Governor Bob McDonnell | Dear Friend, I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of our well respected 71st Governor of Virginia, Bob McDonnell. The momentum is on our side. If everyone shows up, we have enough delegates to win the convention on the first vote tomorrow at Buckingham High School. Please spread the word. I can't wait to see you! Together we will un-California Virginia! | | | ---|--- | I am proud to endorse fellow veteran and fellow republican Delegate John McGuire for State Senate District 10. As a Navy SEAL, we know he won't back down and he is the best choice to get our conservative agenda through the Senate. John has a solid six-year conservative voting record in the House of Delegates. I'm asking Delegates for the 10th State Senate District Convention, please vote for John McGuire on May 6th at Buckingham County High School. Sincerely, Governor Bob McDonnell Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | Convention Updates go to == | Just 1 day to Saturday May 6! All delegates are asked arrive at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. Please send an email to john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you have any questions. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. | | Fellow conservative,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=c3ed57d2303b470494d77869cca96ba2&_e=VYNUCdW7b5QTTD-IYewGoMNEI-3xry2NFAnDHfJkr8bKv7_KiumaUTXHDvmT5Mz1lrzHSPw4vFJjYGZfOW4vFtp8By8f27Kn0wZAIIiN4_Gr3kVsiBdoqnp9TubzLhPAh1b7fapTF6ieaNtwsX57hWhqp8ECFj2Zwcoz5QNm1K8AQE0bP6LWlwUYMJpuDR4xNDU9Uq2yFRyNUBk5cgG4D0QDHdkv2KGOtp3w65karXey-CXCZTP2TlvENj1Mzv9-lO8S7C6AHVaaHvDd4muMkFjGX_uQwL3dpVhlaWvoZMVEEHD-iuEU4y3p0knJkOJZe94PvAhYBKE7UywJCtEs6FMYRyjRmqSzySHTV-ZJtkk5FuVsS-C-BFWlnwVHmXOSBfZoxjYdDVrDYFODF4IZahOBX-IJjyFgobVnZJ24AoYYautfVba3EmJ4JfopzEjsIaiYqkw5FToRwgW35gSjRCQiwlfeQbbo3JGsvdj5Bv0%3D) Growing up, my family used to tell me all the time about what their home country of Cuba was like.

People lived in constant fear of retaliation from the Castro regime, and the cost of criticizing the government could be your life.

**_This_ is what socialism looks like - but the Left still PROUDLY endorses their socialist agenda here in America.**

I decided to run for Congress because I didn’t want _any_ American to experience the socialist tyranny my parents did. **And now, I need your help to keep America the freest country on Earth.**

[**Pitch in today and join our fight to ensure America will NEVER be a socialist country!**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=c3ed57d2303b470494d77869cca96ba2&_e=VYNUCdW7b5QTTD-IYewGoMNEI-3xry2NFAnDHfJkr8bKv7_KiumaUTXHDvmT5Mz13J728edPe-NItA1O90UB8kd21cOqQoAjw00bmXtR2kWA18M0xxnr0L9dIJCPAwjYfv15-URtRijRp8ORMU-tmJgKGewMYCaqCd2BbSjk8-qNBUac_Uc303efNJ6OzoWqPAxorfPvUsjQAg2OdQF1yTmyZLn2smjynJkeoHraMg4KNHyygDZ6FkMPaB6x4KXfw7eIoD_aRIBxYQaDZnUZFTkm4v5Ghtc7KKcTuBOdSFtdNvGo3jMuO1SQO0iUXjooBgQEnV39VRvLrIb5Yh23V39916Ev8hM-66XsBZPVCcbY3SWfgAHg1AKOQ_50DWNE)

clean_body: | | | | | Fellow conservative, Growing up, my family used to tell me all the time about what their home country of Cuba was like. People lived in constant fear of retaliation from the Castro regime, and the cost of criticizing the government could be your life. This is what socialism looks like - but the Left still PROUDLY endorses their socialist agenda here in America. I decided to run for Congress because I didn’t want any American to experience the socialist tyranny my parents did. And now, I need your help to keep America the freest country on Earth. Socialism isn’t pink infographics and #resist t-shirts. It’s violent, stifling, and all-encompassing - and that’s the truth the Democrats don’t want you to see. We CANNOT take the threat of socialism lightly. Thank you, | | | | Rep. Maria Elvira Salazar | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Jon Tester
subject: Politics isn’t a game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans.

| Peter,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.

Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**

When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.

[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between Susan Wild and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62848551/404781741/-37640284?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230505-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWJjNDY2OS02ZmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gpoJLIkC-_oh1Gz6XeXNDjZhsOWwGippSGS-QVbj4yY=)

Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans.

That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country.

— Jon

name: Allred HQ
subject: Team Allred needs YOU — join now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Everything is at stake in Texas
| Friend, we’re counting on YOU to become a Founding Member of Team Allred in our race against Ted Cruz before midnight. Here’s why this is so important:

\- Ted Cruz IS beatable: 46% of Texans **DISAPPROVE** of the job he’s doing.
\- CNN ranked Cruz as one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the country.
\- **We need to raise $2,500,000 this week to launch this campaign – _it’s going to take an unprecedented outpouring of grassroots support to win._** [Colin needs 20,000 Founding Donors to join his campaign before our first week ends, and we’re counting on YOU to be one of them. Please, join our team by making a split donation with Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Member of Team Allred and help us defeat Ted Cruz. →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44565?t=6&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB) | [CLICK HERE TO DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44565?t=7&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB)
---
Texans deserve better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics.

**We’ve all watched as Cruz bowed down to Donald Trump, peddled baseless lies about the 2020 election even as rioters stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and fled to Cancun while Texans were freezing in their homes.**

Now, we have a chance to replace him with a leader who will fight for our fundamental rights, from voting to reproductive freedom.

And flipping this seat blue would all but guarantee Democrats protect our razor-thin Senate majority – a majority we _must_ protect with the future of so many of our shared values on the line.

[So please, don’t miss your chance to join this powerful grassroots movement: Chip in a split donation with Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Donor of Team Allred. Every dollar counts in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz and keep the Senate blue! →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44565?t=8&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44566?t=9&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44565?t=13&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB)
Thank you,

Team Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7510%2E878179%2EOftwlB).**

name: Replace Sinema
subject: WATCH: CNN takes notice of Sinema’s corruption
body:

We need to keep the pressure on the Senate to launch a formal investigation. And if we can reach 15,000 co-signers on our call to action, we'll be making a powerful statement.

Jennifer

subject: Draft Ballot Title Received for Constitutional Carry
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e00301ae42e0/were-off-and-running-8122265?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
|
---
|
**Attorney General issues draft CCFO ballot title**
SALEM, OR—May 5, 2023—On May 4, 2023, the Oregon Attorney General’s Office issued a draft ballot title to the Secretary of State’s Elections Division for Initiative Petition 2024-021, proposed for the November 5, 2024, General Election. That issuance brings Oregon one step closer to becoming a constitutional carry state.

That draft ballot title reads: “Amends Constitution: Creates constitutional right to carry a concealed firearm without a permit.”

Led by Constitutional Carry for Oregon (CCFO), 2024-021 seeks to amend the Oregon Constitution as simply as possible, adding only one sentence. At present, 27 U.S. states are already constitutional carry states.

After a 14-day comment period, the Attorney General’s Office will then certify the ballot title. The process of gathering the 160,551 signatures for the initiative to appear on the November 2024 ballot will begin thereafter. CCFO has until July 5, 2024, to submit signatures.

CCFO is a grassroots volunteer effort. The three chief petitioners are: Joel Pawloski, a retired Army Lt. Colonel in Marion County; Kerry McQuisten, the former mayor of Baker City in Baker County; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County.

In a joint statement, the petitioners stated, “We’re pleased with the draft title and explanation of our effort as it will appear on the ballot. As we’ve followed the procedural constitutional requirements for initiative petitions very carefully, we don’t anticipate any legitimate challenges. We look forward to beginning the signature-gathering process.”

More information can be found at www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com.
# # #

subject: Live footage of Republicans in Congress:

body:
It’s time to get the adults back in the room. |

name: Quentin Wathum-Ocama, Young Democrats of America
subject: Fwd: YDA Convention |It’s been how long⁉️ 😲
body:
| Derek,

I know there has been A LOT of fast-breaking and major news the last two weeks, but I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see this really great email from Young Democrats of Nevada President Tanner Hale. Please take a second to check it out and make sure you book your room for #YDAVegas today!

Thanks,

Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Tanner Hale, Young Democrats of Nevada** <info@yda.org>
Date: Thu, Apr 20, 2023 at 2:20 PM
Subject: YDA Convention | It’s been how long

**
**It’s been 50 years since the Young Democrats of America last held a convention in Nevada!** In that time the Silver State’s population has grown by 6-fold and Las Vegas has completely transformed from a mere dot on the map to a glowing beacon in the desert providing opportunities to those who take a gamble. **** Time and time again, the battle born state defies the odds and re-elects Democrats up and down the ballot. Its battleground status is all thanks to robust campaign operations from unions, grassroots organizations, and activists that turn out a diverse coalition of voters. **** This is why we’re OVER THE MOON to be hosting the national convention in fabulous ✨Las Vegas✨! **** From June 18th - June 21st, we’ll be spending our time at the MGM Grand Hotel (that has a unionized staff so please be sure to tip!). body:
Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.

| Peter,

This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature just passed an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours.

**Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.**

[_**Will you rush a split contribution to the North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus and Valerie Foushee today to help us fight back against Republican extremism?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62849189/404783956/104082353?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230505-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg0MDk3Mi03MWViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmUZb10ZnmYv058kJzBGWG9ENMCscTX-hOmj5erVIxg=)

This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until late Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda.

North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent.

We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state.

But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent. We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Ryan Deeter Executive Director, North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. May 5, 2023

Dear Friend,

When I announced the BIG endorsements of former Congresswoman Connie Conway and State Senator Shannon Grove, I couldn't imagine the positive responses I received.

And no wonder, both have been conservative Republican leaders locally for years, and **_their show of support sends a clear message that my congressional race against the last Democrat in the Central Valley, Jim Costa, will be nationally watched and targeted._**

>From immigration and border security to taxes and corruption, the only hope we have to turn this country away from the socialist wing of the Democrat Party is to **1) Defeat Joe Biden and 2) Help Speaker Kevin McCarthy GROW the Republican Majority in Congress.**

My race here in Tulare and Fresno Counties is part of that plan to grow the Republican Majority in Congress. You can help us immediately with a [**$5 monthly contribution**](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=b0f45a1354&e=1722d05e10) to help our campaign.

| Your help supports this campaign and is just as critical as the support I am receiving from former Congresswoman Connie Conway, Senator Shannon Grove, and a host of other leaders around the valley.

Thank you again for all your support and prayers.

Sincerely,

Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

name: Patrick Denny
subject: Usually you don’t hear from me this early, but because Maryland has a fundraising freeze during the legislative session, we haven’t been able to raise a single penny this year up until last month.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62850071/404785836/1077680223?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230505earlystart_pd_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTI0MmI5MS03M2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2yq8wx2wo2gJNcH9iCPGbQLl3zPKigxa-kEM741oUQ=)
---
Hey team, Usually, you don’t hear from me this early in the month – I prefer to come out of the woodwork when we’ve got an urgent fundraising deadline coming up. But, because Maryland has a fundraising freeze during the legislative session, we haven’t been able to raise _a single penny_ this year up until last month. **That’s a full three months without bringing a single dollar in.** As you can imagine, as a finance director, that seriously stresses me out. **[So, I’m getting an early start with my asks this month. name: Laura Loomer
subject: EXPOSED: Election operatives secretly meeting…
body:
Secretaries of State and election officials from around the country will be gathering at the International Spy Museum in Washington, D.C. in just a few days. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcEliNjcLWTQg4uboXRozLw%2FP61763HChXmSf8cg0YdLnsvw/1/01000187ed404703-020a4161-ea4b-43c6-a3bd-497a3fc20653-000000/etrUS9byRrOI-qXHV8CokyaMElw=320) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcEliNjcLWTQg4uboXRozLw%2FP61763HChXmSf8cg0YdLnsvw/2/01000187ed404703-020a4161-ea4b-43c6-a3bd-497a3fc20653-000000/8C0vIhNGb9DEu0ci3IHgvugXTew=320) Dear Friend,

Secretaries of State and election officials from around the country will be gathering at the International Spy Museum in Washington, D.C. in just a few days.

It sounds pretty normal that the people in charge of the logistics and rules surrounding our elections will be meeting to discuss the 2024 Presidential election, right?

**Not when they 're being hosted by a group that received over $69 million from Mark Zuckerberg and his wife to influence our Elections! **

That group, CEIR (Center for Election Innovation and Research) is hosting the nation's top election officials to discuss topics like "disinformation", "election denialism", and they will also be putting the election officials who run our elections in touch with pro bono attorneys for their personal defense.

**This makes absolutely no sense at all.** Why would government officials like Secretaries of States and Supervisors of Elections need free legal help for doing their job?

Well, because we know that while they are paid to work for "the people", their real job is to disrupt elections in favor of a certain political party. Which is ILLEGAL!

This meeting is happening in just a few days, and I plan to be there to report on this secret election summit in our nation's Capital, [ **but I could use your support to cover my travel expenses and the cost of a cameraman**. **Will you chip in**? ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcEliNjcLWTQg4uboXRozLw%2FP61763HChXmSf8cg0YdLnsvw/3/01000187ed404703-020a4161-ea4b-43c6-a3bd-497a3fc20653-000000/AMLT9B8Zeg7DQkWkb2arZtMJSQM=320)

While it's a closed-door meeting, I'll be working hard to speak to these officials about their presence at a partisan, leftist, George Soros tied and Mark Zuckerberg funded meeting that's clearly designed to disrupt the 2024 Elections.

[**Help me get there today so I can keep on reporting the truth and exposing corruption!** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FcEliNjcLWTQg4uboXRozLw%2FP61763HChXmSf8cg0YdLnsvw/4/01000187ed404703-020a4161-ea4b-43c6-a3bd-497a3fc20653-000000/VSzYjLFstHOBLFfORKoknH7S3TI=320) Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | **Woke Police At The DOD 🚨**
---
---
| | The dadgum bureaucrats have done it again. Our military is in dire straits, folks. Recruitment numbers are abysmal, and our adversaries are taking notes. Consider the alarming fact that just 13% of young Americans say they’d be [willing to serve](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQR4l3zHdCIZ_v-gBRmFABvXuW0-jVB8Xu2F4G8bjGHKvZb45p9CG3x0Z8VUvd-dIqtGa3dHy6PQQ-kATPMOHDSCt6z4txA1L3of1QxUTmTBsqeh1RXrVmJJw8f9Ga2l_1CmFQst3PzmGUIkXwW49q5kmCswSGvgg2VqjUo8tBG9dWpVWhdb2vF5lFBj8TYKz39oL3K8R6It8BKQvKY-Uy-xTNdEo4j5siXeycc6XwBOVj-0uskQ15vEjbKkzWZyuw02BFfT62xSd1mWGbCp2fvsyapkdATwfILTMdUmPLA7V). Instead of creating a highlight reel that underscores the importance of service to this great country, the out-of-touch higher-ups at the Department of Defense are pandering to the woke mob. The U.S. Navy recruited a “drag queen influencer” to help persuade the youth of this country to join the military. The supposed pilot program is using [Yeoman 2nd Class Joshua Kelley](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQS0773cpHX4aQMKD7Be07CoeoZE51RT0429MpCruP2TT4NaoCKkw1eCm_yrrY3Sjj4SDoGqHA5ozWd-g16CYYhK8DqIiR7dCJyG7QjIxDUBn5acmgTlY5cB69fmKEYPqYO-nPNPqLfDb_hSykMIxeY95CowKRxVLhEVLwW9HIZkRw6T5-O7mS5kTWyS9XKWKSFYoE3L8zbMbARvy8USVwOarqrElFZo7KrrTraX4jTRVM_xpl0ZRgz0vpU9O1ztWXw%3D%3D) as a “Digital Ambassador.” They claim it’s another push for a more “diverse” workforce, but if you ask me, all they’re pushing is leftist propaganda. What do terrorists and the communists in China think when they see this tomfoolery? I assume they’re laughing until they’re in stitches. Noteworthy veterans are [fed up and speaking out](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQVccD0a1bqCGpCkQli1xpFRGG1u47OENR80Q_mV4XkYnQKJGS8e_dLHMWuhtBMOdZSG7rcC-4yZuxcstsQWKuwcPs8OQlw9gWuULbzF8WJMxOcOSlIRNsoFC_DwSnKJ3gB368elOgrtItQYuRUmGIEcjbn4EmcYmlkByIaQs0Ki5z2R12Slr5f6uprc3utZKQ5JVAFgKu2Y4rVqUpDvWZbb4BMbI73jj6IHO53P9PNxie_QcsHtyeJh5urudE_1qHtXnkvlicEDRnmOXIBXI0i4%3D)—and I don’t blame them. This is an embarrassment and a blatant attempt to shove wokeism down the throats of the American people. TikTok videos of a young man playing dress-up won’t get us out of this recruitment crisis. We need tactics that will recruit a generation of strong leaders who are willing to fight for this country.
---
| | |
---
| | **Taking Care Of Tennessee Veterans**🇺🇸****
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQY6exlCh6seJwktFU-XHuoVrNmuXTr2XzsMiL-BTxzFrpte6owCJWOmconQytEP8nr2PmUe2A1ZDAA7h05LZk7RdP0TWHEZyc1ToT3B0ywkK53SDwkJaRYG4bwAOneGv0n-a-SnXCPx0GOByXNYDE6lXz2N7jIHCYJ7ERZNyMDph4Cw9U0x8nJ3AHKcJQMrFI2Hy5ebMgsfPjih_9Prp3Y74VmL_-e8625u8OHJHvGvCXIeO4AHrimKo7hH0JosWGzl8w33hUAgGKW4Hyaqq2Jlb15LjVXRYCOSFtxOl4tPhTzw0SuUxxMFH5w-bxvPO7w%3D%3D)
---
| | There’s nothing I love more than seeing people take care of veterans who selflessly gave so much to our country, and Tennessee folks are always stepping up in new ways. Wild Birds Unlimited of Knoxville recently [donated 32 bird feeders](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQY6exlCh6seJwktFU-XHuoVrNmuXTr2XzsMiL-BTxzFrpte6owCJWOmconQytEP8nr2PmUe2A1ZDAA7h05LZk7RdP0TWHEZyc1ToT3B0ywkK53SDwkJaRYG4bwAOneGv0n-a-SnXCPx0GOByXNYDE6lXz2N7jIHCYJ7ERZNyMDphVTUv23IpSBzjdFRKAo1nNDELwyCo4SVPs7r4MgUWLI90hun5RtQ-JwYF_z36_ribOcw4OQ0H9zgp9DzVKz2xut2f6XvU-uxV8YSrO3A8NHxcgTUq7Uoc4_PigkQbljtAZliFkNGUzELastMv6otJsQ%3D%3D) and bags of bird seed to Ben Atchley Tennessee State Veterans Nursing Home. The idea was born out of [research](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQVAftviQPPgc2BT2ORlVlsGrfBiSsKciAeorWH3zAn6IMRxIWNvI2Txfy0fEHQThjrJnJ3QsQw33Z_NJQT-DV_3I8HU7uLn-AQh7QaYrCOYhrwD1sSNicbcSaj87UtQKugIXRtFuIbKU4BU_f9jwNjMj2Tg26fGcub1wRbWxx9h1Ciw6npAy7S2pZpfEDs1xHNw-Q-WBE91FP9Wb7WZ0QkE%3D) that shows a link between the number of birds you see in a day and lower levels of depression, anxiety, and stress. Tiffany Hamlin, manager of Wild Birds Unlimited, has a heart for veterans and organized this incredible effort. Whether they’re sitting in the courtyard or simply gazing out the window, the veterans say they’re enjoying every moment with birds nearby. Hamlin hopes this will be a year-round effort to keep the feeders stocked, so if you’d like to help, [visit Wild Birds Unlimited](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e9150d3fa1024fea83bcd2791b31b712&_e=paPCZ0Gw0hLvCNiP1tawQSePGMzsN1jePYJ5JefvzgIfIO4o37508inGDGrpL-e4Ab3Tnb0n21DeNjDF5sRiY8o3frE1rD_xn1sl0woox9Ysnw8huhWjKiZL169FaZJiyK2GpCNb8OXOBgYtfc5f0a4D365XqYpuOBBRdlIoWuUfEaM8bIwqzgk5QVMY04yFFSvCdE5hzTO-5kavKV2oIQ%3D%3D) and make a purchase to donate.

What do terrorists and the communists in China think when they see this tomfoolery? I assume they’re laughing until they’re in stitches. Noteworthy veterans are —and I don’t blame them. We need tactics that will recruit a generation of strong leaders who are willing to fight for this country. | | | | | Taking Care Of Tennessee Veterans🇺🇸** | | There’s nothing I love more than seeing people take care of veterans who selflessly gave so much to our country, and Tennessee folks are always stepping up in new ways. Wild Birds Unlimited of Knoxville recently and bags of bird seed to Ben Atchley Tennessee State Veterans Nursing Home. The idea was born out of that shows a link between the number of birds you see in a day and lower levels of depression, anxiety, and stress. Tiffany Hamlin, manager of Wild Birds Unlimited, has a heart for veterans and organized this incredible effort. Whether they’re sitting in the courtyard or simply gazing out the window, the veterans say they’re enjoying every moment with birds nearby. Hamlin hopes this will be a year-round effort to keep the feeders stocked, so if you’d like to help, and make a purchase to donate. | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → All play, no bull 🐂 ()→ Never too old to ride 🏍️ ()→ Good old fashioned food fight 🌭 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

Sheriff Lamb here with a few thoughts on the crisis at the southern border.

President Biden announced earlier this week that he’s sending 1,500 federal troops to the U.S.-Mexico border. I have some thoughts on this, **namely that it didn’t have to come to this.**

The sad part about Biden deploying federal troops to the border is that they’re powerless to help border patrol agents make arrests or process illegal migrants.

We have the facilities to house migrants who break the law, **but they’re sitting empty**.

We have the resources to erect barriers to keep those who want to jump the border at bay, **but they’re rotting in warehouses in the desert.**

As a border-state Democrat, my opponent, Kyrsten Sinema, should be the leading advocate in Washington for border patrol agents and homeland security personnel. Instead, she’s training for marathons and racking up bills dining out in San Francisco, Barcelona, Paris, and Miami. It’s anyone’s guess when Ms. Sinema will tune in – **she has more than $9 million in her campaign accounts, enough to fund her high-flying lifestyle until Election Day and beyond.**

**It's too bad Ms. Sinema doesn’t call it quits and donate the money to the Department of Homeland Security; with $9 million, we could hire 169 new border patrol agents. **

I think Democrats in Washington can – and should – be doing more. But I want to know what conservatives like you think. **Will you do me a quick favor and fill out my border security questionnaire today?** Your participation will be so helpful as we move this Senate campaign forward.

[**SHERIFF LAMB'S BORDER SECURITY SURVEY
BEGIN HERE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ce12ab9cbe6d4f509ced3fbfdb71813a&_e=0Ce7uRDqOeeav7ad3ZSN8D6bBBXwOn7we6REJ8WGsDBJprxTICBrdQWqLeS_IjKnbk3HinnFlI_MAIvK8NOydPx8yCiLMJEpI26Wew6_e7iFeQU3-whkVwQgLOnqf2IwEAmhxwLv3S8is4dPXN2XTRzqEpLs6rgX5_ABfuYyQHFCLIkdp58CT79FVqSeNr5Wj7N_jhQqE0LcVWFy7Wucsomm3xdOK2AlTZZB1FTpM14CRVg-4VqpIni-sNu1xG3ZQm2XDSRJwHD9Ij08TauG6MVf4y2I9IubgKbzVYMrqb0rySRDGdzVq-HlQnMJWwq0tn9Mx6GUzgxWs7AJBezUoN1N530YYtfYBAadoBwjxiVfcUMBJw0ZHeV06wr_AgbnTcHhKrhogxHF1Ra54_58h-zJ0WnM1drBl_DWzocN16AsdRbLU4PfAlwtng-jZWgf)
My team and I are reaching out to concerned Americans because **the only way to defeat Democrats and remove them from positions of power is at the ballot box**. When the president of the United States is more concerned about visiting Ireland than he is about visiting the southern border, you know we have a problem.

I’ve said this before and meant it – **and I’m repeating it right now:** as a law enforcement official, the crisis at the border DEEPLY concerns me. There is virtually no way to track the migrants once they enter the United States. Period. We simply don’t have the capacity to handle the influx.

**President Biden knows it. Kamala Harris knows it. And My Democrat opponent certainly knows it**. But none of these folks cared enough about securing the border while we had time on our side. With time having run out, the President is being forced to send federal troops to the border to aid our Border Patrol agents. Shameful.
**

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. body:
Get yours early
#
Big news, Derek.
With President Biden and Vice President Harris officially running for re-election, we wanted to offer up something special for our top supporters.
Take a look at the first run of our Veterans and Military Families for Biden Harris products.
[](https://shop.votevets.org/collections/veterans-and-military-families-for-biden-harris?utm_source=actionkit&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden&utm_id=230505-1?refcode=em230505-1-15)
To get this started, we’re offering up stickers, buttons, and mugs. We’ll add more products soon — yard signs, shirts, the works — but if you’re ready to show your support already, now’s the time.

The team at VoteVets

Peter, ever since he set his eyes on the presidency, **Ron DeSantis has been on the warpath.**

Whether it’s policing elections more than any other state, sneakily enacting hardcore restrictions on abortion access, or acting like Black history isn’t American history, he’s made it pretty clear what kind of country a DeSantis-run America would be.

**In all honesty, Peter, we’re _terrified_ of what that might look like.**

[Are you as terrified as we are of an America where Ron DeSantis is president? Fill out this quick survey and tell us what you think:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkLVFMWNzQGzW9bir0UANAZSQCg_E14b8RS-312wFzPESnwXsx1IRYn4CN1K-XPvj9hKNXjuMzZliUQ6YUxLGnDs0mHNqFD7xUYlF9NlS7AcyBUnro4kebpnHJYjLUymqhL9lr7IoQ03REEbnfkGks5XnPLYufgJ5czcEWHcgxPo2gPynnOKI68Ky9WcdWLP9F_VIOKgBzEv0OOZsex8JZ1wAgE6IlPNO_tUXPf3lWeacAty6ar739k0EScE0kO2XcPOLmK1okusAhf1z_lx9jEBH5SM-MyQrXX1JraHVbUK8JCryK0IsVYkaEJK0VvTLKv3cXP2DlCZC7fpd8MdrCWGSOrbnF67KAwO6G_kchHB8v2zP9ujhY2hzKtoleOYhzBGav7kzxwNjNB8Et8T1Hz3PIZuAXgac-hj3wVFsjicOR5cLx0uIfojJia76OfTMs/3vx/mdJyKKZFSt6cU0VVqOEERA/h4/_Ohq9EqAQfRs_mGFbxyJSxRdQHWY3f-0qx0EFHdm-4Q)
