[**SHERIFF LAMB'S BORDER SECURITY SURVEY
BEGIN HERE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=06c4f6b6bea84b02b7daf474f60c8bc6&_e=sWcvSheC-RibYdef-3EP-AMThgSIPYY664uCFxoTqah2xrwSKlcY-0qzZrtepxl6oz4sZ1g9oTsYOnMBIHWiPoC7JiDHq9YSRTR4VPeWGA5KQdZpH0HvJs7es32ZDmFiSkguZYftKWKu2dDhC5Oh6p7VGy9gftU2gpjiVZ3di6DEHR-dfLgQB_9H47X-nrXM4AFiPDtBEsqSf-UAKpRbvaWgGliKFxs3edswPdvZ8Ll3vcupe_g67-18gvcQ4q8IffB8b4Gf9F_6thJfMx7OYkZcwHS8BYAlpJHH1h0K22lipe6WaJrSHv6hc9nUjQ9F1mVpR9AvLGjPOGQgwmhlbIXaDu4dlM-PJLEm_3Sz6rj5yTBSlnGS97PVuGk0OI4O4bcbNs09P8LB-BHPS0zz5K0g4aqeTR3pnK0G1UB8d0o%3D)

Sheriff Lamb here with a few thoughts on the crisis at the southern border.

President Biden announced earlier this week that he’s sending 1,500 federal troops to the U.S.-Mexico border. I have some thoughts on this, **namely that it didn’t have to come to this.**

The sad part about Biden deploying federal troops to the border is that they’re powerless to help border patrol agents make arrests or process illegal migrants.

We have the facilities to house migrants who break the law, **but they’re sitting empty**.

We have the resources to erect barriers to keep those who want to jump the border at bay, **but they’re rotting in warehouses in the desert.**

As a border-state Democrat, my opponent, Kyrsten Sinema, should be the leading advocate in Washington for border patrol agents and homeland security personnel. Instead, she’s training for marathons and racking up bills dining out in San Francisco, Barcelona, Paris, and Miami. It’s anyone’s guess when Ms. Sinema will tune in – **she has more than $9 million in her campaign accounts, enough to fund her high-flying lifestyle until Election Day and beyond.**

**It's too bad Ms. Sinema doesn’t call it quits and donate the money to the Department of Homeland Security; with $9 million, we could hire 169 new border patrol agents. **

I think Democrats in Washington can – and should – be doing more. But I want to know what conservatives like you think. **Will you do me a quick favor and fill out my border security questionnaire today?** Your participation will be so helpful as we move this Senate campaign forward.

[**SHERIFF LAMB'S BORDER SECURITY SURVEY
BEGIN HERE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=06c4f6b6bea84b02b7daf474f60c8bc6&_e=sWcvSheC-RibYdef-3EP-AMThgSIPYY664uCFxoTqah2xrwSKlcY-0qzZrtepxl6oz4sZ1g9oTsYOnMBIHWiPoC7JiDHq9YSRTR4VPeWGA5KQdZpH0HvJs7es32ZDmFiSkguZYftKWKu2dDhC5Oh6p7VGy9gftU2gpjiVZ3di6DEHR-dfLgQB_9H47X-nrXM4AFiPDtBEsqSf-UAKpRbvaWgGliKFxs3edswPdvZ8Ll3vcupe_g67-18gvcQ4q8IffB8b4Gf9F_6thJfMx7OYuJ6ejJTXcZip5IAHZXPIjnxHe6Hj6d7_zMoaKJ7FrfXIPN5bo3ImYvrk5o3T3Gz_FE820E3JMjK3yDe2_IQcvPXG1F2Q6SpvD8dcvIbOd4bW1dQLHfnmFNV8GTd-5vihtQW7PKdVXkMC5SjHuZkSRE%3D)
My team and I are reaching out to concerned Americans because **the only way to defeat Democrats and remove them from positions of power is at the ballot box**. When the president of the United States is more concerned about visiting Ireland than he is about visiting the southern border, you know we have a problem.

I’ve said this before and meant it – **and I’m repeating it right now:** as a law enforcement official, the crisis at the border DEEPLY concerns me. There is virtually no way to track the migrants once they enter the United States. Period. We simply don’t have the capacity to handle the influx.

**President Biden knows it. Kamala Harris knows it. And My Democrat opponent certainly knows it**. But none of these folks cared enough about securing the border while we had time on our side. With time having run out, the President is being forced to send federal troops to the border to aid our Border Patrol agents. Shameful.
**
[Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me and my team today. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=06c4f6b6bea84b02b7daf474f60c8bc6&_e=sWcvSheC-RibYdef-3EP-AMThgSIPYY664uCFxoTqah2xrwSKlcY-0qzZrtepxl6oz4sZ1g9oTsYOnMBIHWiPoC7JiDHq9YSRTR4VPeWGA5KQdZpH0HvJs7es32ZDmFiSkguZYftKWKu2dDhC5Oh6p7VGy9gftU2gpjiVZ3di6DEHR-dfLgQB_9H47X-nrXM4AFiPDtBEsqSf-UAKpRbvaWgGliKFxs3edswPdvZ8Ll3vcupe_g67-18gvcQ4q8IffB8b4Gf9F_6thJfMx7OYqPBWcCZuA0fBRs5nG7xRGJYgBmo-rRVdKZgpY5bsLl-MNRKSS4FPreKMisIl6b7zRQocoro8j4JPwsagdyCB-3Kyy8P-trH9rU7zv-xL3te-pe-0zxPa-sFsK95HTa5v3NgZ9TxriY1krS911i9m5o%3D) **

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Democrats from local office to the Oval Office are counting on this team to help defeat Republicans at the ballot box. | | Derek, now that President Biden and Vice President Harris have announced their reelection campaign, we need to do our part to secure four more years for Joe and Kamala. Democrats from local office to the Oval Office are counting on this team to help strengthen the DNC’s electoral infrastructure so we can defeat Republicans at the ballot box. Campaigns up and down the ballot rely on the DNC for voter protection services, access to our continuously-updated and ever-growing voter file, and on-the-ground organizing to get folks out to vote and ensure every vote is counted. | Peter,

Gun safety champions are passing life-saving gun legislation.

**Washington →** Banned the purchase of new assault weapons.

**Colorado →** Raised the legal age to purchase a firearm from 18 to 21

**Maryland →** The state legislature passed a bill prohibiting individuals from transporting firearms near schools and restaurants.

When we elect gun safety prevention champions, we save lives.

Stop Gun Violence PAC is investing $1 million into races across the country to pass life-saving gun legislation. Hey Peter, There are many issues affecting Northern Michigan and Upper Peninsula families – finding (and affording) reliable childcare, access to good-paying jobs, job training, and the rising cost of... well, everything. Knowing where to start is key to this campaign! **[That’s why we want to hear from you. Will you take 3 minutes to share your opinion on the issues that matter most to you and your family? From: Callie for Congress
Sent: April 13, 2023
Subject line: Will you take our launch survey?
While Jack Bergman treats Congress like a retirement hobby, families in Northern Michigan are struggling to get by.
**Earlier this month, Callie Barr announced she’s running for Congress because we deserve a representative FROM Northern Michigan who has lived our experiences.**
When Callie’s husband Matt came back from war with a brain injury, she had to juggle being a caretaker, mom of two, and breadwinner. As she stretched a household budget in a breaking economy, she kept finding that “resources” for veterans weren’t actually accessible for many. So she stepped up as an advocate for military families, and now, as a candidate for Congress.
But this campaign is about so much more than Callie’s story — it’s about __all__ of our stories. To fight for Michigan in Congress, she needs to know what keeps _you_ up at night. name: Working Families Party
subject: Your May WFP Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We’re so excited to share what we’ve been up to in our fight to build a country where everyone can thrive. | | | **This is your WFP May Newsletter, and we’re so excited to share what we’ve been up to lately in our fight to build a country where everyone can thrive.** Read on to learn how WFP members like you are making a difference and for ways to get involved this month.
* * *
**_May Elections Update_** **Coming off of April’s major wins in Chicago and Wisconsin, WFP supporters and activists are working hard to elect champions for working people in Pennsylvania, Texas, and Colorado.** This month, we are throwing down for dozens of candidates in municipal primaries and judicial races in Pennsylvania, including Helen Gym for Mayor of Philadelphia and Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County Executive! **[The Philadelphia Inquirer](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOtQ-fJkzV5RTNGeuO94QgQWnVOTxhXxjtO7zZmlqMK2UnDX9CLNOcMU2Z1yHye7CEe9t81uh77Vl6Zv4co0l-Re3rf5aBQ4ATwD5K3FZccYK2gTlWnVSoSXHh9CeSQqIOkdvohFKPdeql6Rvh0BRh1uWE7LiBxEVH0sTzBn-sRzsDiDog8Nl8HH2QmLMUitzBrjZNE7F_I1oAgAyGSUA0M5HxBQFaI5QrXY2wwbgimOQTKFE5_3ucjMxuHH2deDn1rp47Fil2Kk9LtKw5c6reAQL1hejkPY0TryQJgTBTbGM9UppAiUucXtRgoQweGUUQ/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h0/zTmBMzxUqkm88L8pJj_Pfsf_D3ZU2yH0VEqM2eTWTfg) wrote about the state of the mayoral race and our movement’s work to elect truly progressive representatives:** “Gym remains strongly positioned. She was endorsed by the Philadelphia Federation of Teachers, and is backed by a coalition of well-organized progressive groups. **Among them is the Working Families Party, which has teamed up with four other organizations to knock on about 300,000 doors to boost Gym.” — that’s more than the number of people who voted in 2019’s mayoral election.** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOtQ-fJkzV5RTNGeuO94QgQWnVOTxhXxjtO7zZmlqMK2UnDX9CLNOcMU2Z1yHye7CEe9t81uh77Vl6Zv4co0l-Re3rf5aBQ4ATwD5K3FZccYfwnXwdbvZCs6Lne1sHllJMysrr3gnZJMVCdHXxihv9fqdRPfq9j3X0uErlXcdTKY2uE0ZxBCUO9ctZXAixmOUlYkXF09SwJb_lo5pm6kVShIZZRLrGW883hrOpLsg1KmHSHscqi6PPgxgo6Hk7WU7n_5thaZbOV4MRts7gVqPh_SfEj3TvX4TMBNMUAOAJExk7ZN1Bc196oW0pKh4R6Pkg/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h1/JsfYhAzynBIMwcayrVqlV4pkMgTu164yEGPnVpRxw6Y) In **Allegheny County,** **[we’re supporting Sara Innamorato’s campaign for good jobs, safe communities, and housing for all with a $261,000 ad buy](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDXlIOIDb87sIaR6qPCpTWdGxvxxTc0uL0Okg7tdxSqQ7E1hJoQBgMz7j0Yw35CCdC0OInwN80KxMe8oFA6XJkdXxKxHT_Go4z63zsDCVBJRtPBWUs3eQ-LhLBCI9pIEgT3dJIkPUNJf_3Hhzwq8qKazyREBH8gapf8PAOd9l3MXX3SJvefM4yFOr0XR_42_GhGEdS0YLSrBkrXp-LokJtT3itQdg8ELQ79h_gG4gFZmPEI0YSPpoDVBv2Q5z94J804-jDV8bkSI9IJUKfcXkRUVjY1gEZGAB0_fkuRF-bhLqWgEM9lNo7msEikd3eJosC9pzjvVXX-DVs9FZjFYCVYTEnWT6lmgkuVRveLV85CK4laIiBputdbv5gAsWvVFmg/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h2/GhiYckfQAjloYYZuYKTe_nxojTK-Q99mbaKw0a4KEME)** — helping spread her message to voters in a competitive six-way race. In **Texas,** we’re getting out the vote for eight amazing candidates and two ballot measures — **[one of which is on the ballot alongside a bad-faith measure designed with the same name and nearly identical language to deceive voters and reduce police oversight.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/oZT1C-8NKsWHlAiWATd-7M6Ya3b40-3At44dM4f5s8Itg_CfAL69t33B--CFi4oMUMG1R6kPAvj4l2-x8yVb-J7JnEdJfrQXAa11yWlhpKqt-kkXBJ9ce7MbbgmbaPfH2MQcGU7S8O0VQqJvqB24Iq6F8eD7tgynitotgDZTR3n5d260yCH3xf9PM0-d34wF0qrFNQEHhfwv2dNmiU3FdcaxvVsgOnNaLjSlpf44TkTrdZW7Qo78kdACy5j7ImrK/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h3/pPliRI69hPJAmGjvrNVBgsn6IaoyRqTpLsA5S32YDEI)**
And in **Denver,** we’re preparing for June runoffs after a strong showing last month that convinced [**local news site 5280 to name the WFP in their list of “Winners” of the primary elections.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDjJN-mFhMml2ouvWfcI7ZdzP3f_VJVTRJVqHI5nMLVyo9rORt6_JwpLXaAZolsUFIV_kh3H2rY6SHbIw0ydZ62921gJ8vtXKyf5IuXXEg9ui3_vbmd5n5TuqLUZcMfH99-kSNQGDyFsiZg2ZP2hZE-kgkiyFTIx-RajYUru9dsarW-32lsWeQrd4n73kfGdOvIHd7S81hXFLwtTqVUwAJdHP7J2-WanWXSF1NM1HiJPkm9aUJP-aKmyQviO-7QWpzoprXNpb5xtV07Wb70CiHr6V-J_1bGAiJg8oF809EO7/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h4/0AJFUmZJq40ewTphPNcWyKPC6emJhSZ1AJSmSZGe-nw)
* * *
**_California Working Families Party to Host Forum with Senate Candidates Barbara Lee and Katie Porter_** With a U.S. Senate seat opening up in California next year, working families have a chance to have a major impact on this race — and on what progressives nationwide are able to accomplish for the next decade. **The California Working Families Party is excited to host a virtual U.S. Senate Forum featuring Representatives Barbara Lee and Katie Porter on Thursday, May 11th at 6pm PT!** The CAWFP Senate Forum will be held **[virtually via Zoom](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQx4Y-6N365BGtpKGrmd_U4eI_IpR44wrwDYrJQJPUK1FlhmGyafAct8acOQed6Fpf9famLa2b08ppy-pPL3lpYnhmlDjLLgbWIDapAUg8JhxfRhJ3AMXFroMR9kcbbUTBMNKqarHmcgQa5nk4_QXV15Txex9c2XsX-ZDvvfa3cJvWReRGAeZhPMA3Qtetuj147faMI462baYYTHfF-K4bnZWaL3uitVl-1MHSyge3L5qw/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h5/9dsEfJ1dOdHe2RFYRhk-Yglb6orBKSlqKRVgGvgF1Z0)** and broadcast to numerous **[watch parties](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLlrcVi5cIcc26YPAdNO7wIAQU9WIskpIqPm3oPsJxmiTBWy6Tt_pEjGbp0nSIvjxAdFuLuFs3GiaT1zn5lyaSrkBfF4eht1lhW6FtxJCd2bT1lMUb-zV0xg2JdeVmTTZx5YH01bFdf-h_VI2AEKmNLNns43vVwckCnzryMJDslpoGaLgya3uXiFxu-1p1132D2QQxHa80y6sEbkteWaGVsgixgNtJeBaSd5pvRye5xrhw/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h6/UAZxdT_VjyYIaJmZ_6n8ZzX_j1zR2Xdpe9SCtjNGgMY)** across the state. This election is a monumental and historic one. You won’t want to miss it! [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLlrcVi5cIcc26YPAdNO7wIAQU9WIskpIqPm3oPsJxmiTBWy6Tt_pEjGbp0nSIvjxAfaz7Dcwz9H2CtFtZv9-fynj9FbUIy0uvIJpDp--x52G1gczMt1EtRZ0zpJ0xDgNp2uj0xnob-olNCRdU2cUfIdwcYHPro-6WhY2m85r_ZvADyfTV6gij59YZce_QeA6c_ygj2CuCclfx0yasOSjNVIsy7PJf367QMzeF6cZkUKzg/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h7/ZQczQHxIOiK61G_uIkgRbUhtrUaLXYFQMEzsSbEQotQ) **[Join us for the CAWFP Senate Form](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLlrcVi5cIcc26YPAdNO7wIAQU9WIskpIqPm3oPsJxmiTBWy6Tt_pEjGbp0nSIvjxAcY4mmcIJ-V2c5e9R_jay36PhWdlAzoS8E5m41DgrR_zIr4yrK8y07xIP24A3ZvZGjhNFpvlgjVIMkcb5ZPVGDqJEaXlk29za_9sXqfh6p-Txo7n58FTQvYsbcYlkCF7Wzt1XDEPMfGEyzO2Nvfc5R6cy03uaMRCSMNzi72iwvRFA/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h8/ZHTPTIJqLkvhz597fl1wRCRzO0ZUyAth8t_sbXhyh4c)**
* * *
**_WFP Activism Wins in New York_** When Governor Kathy Hochul nominated anti-worker, anti-abortion, and anti-racial justice Judge Hector LaSalle for New York’s Chief Judgeship earlier this year, the NYWFP and allies sprung into action to gather thousands of signatures and letters opposing the pick. After a historic battle, the State Senate voted down the nomination. **And last month, Governor Hochul made a new nomination — progressive Judge Rowan Wilson![NYWFP’s State Director Sochie Nnaemeka celebrated the choice, saying:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGohqB2WfoKdp1WrdA7MEL_wcwDJJcjP0oPHbEsk55JbD-wZ_HNqC-rE1mSyFrP6SQa5xy7h-T7NlBrz0YK1LnC72yG6ymd8jgr0DPaff3cK-TPbz8BrIB4WN9Xc2ohtSDZ-2f3Ms70ydmdAgiLYBlZcOD_VlGuD_lKKk7bsbxyB3YJYZHDHSTj_bDeioFn-YUcjYW3YbghaHyAO-kzVUpniL-uZbnNePGjavSKO8szXn64a5EFifj44c5nNPC0VF-1zyPc6KCG5xs6c_-hcaB02s_ulMRWhgftrqsbIaHoQYLjYGkp_OHto1rvt8m6B8bERutyzI80-rElXzAzT_GXPpME4Olm4GZQ8DwNNgnbP/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h9/3298f8JrMaJLHS3Ym7W4nm6uwmKe0YJcDWAnd4bfAnY)** “Judge Wilson has a proven record of standing up for and defending the rights of workers, those who have been wrongfully convicted, and people impacted by gun violence.” **While the state budget finalized early this week[fails to tackle the affordability crisis and rolls back civil rights protections, we were able to secure some important wins for our democracy and our communities](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhir8B8AjSHZlY78OoDNcwi_ex6OC-WecjdvjhNDVQEZmS6brj445SwOXwJRDDSXySSExvTlV8LqPdxSZHD5ezZsk4_D2gMZ049jXH808_bvfA23pZwFmGo52XATTxHMd0lLZ_K57jSgPTQEPimQGE2la2C0Nn3nq872FC48gRRHZ_ywxyB46nM0hR9wPCfP1N2I9pF9BZX-Io6dUuUB3nGliD9RX2_1LLaFupWzFhBVWeznd6b-lZZscNC-uKA4TWJIsnuiGHOtJ34sxQyADQOg/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h10/wE-3bTtXfo_RGiFf0xAEdn7l24j49vd-Q5ygRB_KJsI) **including start-up funding for New York's public financing program, the inclusion of key elements of the Build Public Renewables Act, a gas ban on new construction, and a nominal increase to the state's minimum wage. Lastly, we're saying goodbye to New York Working Families Party State Director Sochie Nnaemeka as she leaves her role to welcome her second child! Sochie has masterfully led the NYWFP since 2019, ensuring that the organization not only survived attacks from bad actors like Andrew Cuomo, but grew and thrived. **[Read the full profile and interview in The Nation to learn more about what the NYWFP has accomplished under Sochie’s leadership.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHHC0Ua0BhcIDtkW8zPZpTWcQC7COIYpSW4VvrrHX3Qs2MjDmyAfr8ViBfKis67fAkCbifl4cci7vrI4llRNl9oVYYOGxHtNv7LMxRcIEnd1r3O_8cdShZcGGKg-PrTk5ynl9hUu5Sgj-xyEIEigIyl3Wl9eFWEPrJ07c4eRpAKCUXl2WCDK17erMVChMGpEN0ozwr8qIhvUYpxtrHbvfCCUBWG32J5qlfjlDdL7V1a3cx4d9U72pzJRVzm6w2txq-V15xEebfzO4qmXZiK21b9k4ls-V17ZBZ9DjufY_12t/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h11/876WYnfMbHpXCUV8BMRIB1Jxj64niC5c-SwHo59gp3E)**
* * *
**_Celebrating International Workers Day_** May 1 marks International Workers Day, or May Day, a celebration of radical working class solidarity and protests for workers’ rights. **The story of May Day in the U.S. started 137 years ago with nationwide strikes, a bomb thrown, conspiracy trials, and more.** **[Read the full story here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqichjwdBzp7heLyaeUXg70AL9Va0OvIQh-7sjpujtQ9GcFHY101cT-8rhd48sE9N70bDYDoerq7L7hh6p3mcx3dwsuqzMP2SfEiVgF2vwybPvcxyctdrdnZHEGC0ynjUmw28mdiQ_QW0xcL8FGNbCjDW2ikJ3k6g6aFInpLC2iZujiKYbPSX4TRSbcJfOctfMNVPII3SQR-8ITP9H1-iyyNwVIaBsCztP19BoEJx6gYRI/3vx/me_MOr5xRNWUCvDCg3OhCg/h12/V0qCG3gktSOhrLd_pAOlBXzNHuDgX0rQ4tdo2rVWHvg)**
* * *
**_Spotlight on WFP Member Nathanael Honoré_** I grew up in New York, which is a fusion voting state, so WFP was always on the ballot, but I didn’t learn about the party’s goals and electoral strategy until high school. WFP is the first organization that I’ve volunteered with. I frequently appear on The Political Mike, a current events news podcast, but I’d been wanting to get more involved with grassroots advocacy, and WFP offered me the space and ability to do that. As a volunteer, I am a reply specialist and builder with the text team. I also work with the Spanish text team to translate messages for Latino voters. I’ve learned just how much goes into creating the texts we send and how necessary it is to be able to work together quickly to make sure voters are well informed and aren’t scared away from voting for progressive candidates. I’ve appreciated how many opportunities I’ve been given to work with leaders of the text team. I haven’t been able to build relationships yet, but there’s plenty of time and opportunity to do so. One opportunity is with the study group, where I’ve been able to hear different perspectives from members around the country. I am a dues-paying member. I think it’s important to back up what I believe. Since I support the WFP’s central goal of empowering working people, I should do what I can to make those goals a reality, and that means paying dues to financially support the WFP’s operations.
* * *

clean_body: We’re so excited to share what we’ve been up to in our fight to build a country where everyone can thrive. | | | This is your WFP May Newsletter, and we’re so excited to share what we’ve been up to lately in our fight to build a country where everyone can thrive. Read on to learn how WFP members like you are making a difference and for ways to get involved this month. May Elections Update Coming off of April’s major wins in Chicago and Wisconsin, WFP supporters and activists are working hard to elect champions for working people in Pennsylvania, Texas, and Colorado. This month, we are throwing down for dozens of candidates in municipal primaries and judicial races in Pennsylvania, including Helen Gym for Mayor of Philadelphia and Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County Executive! wrote about the state of the mayoral race and our movement’s work to elect truly progressive representatives: “Gym remains strongly positioned. She was endorsed by the Philadelphia Federation of Teachers, and is backed by a coalition of well-organized progressive groups. Among them is the Working Families Party, which has teamed up with four other organizations to knock on about 300,000 doors to boost Gym.” — that’s more than the number of people who voted in 2019’s mayoral election. In Allegheny County, — helping spread her message to voters in a competitive six-way race. In Texas, we’re getting out the vote for eight amazing candidates and two ballot measures — And in Denver, we’re preparing for June runoffs after a strong showing last month that convinced California Working Families Party to Host Forum with Senate Candidates Barbara Lee and Katie Porter With a U.S. Senate seat opening up in California next year, working families have a chance to have a major impact on this race — and on what progressives nationwide are able to accomplish for the next decade. The California Working Families Party is excited to host a virtual U.S. Senate Forum featuring Representatives Barbara Lee and Katie Porter on Thursday, May 11th at 6pm PT! The CAWFP Senate Forum will be held and broadcast to numerous across the state. This election is a monumental and historic one. You won’t want to miss it! WFP Activism Wins in New York When Governor Kathy Hochul nominated anti-worker, anti-abortion, and anti-racial justice Judge Hector LaSalle for New York’s Chief Judgeship earlier this year, the NYWFP and allies sprung into action to gather thousands of signatures and letters opposing the pick. After a historic battle, the State Senate voted down the nomination. And last month, Governor Hochul made a new nomination — progressive Judge Rowan Wilson “Judge Wilson has a proven record of standing up for and defending the rights of workers, those who have been wrongfully convicted, and people impacted by gun violence.” While the state budget finalized early this week including start-up funding for New York's public financing program, the inclusion of key elements of the Build Public Renewables Act, a gas ban on new construction, and a nominal increase to the state's minimum wage. Lastly, we're saying goodbye to New York Working Families Party State Director Sochie Nnaemeka as she leaves her role to welcome her second child! Sochie has masterfully led the NYWFP since 2019, ensuring that the organization not only survived attacks from bad actors like Andrew Cuomo, but grew and thrived. Celebrating International Workers Day May 1 marks International Workers Day, or May Day, a celebration of radical working class solidarity and protests for workers’ rights. The story of May Day in the U.S. started 137 years ago with nationwide strikes, a bomb thrown, conspiracy trials, and more. Spotlight on WFP Member Nathanael Honoré I grew up in New York, which is a fusion voting state, so WFP was always on the ballot, but I didn’t learn about the party’s goals and electoral strategy until high school. WFP is the first organization that I’ve volunteered with. I frequently appear on The Political Mike, a current events news podcast, but I’d been wanting to get more involved with grassroots advocacy, and WFP offered me the space and ability to do that. As a volunteer, I am a reply specialist and builder with the text team. I also work with the Spanish text team to translate messages for Latino voters. I’ve learned just how much goes into creating the texts we send and how necessary it is to be able to work together quickly to make sure voters are well informed and aren’t scared away from voting for progressive candidates. I’ve appreciated how many opportunities I’ve been given to work with leaders of the text team. I haven’t been able to build relationships yet, but there’s plenty of time and opportunity to do so. One opportunity is with the study group, where I’ve been able to hear different perspectives from members around the country. I am a dues-paying member. I think it’s important to back up what I believe. Since I support the WFP’s central goal of empowering working people, I should do what I can to make those goals a reality, and that means paying dues to financially support the WFP’s operations. Upcoming Events On Saturday, May 20, join WFP members old and new for our monthly Welcome Gathering! On the call, you’ll have the chance to meet people who share your vision of a world where we can thrive, and not just survive — and learn how you can get involved in making that vision a reality. In May’s edition of the WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution, we’ll be discussing Disability Visibility: First-Person Stories from the Twenty-First Century, edited by Alice Wong. As a group, we’ll talk about what the book means for our work and how we can grow a more inclusive movement for everyone. Help get out the vote for Helen Gym for Mayor of Philadelphia at our Tuesday Text Party on May 9 at 6 PM ET! Whether you’re a first-time texter or an experienced pro, you can make a real difference by sharing our message with voters and let them know about the WFP champions on their ballot. Thanks for catching up with us! As we work hard to get out the vote in our May and June elections, we need your support to keep up the fight. Thank you, All of us at the Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Peter,

Last month, I wrote to you about the GOP’s plan to cut food assistance programs for low-income Americans as part of their legislation to raise the debt ceiling and pay our nation’s bills.

Then they passed a dangerous and partisan bill last week that would cut jobs, raise prices, slash programs that support our seniors, and more — or they’ll force America to default on our bills, causing economic calamity. [Moments like this are reminders of why it’s so important that we take back the House next year. Will you chip in $10 or any amount today to help us win in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62867165/404813582/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230505_FR_1.1_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_debtceiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWU1NzRjYi04Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fqM1yVefdRlsP-I8ZNIUHIZZIrfejZGSMSsI0XozaRQ=)

If the extreme Republicans get their way, here’s how Rhode Islanders would feel it:
* 253,000 Rhode Islanders would face longer wait times to receive their Social Security and Medicare benefits
* 55,000 Rhode Islanders could lose their Medicaid coverage
* 2,400 Rhode Islanders could see their housing costs go up
* 1,850 clean energy and manufacturing jobs in Rhode Island would disappear

And this is just scratching the surface. That’s why it’s so important that Democrats take back the House next year. When we retake the majority, we can keep working on creating jobs, strengthening our economy, and delivering for all Americans.

[But we need your help to do it. ---
Peter, Last night, North Carolina Republicans passed a 12-week abortion ban, and now it’s on its way to the Governor’s desk. Governor Roy Cooper promised to veto the bill, but Republicans currently hold a supermajority in the state. HOWEVER, it’s not yet clear whether Republicans will be able to get the votes to override the veto. They cannot afford to have a single member fall out of line. Governor Cooper is calling on all of us to apply pressure on the North Carolina Republicans to prevent them from overriding his veto. [_**That’s why we’re calling on you, Peter. We need as many of you as possible to add your name calling on the North Carolina legislature to let the veto stand and protect abortion access in the state. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Trophy hunters are on a violent rampage
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758872?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | You let out a big yawn and reach out to stretch. You’re hungry and exhausted after giving birth and hibernating in your den. As a mama bear, your instinct tells you that spring has arrived, and it’s now time to forage for food to nourish your newborn cubs. As you slowly emerge and make your way through the woods, you think you hear a ruffling of branches. _Maybe it was nothing._ You carry along your way because you know your babies are going to be restless and hungry. You suddenly hear a noise even closer to where it was before, and this time you’re SURE there is movement. You scurry and head back to the den -- but before you can make it, you feel a piercing sensation in your leg that knocks you over. Then another that hits your back and a final one that hits your neck. **They are bullets, and you have been shot by cruel trophy hunters._You cry out in agony, thinking only of your defenseless cubs as you see your own blood pool around you and take your last breath. _** Now orphaned and too weak to fend for themselves, your innocent bear cubs will likely _**die of hypothermia or starvation**_ \-- _if one of the cruel trophy hunters who has just murdered you does not make it to them first. _ **If this story upsets you, then you are not alone. But the sad reality is that grizzly bears across the country are suffering this exact same tragic fate.[The difference is that you are not a bear, and you have the power to STOP ruthless trophy hunters from brutally slaughtering helpless grizzlies. Take action NOW to save innocent grizzly bears from trophy hunters! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758874?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758875?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You might think the story above is dramatic, Friend, but trophy hunters show _**NO MERCY**_ when it comes to getting their kill, and they will indiscriminately massacre mama bears and __**even harmless bear cubs.**__
These sick and vicious bear hunts are **LEGALLY** allowed in several states, and the grizzly population is dwindling rapidly. The only chance these beloved animals have is if the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service steps up -- but it won’t act unless we show strong public support. **That’s why we urgently need 6,702 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. tonight to persuade the agency to ACT NOW. [Will you speak up in defense of voiceless grizzly bears before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758876?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1758875?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting bears,
Friends of the Earth**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Please open this email immediately.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62870354/404815688/823540626?refcode=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcxYzZmMC04ZmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJSYo7RERxrLgrRLZyoh-x_W1rtvqCY4U32Gb-w9W1M=&emci=fca03c23-88eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Just yesterday, Republicans in Raleigh passed an abortion ban that dramatically reduces women’s health care freedom. They pulled out all the stops to push it through without any amendments because they know that it’s exactly the opposite of what the people want. Right-wing politicians say this is a reasonable 12-week ban. **It’s not.** The fine print effectively bans medication abortion at 10 weeks. It requires three in-person clinic visits without any medical justification, and many women can’t afford the time, travel, and money for that — if there are even any clinics left for them to visit at all. The legislation lays out new burdensome and unnecessary requirements that are aimed at causing many clinics to shut their doors. **This bill has nothing to do with making women safer, and everything to do with banning abortion in North Carolina.** _I will veto this awful bill, but I need your help, Peter._ Republican legislators like **Ted Davis** and **Michael Lee** from Wilmington and **John Bradford** and **Tricia Cotham** from Mecklenburg County made campaign promises to protect women’s reproductive health. We only need one Republican in either the House or Senate to help sustain the veto of this dangerous abortion ban and there’s still time for them to keep their promise. All of us who believe in the fundamental right to make our own reproductive choices must now stand together, no matter where we live. **[I urgently need you to join me and demand Republican legislators in NC who vowed to protect reproductive rights sustain my veto. Click here to sign my petition calling on them to hold their word and hold the line>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62870369/404815689/-1236332283?refcode=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcxYzZmMC04ZmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJSYo7RERxrLgrRLZyoh-x_W1rtvqCY4U32Gb-w9W1M=&emci=fca03c23-88eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62870373/404815690/-1236332283?refcode=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzcxYzZmMC04ZmViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJSYo7RERxrLgrRLZyoh-x_W1rtvqCY4U32Gb-w9W1M=&emci=fca03c23-88eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f371c6f0-8feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: Please open this email immediately. | Peter, Just yesterday, Republicans in Raleigh passed an abortion ban that dramatically reduces women’s health care freedom. They pulled out all the stops to push it through without any amendments because they know that it’s exactly the opposite of what the people want. Right-wing politicians say this is a reasonable 12-week ban. It’s not. The fine print effectively bans medication abortion at 10 weeks. It requires three in-person clinic visits without any medical justification, and many women can’t afford the time, travel, and money for that — if there are even any clinics left for them to visit at all. The legislation lays out new burdensome and unnecessary requirements that are aimed at causing many clinics to shut their doors. This bill has nothing to do with making women safer, and everything to do with banning abortion in North Carolina. I will veto this awful bill, but I need your help, Peter. Republican legislators like Ted Davis and Michael Lee from Wilmington and John Bradford and Tricia Cotham from Mecklenburg County made campaign promises to protect women’s reproductive health. We only need one Republican in either the House or Senate to help sustain the veto of this dangerous abortion ban and there’s still time for them to keep their promise. All of us who believe in the fundamental right to make our own reproductive choices must now stand together, no matter where we live. | Thank you for taking action. Together, let’s stop this dangerous abortion ban. Georgia was critical to President Biden’s victory in 2020 and it will be crucial to winning again in 2024. That’s why state Dems need to be in the strongest position possible and WIN later this month. | | |

Georgia Republicans currently control the state House, state Senate, and governorship, meaning they’ve been able to pass restrictive voting laws that have closed polling places, made lines longer, and hurt Democrats' chances at victory.
Not only that but after working to overturn President Biden’s decisive victory in key battleground states, we know that national Republicans are hellbent on making it harder to vote across the country.
**This could spell disaster for Democrats at every level of the ballot – from the state house to the White House – and we need a strong response to stop the GOP in their tracks _right now_ and prevent them from doing any more damage to our democracy. **
[We know we ask a lot of you, but the Georgia election is fast-approaching, and your donation makes an incredible impact. Help state Dems win in Georgia and nationwide by rushing $7 today.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bPBTsRNyt0o-eDBLXFqvNXy_9NgoG2oOggqy7BNaAKxjHTnkfGpK9zpWakLOpcubC8iZtkrW1P7NHBHDspfTlnSjjTVWp0FZWd72J67quh4xTBlHDa-KRgoFeNym56HI-bEi-ghG128F8cCX1o9hlBr82WNcQbCGFB4bFb6rCSbIxVQYBv2pEFdg4amSxF8GbcqsGy-WptqrI-5qwTdr_lY3ZaXd_i0w3smOsYrlfcV_29Osc77mSAJ92K0SZtBo347Iw18yZaEf4Ty9btRggKVjsCeOk-gU8cDSL_3b7Oi2EpeLnkvNLhrZR3H5HLrw1Tt-A84SFq29xcFXLK7BhAZwANANa7o5Ii9AEfbtHpshBEx8VmMefc2SWI_vPxZPeejDaC5CUNJ2o-vce46cnCTShv7oCB0UAQfJ-WVloLlusc6762bOyD6H7W7qtnZ9sLGVdp7HzQXqJVlNfno5u4ypr4Is2hQgnYywzyu_jaSx8IjseO62qDcD-XUMWf_edA/3vx/ISL7NbEaQ3OzT9HhAkOZdg/h6/z1hJwobI_6jBwhZ8ojKkUTlVaQEJXgvg73CujoPTCls)

clean_body: Georgia was critical to President Biden’s victory in 2020 and it will be crucial to winning again in 2024. That’s why state Dems need to be in the strongest position possible and WIN later this month. | | | | | There’s a must-win special election in Georgia in less than two weeks. Georgia was critical to President Biden’s victory in 2020 and it will be crucial to winning again in 2024. That’s why state Dems need to be in the strongest position possible to protect President Biden’s electoral path to victory. It starts with winning this month’s special election. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Georgia Republicans currently control the state House, state Senate, and governorship, meaning they’ve been able to pass restrictive voting laws that have closed polling places, made lines longer, and hurt Democrats' chances at victory. Not only that but after working to overturn President Biden’s decisive victory in key battleground states, we know that national Republicans are hellbent on making it harder to vote across the country. This could spell disaster for Democrats at every level of the ballot – from the state house to the White House – and we need a strong response to stop the GOP in their tracks right now and prevent them from doing any more damage to our democracy. clean_body: I can’t believe it... | Dear Friend... I am so disappointed. Please take 2 minutes to hear my thoughts. As a proud American who fights daily for my country, I am outraged that the Navy has chosen to put forward a drag queen as its first digital ambassador. As an Afghanistan veteran who served in the Navy Reserve for many years, I am infuriated by this woke propaganda. The emphasis on the woke agenda over national security is an attack on all the men and women who have served to protect our great country. | In case you don’t know me, my name is Jim Banks, and I am running for U.S. Senate in Indiana to protect our beautiful country and uphold the conservative values that make America great. Under Joe Biden’s administration, we are not a serious nation anymore, and our enemies know this. The Liberals running the country prioritize woke propaganda over protecting Americans. We must turn things around and do it fast if we want the United States to remain the best and strongest country in the world. I am proud to be an American, and I want to preserve the American dream for my three daughters. I will not let the Left indoctrinate our children in schools, and I will not let them destroy our military. I am fighting each day, and it’s the time for you to stand up and fight too, friend. | | ---|---|--- | | Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

We need to know where you stand on this!
| | | **URGENT UPDATE: Republicans are trying to __DEFUND__ NPR!**

Republicans are attacking one of our most important news sources, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13420?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230505-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRFv1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230505-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRFv1-Pros-sl1&akid=10622%2E9716520%2Emm0iXJ)

**Team, the GOP is going on the _attack_ against one of our most trusted news sources -- National Public Radio (NPR)!**

Now that they have a House majority, some far-right Republicans want to BAN any federal dollars from going to NPR -- threatening a news organization that has brought quality, non-profit journalism to Americans for _decades._

Republicans are trying to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox News -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up.

**_We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you! _**

**Do you support National Public Radio?**

Republicans are attacking one of our most important news sources, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file: Do you support National Public Radio? | | | | Team, the GOP is going on the attack against one of our most trusted news sources -- National Public Radio (NPR)! Now that they have a House majority, some far-right Republicans want to BAN any federal dollars from going to NPR -- threatening a news organization that has brought quality, non-profit journalism to Americans for decades. Republicans are trying to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox News -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up. We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you! Do you support National Public Radio? | | | If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. body:
Now is our chance to get ahead.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62876477/404820707/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230505Recruit_TEAM_90DO_3_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI1MDkwZmItOTZlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vzs9OEyZBtGUmyshJMc1xyokOBUsrE44iUar9McFyHk=)
Fellow Democrats, one of the most important and often overlooked tasks of each election cycle is happening right now: **recruiting candidates.**

While you may assume more people are eager to run than there are seats, the opposite is true. **More than 30% of our nation’s elections went uncontested in 2022, and in many competitive areas where both a Democrat or Republican had a chance to win.**

We and our network are hard at work identifying qualified Democratic candidates to run for elections throughout our state — because if we don’t run, we can’t win.

**[Recruiting candidates is no mean feat. Finding candidates we are confident will be a good fit and supplying them with the resources and training they need to win takes a LOT of time and investment. Will you pitch in $10 right now to help us continue to recruit and support Democratic candidates across Illinois?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62876478/404820708/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230505Recruit_TEAM_90DO_3_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI1MDkwZmItOTZlYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vzs9OEyZBtGUmyshJMc1xyokOBUsrE44iUar9McFyHk=)**

clean_body: Now is our chance to get ahead. = Fellow Democrats, one of the most important and often overlooked tasks of each election cycle is happening right now: recruiting candidates. While you may assume more people are eager to run than there are seats, the opposite is true. More than 30% of our nation’s elections went uncontested in 2022, and in many competitive areas where both a Democrat or Republican had a chance to win. We and our network are hard at work identifying qualified Democratic candidates to run for elections throughout our state — because if we don’t run, we can’t win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you, Team IDCCA | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. name: =?utf-8?Q?Warrior=20Mom?=
subject: Introducing Amazing Grace!
body:
** Amazing Grace
------------------------------------------------------------
I would like to introduce you to Grace Schara. Grace was 19 when she was taken out by a combination of lethal pharmaceutical drugs that none of us would have survived, along with an illegal Do Not Resuscitate order put on her life by a doctor. Grace had Down Syndrome and loved the Lord. She called her parents ‘earthly mom’ and ‘earthly dad.’

Grace’s family has joined the medical freedom fight, battling the injustice many families have experienced. Grace’s dad has become a full-time advocate and researcher, exposing the euthanasia agenda that has been in play for decades, which COVID brought to light.

Grace, along with almost 1.2M American lives, were taken by this agenda over the past 39 months.

Grace’s dad, Scott, filed a landmark lawsuit on April 11, 2023, to expose this agenda and to warn all doctors and nurses that they will be held accountable for their actions and that they cannot hide behind protocols and orders. If you would like to donate towards their work, go to
https://www.givesendgo.com/theskysthelimit (https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.givesendgo.com%2Ftheskysthelimit%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1J-GHPu-mHWSsU07ymJ1no1gSbHJ3C54NJRc0-CJTaGPnoFJiLnb6sGKQ&h=AT2pLlETRJchkS6XWP5MNR2oq9dB0TNd3ieY5AIbORnfC-erbiok5vFFxRz5GpOtKyMkkOL8ZRaYKWLgu0UcY-n36QCwSApJrI-O8KFTuDjbvZC2iZgesfP78xMcZLjdLGMvlf9Bb9b4vSEb165MHSw&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT0g5GUrFT2qasWQExqaTtN7kNY0rhFeDu4TxODVh_JRffIh0IL6DwIFSAU2K-jAXQtFwmiaYjiUbRJVs8uAZb1xRZxf0TuXOhP_AFDK4bTlsFFO5tqmw9Q4qH_m_Yp5fgYdbHHxIH1BF7qZrnkoiyqtHKpii4JSODLqE1TEgDH4HsFwObHcZoZdcu_ov6rkymFCuHAiopW0j_g) .

The family is calling on all supporters as the case proceeds. This lawsuit will open the doors for others, and the family would like to assist others through calls to action for those following Grace’s story.

Scott is asking for your support by signing up for updates via Grace’s website:
www.GraceSchara.com. clean_body: ** Amazing Grace I would like to introduce you to Grace Schara. Grace was 19 when she was taken out by a combination of lethal pharmaceutical drugs that none of us would have survived, along with an illegal Do Not Resuscitate order put on her life by a doctor. Grace had Down Syndrome and loved the Lord. She called her parents ‘earthly mom’ and ‘earthly dad.’ Grace’s family has joined the medical freedom fight, battling the injustice many families have experienced. Grace’s dad has become a full-time advocate and researcher, exposing the euthanasia agenda that has been in play for decades, which COVID brought to light. Grace, along with almost 1.2M American lives, were taken by this agenda over the past 39 months. Grace’s dad, Scott, filed a landmark lawsuit on April 11, 2023, to expose this agenda and to warn all doctors and nurses that they will be held accountable for their actions and that they cannot hide behind protocols and orders. If you would like to donate towards their work, go to () . The family is calling on all supporters as the case proceeds. This lawsuit will open the doors for others, and the family would like to assist others through calls to action for those following Grace’s story. Scott is asking for your support by signing up for updates via Grace’s website: www.GraceSchara.com. () Please sign up today. It takes less than a minute. Thank you and God bless! clean_body: I'm not surprised. | | = BREAKING: Inside Elections just reported that this is a top TOSS UP race of 2024. I’m not surprised. We flipped this seat blue just 7 months ago, and already far-right extremist and former congresswoman Yvette Herrell has called for a rematch. And when I say Herrell’s an extremist, I mean it. Herrell sponsored abortion bans , objected to certifying the 2020 presidential election, and wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act. I only beat Herrell by 1,350 votes last year. To keep this SWING district blue, we need to show voters the good work I’m doing for New Mexico (including introducing bipartisan legislation to bring more jobs to border communities, supporting working families, and defending our fundamental rights). = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support! I hate that I have to ask for contributions so soon after winning this seat, but every dollar and every second matters when you’re the top target. Fellow Conservative,

This is West Virginia Governor Jim Justice. I’m writing to let you know that after six highly successful years as governor of the Mountain State, **I’m launching my campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia**.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRsFE_6ne3tGq9Ek1SEPO8hSvAEP5Psg_NQ2DtVI36fa2IAKIUUA-5_t26BZ_5K33LithEq9i_c4c9WF3cHnfGYR_H_4GBsNTyuAN2okw3McnHZFVQfvhjsXFCuYrPBHvy7QOXy3BpApO8mgEVREoKU9wbShNJggfZLjBY123NVjh4%3D)
I thought long and hard about whether to enter this race. After a lot of prayer and consultation with my family, the conclusion we kept coming to was that **I must do this not only for the people of West Virginia but for every American**.

The stakes in this U.S. Senate race are high.**** Joe Manchin and I have known one another for a very long time, but I’m afraid I cannot stomach the idea of him serving in the Senate any longer. As much as I like Joe Manchin on a personal level, **as long as he represents West Virginia in DC, Chuck Schumer will continue to rule over the Senate with an iron fist.**

**I’m getting into this critical Senate race because we cannot allow a Democrat from a ruby-red state to play kingmaker in D.C. any longer.**
Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s agenda is too disastrous; we must take action TODAY. If you want to see this Senate seat flip Republican,**[can I count on you to chip in $10 to help me unseat Joe Manchin today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRsDslwbg5PZXfGDsMYHlgA35yTgmWOkDzFp-7iksyB7qrVqDHu9P-E31NUGM-_R0H1qDGEki4RWaUu3Pj6ZbOKlvvizhM-1EcbC5TXS2n3bsO2YUoLewrOHm9Z3ygr6aDS8FDE1QrPuWi2TldfbwPURxe_i3JZJ1DwCQnkn9f_ZlM%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRs-gRR5MoKQhxap1dwt3kA0UkAmU4Y-RtBE4foM0QLO1R49YhyW4o2vHyt_eu80cbFJqDoU1OI0ismiG8cM2yiI0BpVNUhw6pJ76Pw2YTZuEZ8Ph_HZrKxfQaCzuZWytRvrOsg6jfz71YU177PeHljDxMDTrWhdTyEjvB-3HBnj5A%3D)
**Joe Manchin in the Senate means advancing Biden’s failed liberal agenda every day.**

That’s how we got The Inflation Reduction Act with its 87,000 new IRS agents.

West Virginians don’t need the IRS breathing down their necks,_**nor do you.**_ The voters of the Mountain State have put their faith in me to be their governor over the last six years - **[now I'm asking them, and you, to put your trust in me and help send me to the United States Senate.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRsw66d64Ywoohu4ZdnN_yg41XSQaJMIRZE8KmbpcK6oHDjyzanBsQ0aSN5sjCCzMCIYaUJvz_LdSrjowxMaAHZFgAec7_ieeueXc1ELXZ8QezZn7t-Q0fiSYFJg6_HWKa5r5kjdIkT1eH5sAzLl-ZidoQDOjpjEfZoDBxDU1a1FdQ%3D)**

As West Virginia’s next United States Senator, I will fight for stronger borders and law and order. I’ll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, **and keep radical woke politics out of our kids’ classrooms**.

BUT - **[without your help right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRsNiQwe_Tc6dI5pYYSZ4-ql9yos6IZtiv-hGzGZXx6j2YGipJZ9YOWcrmvYH2_JIrE5khV2wuM_cEejRTitYAj6Rw5MMXstBE527TgDOG3Zwqxj14e_suLsPmHBppM1MRztLeJe-TGrIcA0XMh_bWuB8_xHRb8HnPgZJIgGW3MMoM%3D)** , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye.

Can my team and I count on your support today? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. **[Even if you can only chip in $1 right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b789927cfc41bf81eab8313d3c1e99&_e=DeWoRfl-mnAsterFPWu4dx0JBymFmqMyRPG0MBpmo-q3p8PZMe7zbjsGGzaGkWHsWikvNmfETHS7Its_x43jIu9RUMtEZz4Apv1sUyldXzra7aVbQBtV6rWqlm-xgLdXkMAABjuWx-oc7VJOp4HDYpdDh7UfQGilwNZgMYfqnhWMd5iA-mmOBlfrYCzd_HgVhUDei3J6doB2U5_52JWHlcqSTHu0ne4u2_fbgn8TBOFlHq3XsEuZWPBvuUMQ3HRsa-kC0QK9sy65A4OgBx2zxvKxpBixpH7DJ_vYbaFf3yQIkMq9NUIE2ozqHXU4zD89B6jmwuHFTwFRU7ODcO-ZwIke4xxhfMWpZKtFiOB_Uku4VkIkQn9i9QNatmPDhH6q3ixgeG5OTNPvZF9pfD7TU3OcLFqua8v37X-K50bskec%3D)** , I assure you it’ll be the best investment you’ve ever made.

clean_body: I’m launching my campaign to be the next United States Senator for West Virginia | | Fellow Conservative, This is West Virginia Governor Jim Justice. I’m writing to let you know that after six highly successful years as governor of the Mountain State, I’m launching my campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia. I thought long and hard about whether to enter this race. After a lot of prayer and consultation with my family, the conclusion we kept coming to was that I must do this not only for the people of West Virginia but for every American. The stakes in this U.S. Senate race are high.** Joe Manchin and I have known one another for a very long time, but I’m afraid I cannot stomach the idea of him serving in the Senate any longer. As much as I like Joe Manchin on a personal level, as long as he represents West Virginia in DC, Chuck Schumer will continue to rule over the Senate with an iron fist. I’m getting into this critical Senate race because we cannot allow a Democrat from a ruby-red state to play kingmaker in D.C. any longer. Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s agenda is too disastrous; we must take action TODAY. If you want to see this Senate seat flip Republican, Joe Manchin in the Senate means advancing Biden’s failed liberal agenda every day. That’s how we got The Inflation Reduction Act with its 87,000 new IRS agents. West Virginians don’t need the IRS breathing down their necks,nor do you. The voters of the Mountain State have put their faith in me to be their governor over the last six years - As West Virginia’s next United States Senator, I will fight for stronger borders and law and order. I’ll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, and keep radical woke politics out of our kids’ classrooms. BUT - , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye. Can my team and I count on your support today? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. , I assure you it’ll be the best investment you’ve ever made. Fellow Conservative, I'm a patriot. I truly am, and our country really means a lot to me. I’m not running out of self-interest. I’m running to serve. Thank you - I hope you’ll come along for the ride. Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Peter – my name is Mark Takano. I’m a US Congressman from California’s 39th district fighting for progressive values in Congress.

**Today, I wanted to _reintroduce myself_ and share my personal story.**

[**But I understand if you're busy right now. If you would like to skip hearing about my personal story, please consider chipping in $7 so I can keep fighting for progressive change in Congress »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62877037/404823129/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230505_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM4ODhjNC05Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8B-AO6rdZ5_xCQtXAJmBXqZOhrxujRKElbEXwubUCoA=) | [SKIP THE STORY: CHIP IN $7 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62877039/404823133/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230505_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM4ODhjNC05Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8B-AO6rdZ5_xCQtXAJmBXqZOhrxujRKElbEXwubUCoA=)

I grew up as the son and grandson of Japanese Americans who were **unjustly and forcibly incarcerated in racist internment camps** during World War II.

My family lost everything during their internment and had to rebuild from scratch.

Two decades later I was born in Riverside, California.

I went on to become a public school teacher for 23 years where **I saw many of the challenges our public school system faces.**

Then, in 1994, I ran for Congress but was outed as gay by my Republican challenger – and lost that election.

It wasn’t until 2012 that I finally won my race for Congress and became the **first openly gay person of color Congress Member.**

Peter, these experiences guide my work in Congress everyday:

**→I fought anti-Asian hate** so that we would never see the kind of violence my family experienced in the Japanese American internment camps.

**→I fight for a stronger education system** so that all students can receive a high-quality public school education.

**→I stand up for marginalized people** and LGBTQ+ rights so that no one experiences the kind of discrimination and hate that I did when I first ran for Congress.

**Peter, I hope that by reading about my story, you can see that I’m committed to this fight – because it’s personal. **

[**But there’s a problem: Republicans see how strong we are and they’re doing everything they can to tear us down. Peter, I need your help to save our progressive movement: Will you chip in $7 to support my work so I can keep fighting for us? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62877043/404823135/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230505_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM4ODhjNC05Y2ViLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8B-AO6rdZ5_xCQtXAJmBXqZOhrxujRKElbEXwubUCoA=)
